name: VAP Research Team
subject: Presidential power to seize voting machines?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@NorahODonnell: The January 6th committee shows a draft executive order from Dec. 2020 that would direct the Secretary of Defense to seize voting machines immediately. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NOD_SeizeVotingMachines.png]
The January 6th committee showed evidence in a hearing that President Trump was going to order the Department of Defense to seize voting machines around the country to search for evidence of wrongdoing.
While the order was never given, this highlights the lengths some people were willing to go in their use of federal power to justify their fantasies about elections they see as "stolen". This comes despite the states having control of our elections, not the federal government.
Team : We're looking to hear from voters in your area about your thoughts on this. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should the President have the power to order the military to seize voting machines without proof of wrongdoing?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100725_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100725_2no&amount=15]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100725_2&amount=20]

name: NDRC HQ
subject: Missouri Republicans just sold out their constituents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The NDRC is going all in to defeat Trump’s national gerrymandering scheme, but we need your help.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116813873/574520999/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmNGE3NWI4LWQ5YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIMLblGsyNCp9y9EBDLG3h-UVkiQ2qtEkzcbuNWOkJ8=&emci=69c92ea4-c1a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=6f4a75b8-d9a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, We need to take a short trip down memory lane to fully understand how much Missouri Republicans have betrayed voters to pass manipulated maps. Just three years ago, the very people who just passed the new, extreme gerrymander through the Republican-led Missouri House and Senate were opposed to a version of this map. State Representative Ann Kelley opposed a gerrymander that grouped rural counties with portions of Kansas City, explaining that it wasn’t right to group rural and urban communities together. **“We’re not the same. We have different views,”** she said. **Last month, Kelley voted for a gerrymander that does exactly what she opposed before.** Less than three months ago, in July, it seemed as though other state legislators would maintain this stance once again, prioritizing fair representation for their constituents over blind loyalty to Trump. As Chad Perkins, speaker pro tem of the Missouri House, put it: **“We do redistricting every 10 years. We’ve already done that.** **To do it again would be out of character with the way Missouri operates.”** However, once pressure from the Trump White House ramped up in August, they did a 180. The same Chad Perkins who was against a mid-decade map redraw earlier in the summer brought the egregious gerrymander to the House floor for a vote. **The gerrymander passed the Missouri House with only Republican votes (and bipartisan opposition).** So what changed? Absolutely nothing, Peter. Except that Missouri Republicans have decided to follow orders from the Trump White House instead of listening to their constituents. The reality is, Missourians did not want this gerrymander three years ago, and they do not want it today. Despite that, the governor has signed this Trump-backed scheme into law. **The fair maps movement is actively challenging this gerrymander in court. At the same time, the NDRC is focused on throwing sand in the gears of the national Trump-led map manipulation scheme to prevent it from silencing voters.** **[Rush a donation to the NDRC to power this critical work for fair maps and fair representation in Missouri and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116813874/574521000/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MissouriTrump_email_20251007-NDRC-Tier1-MissouriTrump_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251007-NDRC-Tier1-MissouriTrump_&utm_campaign=MissouriTrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmNGE3NWI4LWQ5YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIMLblGsyNCp9y9EBDLG3h-UVkiQ2qtEkzcbuNWOkJ8=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The NDRC is going all in to defeat Trump’s national gerrymandering scheme, but we need your help. | Peter, We need to take a short trip down memory lane to fully understand how much Missouri Republicans have betrayed voters to pass manipulated maps. Just three years ago, the very people who just passed the new, extreme gerrymander through the Republican-led Missouri House and Senate were opposed to a version of this map. State Representative Ann Kelley opposed a gerrymander that grouped rural counties with portions of Kansas City, explaining that it wasn’t right to group rural and urban communities together. “We’re not the same. We have different views,” she said. Last month, Kelley voted for a gerrymander that does exactly what she opposed before. Less than three months ago, in July, it seemed as though other state legislators would maintain this stance once again, prioritizing fair representation for their constituents over blind loyalty to Trump. As Chad Perkins, speaker pro tem of the Missouri House, put it: “We do redistricting every 10 years. We’ve already done that. To do it again would be out of character with the way Missouri operates.” However, once pressure from the Trump White House ramped up in August, they did a 180. The same Chad Perkins who was against a mid-decade map redraw earlier in the summer brought the egregious gerrymander to the House floor for a vote. The gerrymander passed the Missouri House with only Republican votes (and bipartisan opposition). So what changed? Absolutely nothing, Peter. Except that Missouri Republicans have decided to follow orders from the Trump White House instead of listening to their constituents. The reality is, Missourians did not want this gerrymander three years ago, and they do not want it today. Despite that, the governor has signed this Trump-backed scheme into law. The fair maps movement is actively challenging this gerrymander in court. At the same time, the NDRC is focused on throwing sand in the gears of the national Trump-led map manipulation scheme to prevent it from silencing voters. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

_THANK YOU for standing up to Donald Trump’s dangerous authoritarian escalation._

Without strong leaders like you, Trump will take over ANY city he pleases — ultimately declaring himself a DICTATOR!

She is trying to intimidate us, but she won’t succeed. I won’t be silenced by a conspiracy theory monger whose only goal is to enable the worst impulses of the far-right. = Peter, Laura Loomer’s smear campaign isn’t the first time I’ve faced the onslaught of the MAGA right. National Republicans know that this race will determine who controls the U.S. Senate, so they’re throwing everything they have at us. This is just another attempt to activate the far-right’s network of online trolls and grifters against us — and it’s doing nothing but firing me up even more. They’re trying to divide us, but I will never back down. I will never give up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = We have work to do, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. name: Gabby Giffords (via democrats.org)
subject: An opportunity I’m excited to share with you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
---
Derek, As a thank you for all of the work you’ve been doing, I am excited to invite you to a contest the Democratic National Committee is hosting. _Five_ winners will be chosen to attend their annual leadership conference this fall. I’ll be there, and would love to see you there, too. If you’re one of the winners, you’ll have the chance to learn directly from Democratic leaders about the important work Democrats are doing to make our communities safer, fight back against Republicans’ attempts to erode commonsense gun safety legislation, and more. [**You can use this link to make a contribution and to be automatically entered for your chance to attend the leadership conference. The DNC will cover the flight and accommodations for you and a guest:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251007_4767_fr&refcode2=4767_22930333_PRLN5c&akid=4767%2E22930333%2EPRLN5c) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251007_4767_fr&refcode2=4767_22930333_PRLN5c&akid=4767%2E22930333%2EPRLN5c)**

Right now, Trump’s pro-gun lobby agenda is making our communities less safe. It’s more important than ever that we reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information ahead of upcoming elections, and I know you’re with me in this work, too. I am grateful to you for staying involved — _especially_ when it’s tough.
[**Your contribution today will go directly toward funding the DNC’s work to reach voters and organize across the country. And when you pitch in, you’ll be automatically entered to attend their annual leadership conference, too.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251007_4767_fr&refcode2=4767_22930333_PRLN5c&akid=4767%2E22930333%2EPRLN5c)
Thank you again, and I hope to see you soon.
Gabby
Gabby Giffords
Former U.S. Representative

clean_body: I have to know... do you have my back? I have to know... do you have my back? | | | | | Fellow American, Democrats lost the 2024 election. Period. But instead of following the voters ' mandate, they're now holding the government hostage to protect illegal aliens and fund their left-wing propaganda projects like NPR. Democrats caused this shutdown. They own every single minute of it. That's the honest-to-God truth. But you and I know the media is going to try and pin it on me and President Trump - and all because we REFUSE to sell out our country to illegal aliens. Let me be clear: I don't care what the media thinks. I certainly don't care what Schumer thinks. The only opinion I care about is YOURS. So, are youwith me? Do you have my back as I REFUSE to cave to the hostile Democrats who are putting illegals before Americans?[[link]]() Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | |

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Democrats running in must-win races are already getting hammered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races
#
We’ve got some bad news, Peter: **Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting pummeled with well-funded GOP attacks.**
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races — and we’re still more than a year away from the 2026 election! **[Will you help us fight back now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96395?refcode=em20251007-9541&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9541%2E614464%2EWelq3D)**
**[SUPPORT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96395?refcode=em20251007-9541&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9541%2E614464%2EWelq3D)**
We can’t afford to fall behind this early. The simple truth is that if we don’t start organizing and building our war chest now, we could risk letting MAGA Republicans define the narrative and keep their control over the Senate AND the House.
Over the coming weeks + months, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us prepare for the fight ahead. **We need the resources to help Democrats in must-win races introduce themselves to voters while also standing up to the inevitable onslaught of GOP attacks.[Will you rush a donation of any amount today to help us do it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96395?refcode=em20251007-9541&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9541%2E614464%2EWelq3D)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: On the road
body:
I’ve been in the car for a long time, Peter.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=726%2E1086043%2ERwM_Mc)
Peter, one of my favorite parts of being governor has been getting to see all of Maryland.
Before I ran for governor, I spent a lot of my time around Baltimore. So when we launched our first campaign and won, I was determined to change that -- as governor, visiting all 24 Maryland counties and jurisdictions in my first year in office.
We’re on the road again today. My team and I are driving from Frostburg, Maryland in the Allegany Mountains all the way to Ocean City on the Eastern Shore, listening to your stories and sharing mine.
**My job is leading Maryland forward, so I’m not slowing down any time soon.**
**[Our work isn’t done yet, so I’m writing you this email to ask: Can you chip in $5 or any amount to power our reelection campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251007-1?refcode=em-20251007-1&refcode2=726_1086043_RwM_Mc&akid=726%2E1086043%2ERwM_Mc)**
Being governor means going everywhere and doing everything I can to represent the people of Maryland. In every corner of our state, we’re showing there’s a better way to lead -- and we’re getting results.
The energy of the Marylanders I’ve met on the road is what fuels our fight for progress. From Garrett County to Worcester County and everywhere in between, there are so many Marylanders who are committed to the work of making ours a state where we leave no one behind.
**[If you’re with me and ready to support that work, please, chip in any amount today to power our campaign and keep me in the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251007-1?refcode=em-20251007-1&refcode2=726_1086043_RwM_Mc&akid=726%2E1086043%2ERwM_Mc)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251007-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251007-1&refcode2=726_1086043_RwM_Mc&akid=726%2E1086043%2ERwM_Mc)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251007-1?refcode=em-20251007-1&refcode2=726_1086043_RwM_Mc&akid=726%2E1086043%2ERwM_Mc)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251007-1&t=2&refcode2=726_1086043_RwM_Mc&akid=726%2E1086043%2ERwM_Mc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

subject: “Who the hell is she to say that?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Breaking news ➡️
Donald Trump just attacked Alexandria from the Oval Office:
Trump is attacking Alexandria because she’s telling the truth about Trump and Republicans causing health insurance premiums to as much as double:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251007.hs_uKB&refcode=em20251007-9909-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9909%2E2526796%2EPofn8I)
Alexandria ran for Congress not from the left or the right, _but from the bottom._
She believes that in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world, when a person gets sick, they shouldn’t go bankrupt. Alexandria will always demand better for all of us no matter how much vitriol Trump or any member of this administration spews at her.

name: The Spanberger Campaign
subject: You need to see this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

We refuse to take anything for granted in this race, and here's why:
Back in 2021, Democrats led in polls all year long, only for the tide to turn against us in the immediate leadup to Election Day. Now, with just four weeks to go, the polls are all over the place, with one showing us up double digits and another showing our opponent narrowing the gap to just three points.
_Consider for a moment what it will mean for Winsome to have another $1.5 million in her account._
Even more attacks. Even more lies. And even more work we must do to set the record straight.
That's why Abigail needs you to stand beside her again today, Peter. Every donation — whatever the amount — will help us keep our organizers in the field and our ads on the air.
[_**So, we're asking you again with real urgency: Can Abigail Spanberger count on you to contribute to our campaign before midnight? body:
I grew up in Tucson, in neighborhoods gripped by poverty, crime, and hopelessness; the result of decades of failed Democrat policies. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0434b4d9981b/im-their-worst-nightmare-13905538?e=36b5d8efc6)
---

---
| | Patriot,

I wasn’t born into privilege.

I grew up in Tucson, in neighborhoods gripped by poverty, crime, and hopelessness; **the result of decades of failed Democrat policies.**

But I was also raised to believe in something greater: that hard work, faith, and service could change a life and a community.

_That’s why I joined the United States Army. It was my way of giving back, and of leading when others turned away._

>From serving alongside an infantry division to becoming an Army chaplain candidate, I’ve spent my life working to lift others up and defend what’s right.

**Today, that same mission drives me to run for Congress. **

Because too many Arizonans still feel left behind. Our schools are broken. Families are struggling. Veterans aren’t getting the care they deserve. And small businesses are being smothered by bad policy and red tape.

We can change that. But I can’t do it alone.

[**One of our most dedicated supporters has just extended their matching challenge; doubling every donation, up to $2,500.**](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=368306f3e1&e=36b5d8efc6)

**That means your $25 becomes $50. Your $100 becomes $200. And every dollar will go directly toward building the movement we need to restore faith, opportunity, and common sense in Arizona.**

_Will you stand with me and double your impact today?_
---
| [DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT NOW](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=cb9c2eda25&e=36b5d8efc6 "DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT NOW")
---
| **Together, we can protect our freedoms, reform what’s broken, and make Arizona a place where the American Dream is alive for all of us. **
---
| For freedom,

Alex Stovall
U.S. Army Veteran | Conservative | AZ-05

clean_body: I grew up in Tucson, in neighborhoods gripped by poverty, crime, and hopelessness; the result of decades of failed Democrat policies. | | | | | | | Patriot, I wasn’t born into privilege. I grew up in Tucson, in neighborhoods gripped by poverty, crime, and hopelessness; the result of decades of failed Democrat policies. But I was also raised to believe in something greater: that hard work, faith, and service could change a life and a community. That’s why I joined the United States Army. It was my way of giving back, and of leading when others turned away. From serving alongside an infantry division to becoming an Army chaplain candidate, I’ve spent my life working to lift others up and defend what’s right. Today, that same mission drives me to run for Congress. Because too many Arizonans still feel left behind. Our schools are broken. Families are struggling. Veterans aren’t getting the care they deserve. And small businesses are being smothered by bad policy and red tape. We can change that. But I can’t do it alone. That means your $25 becomes $50. Your $100 becomes $200. And every dollar will go directly toward building the movement we need to restore faith, opportunity, and common sense in Arizona. Will you stand with me and double your impact today? | "DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT NOW" | Together, we can protect our freedoms, reform what’s broken, and make Arizona a place where the American Dream is alive for all of us. | For freedom, Alex Stovall U.S. Army Veteran | Conservative | AZ-05 | "DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT NOW" | "© PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR ARIZONA " | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Alex For Arizona, All rights reserved. Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: I'd like to have an honest conversation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor
body:
An important message about the future of our state.| | | _Click here if you wish to unsubscribe_
---
Dear Peter, I’d like to have an honest conversation with you about our great state. I believe our future is bright and Alaska’s best days are ahead of us. **That’s why today, I’m excited to officially launch my campaign to be our next governor.** As lieutenant governor, I’ve fought tough battles for Alaskans. As Commissioner of Corrections, I fought to repeal soft-on-crime laws _and won_. And in the state legislature, I went up against politicians in Juneau to protect the PFD _and won_. I promise to bring the same grit and common sense to the Governor’s office, because I want to ensure Alaska remains the best place to live, work, and raise a family for our kids and grandkids. If that’s enough for you, please join my **_[launch team](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=b53163fe34034ab589978cf74a23e290&_e=2LWFgYH8MYUJ4nlH84E5pQMkQhYdlTVOnXwnJkbv4iGm1ydm8cnvuz1Da0QhDGPRrBLu53324Ln_DBl7-gZy89JIgKnDYd75u2Fj9O8JcfLzgmpub0LEty187NuW96t4h65fPTupio7UQ8e6Y3CCT8355k7CCiP-Y4M9yRlDaeUFtBddlWv0ra6_SYKzAVNVWRQ4Dfkc-hj6jXpPe14NhWF6ptWsF-W-8B2mcNOZsAw1maptdZaDsnLfLjruh4MQ9u2KYUk8Kl5jeDHcjtGfOHDwgW2STriVkN37zKw5LsjkOKy2b_DMWPx6cFj5bL2SytygODxjJdLd5YfvgulJdBzTfk6KH8X4rfInsMvXgr2zL0UoUA0L6R8cSIKsGLHUCzY7euX2pfcjADqG2FpqNLwN3TTaCyvKyn1ybTGI1KPjoJcenbVLKXWV6CINLvWNyexqeMzNH28hsWQOL2wxTIBotuAltWH4KSsY5WPmQf9-rqH1NC1Gq7y_jRD3Y9GhlomgyWHI5KDpvZdJDy2HO6fimFmilzCLkUVREjHQN0HGsdl7PkfTpPUJFkqKkVNzQ0OFl6qT9sgEptTI-iBmcqyJKiNOgeuCza5M8t0rRSSbPzwlOHRzQQbJUDG7F50uZfJolWsV7p0lzQ4vz0Uy-iyvUx-mv6cNnqlsaKSnBmpXKPKdsDXsyq0UMaELF-cwqwUEBj9e3ITa0VrIJWo9sb_UkZi90mf57ooOxHR7BEZZ6NaAE_Xfrcepi_B56IxMDTrO9J3f0CMCfaHgivHRzAS1NeSSg7imHTKrDdFiPBrqpakm85rv9gkljJ2W-dB2T49B8nL3uunWnwaSoqEyhptLakb3lGcT6KFcSQFx_ZJ1nygZuyxgJV9K9YQkdx4dci20kymgiMPTtwJ14fDql2X771UmX7tsoRrB5B44MBEwb05plpPYDtYQeLdFjttJI5HkZWMgggJdEcl400hfAOeBPb06yDCCeQQeRAq55C9wNAHGCa-pMmMd9RTiCd8-8czTYF5PmU8mxroKhEUL7m2LJSpRuHIjtuxgKFnO7Se4ic2bYdvp4_rkwOa-elMWJQsUyBziz5WGkcE9nc3Iodi1sHFMqmGIDxoMRZQ-Mwk-IulCWS_4B1Yp9cGAfZFCq8lZqdIkubiDkwpOQOMMCHrZDFD1a51-b-mFynrYKRI7omKKbg4nOvy6-apNX0jvCiZjHpsVksHAtFjaKccscax0T5mRJw682EGiJQdTmG6t4WDoetNMiKv0-RAHRK4Phvdy0aBhqq_V6-2vGvdf7Hc258RDDvWAoqDFfoW-a0egMxPw3m08dTSQ2B_84Tsbk4u7ZbgCYCnLSJblAFzf6Vw371HC1EgbK8heAihz_IZm-u3EzpQhXWlN3js8nC-N66IpMLzLleszhUHKzy7IxFbumUGaXm9ouv5X4oFEghXdSkacMBMjYV5bLx6Ln1ISifGl3HQIUtcE2tbue3noCbt6ERkELk0Xs1O0he8U-JnNX03acIOap0nlLW937vwxfODDGKBqV1lfmHGZOoi9T8CazaUbPCI2znB2Mk_G-Gbs6OlN0t8qcmqV2DHKS0Kg) ↓My Alaska story starts at 18. I came up for a two-week summer trip and ended up staying to work on a pipeline. I loved the attitude here. It was rugged, independent, full of American spirit, neighborly, and welcoming. Every day was a new adventure, so I decided to stay and build a life, career, and family here. After working in several different industries, I was encouraged to run for office by my community. From serving nine years in the Legislature to stepping up as Commissioner of Corrections and now as your Lieutenant Governor, I’ve always kept my word and put Alaskans first above party politics and political pressure. _**That’s how you have to lead in Alaska:
with _grit_ and the _resolve_ to do the right thing.**_ As governor, I’ll focus on what matters most:
* _**Protecting**_ the PFD for families today and tomorrow
* Growing jobs and _**strengthening**_ our economy
* Supporting resource development to _**lower costs**_ and achieve energy independence
* Backing law enforcement and _**keeping our communities safe**_
* Balancing budgets and _**cutting waste**_
* Building _**strong schools**_ and preparing students for the future.

Alaska gave me everything, and I vow to continue giving back. Now that you know my story, I hope to hear yours over the next year. Today, I am hopeful that you will take two minutes to become a part of our [**launch team**](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=b53163fe34034ab589978cf74a23e290&_e=2LWFgYH8MYUJ4nlH84E5pQMkQhYdlTVOnXwnJkbv4iGm1ydm8cnvuz1Da0QhDGPRrBLu53324Ln_DBl7-gZy89JIgKnDYd75u2Fj9O8JcfLzgmpub0LEty187NuW96t4h65fPTupio7UQ8e6Y3CCT8355k7CCiP-Y4M9yRlDaeUFtBddlWv0ra6_SYKzAVNVWRQ4Dfkc-hj6jXpPe14NhWF6ptWsF-W-8B2mcNOZsAw1maptdZaDsnLfLjruh4MQ9u2KYUk8Kl5jeDHcjtGfOHDwgW2STriVkN37zKw5LsjkOKy2b_DMWPx6cFj5bL2SytygODxjJdLd5YfvgulJdBzTfk6KH8X4rfInsMvXgr2zL0UoUA0L6R8cSIKsGLHUCzY7euX2pfcjADqG2FpqNLwN3TTaCyvKyn1ybTGI1KPjoJcenbVLKXWV6CINLvWNyexqeMzNH28hsWQOL2wxTORVAWqcEmAwwBdXfAT5KNTZSsHjTHK6WL_ZOv0HOScCIzNNQ3FPs7exiPgAlOOcIiIIzJ-aPJAyLKp6Z11eCgGRj2pTo1Hacm-VuPjQ6wx27IK46VYxLcQuavydGWfghEu3SoKqMpiqGqQ4MrBLn_yRnzcDEbpd6_AbwR_YkAyHk0JbarKz7pcy4Llf8nkjIKYVGiNscvUskFWh7qxM0DP3lVBK0xTg_lC7VNx6hbT_ST4tII-5g3wCmVcygXl_TKQXzOS0KmZiEQIymqGSbzFnwe49Lz_6sbz_kVxtJGc0xCPWKXvyy4Hr6THXLGaGs2y9x2W6B4CdHaeBWP-HbAgaD0gX9U7ZXopQwABrOm12_hiY7wxpwamompSKQ0WZnYyGZQwhXV_WybGRVdduirUEIdgWigUBQVXYk6p8ll5HBKv2n1jiflLh4-Sr8vvu4a5aJxdp3NZByLp3ld1je7JXM1T-e7xKy8FjxHNGwOILyw39ywB5-vtC71INKSD3iyLMjM1YI_nxI5dGLeqaB7q7_jQXhaRNI-qyO3TBMUlQB11Qlkjv4rCqqd3yXNTwVduaR6dxwSs10BwMtboYpb7DCWc-ZC5rI95RONh47Ynj3_HrJVv8ZISowd64cUAeGnFoZMiK-EBHgwP7SU2w76QXsStNtGg7SXnibaKFCOlM5H5iqiCbbi-uN3wg_Zmg7m7IimSPSVLV07DtPE0io8k9-41UnGYQnT_b98CVEdy_YEKERqVdWTF0S7B-fXosz8luzDl-6Uko3WXXCFnAogJyizHqpDUwI2F2RHqHKvqQeHMyFuaB8_UNh7Ci4NppUIFkcG_yDucDgeeT0H6Oj1cpbKZ8gfz9yKhbioTSfyqlZmqwRuI8OwKz1GvR5_U5xvdFZm-QmuPb-YUTs6eKe4Vqr0o68T259f6RTF0_ixYKiERK_-K7ldj9GJcWYSwFSudd8QOFJ8mDNZ7YflgKcpPXYkbweFPjeyNlEOpL2w9HNZ2nXiapog7NrQsAZHDnCLJVBPzgmMa5oVpZC8Gr6cgzAgMqCiXXbNRtAkU52KmmervEVArXHBXAGNv8X-VrrM42bd-0auVtYxqk82aJscMCXKBjDtCZcafQVZhMASD3) with a small or large financial contribution. clean_body: An important message about the future of our state.| | | Click here if you wish to unsubscribe Dear Peter, I’d like to have an honest conversation with you about our great state. I believe our future is bright and Alaska’s best days are ahead of us. That’s why today, I’m excited to officially launch my campaign to be our next governor. As lieutenant governor, I’ve fought tough battles for Alaskans. As Commissioner of Corrections, I fought to repeal soft-on-crime laws and won. And in the state legislature, I went up against politicians in Juneau to protect the PFD and won. I promise to bring the same grit and common sense to the Governor’s office, because I want to ensure Alaska remains the best place to live, work, and raise a family for our kids and grandkids. If that’s enough for you, please join my by supporting me . If you’d like to read more of my story, check it out below! ↓My Alaska story starts at 18. I came up for a two-week summer trip and ended up staying to work on a pipeline. I loved the attitude here. It was rugged, independent, full of American spirit, neighborly, and welcoming. Every day was a new adventure, so I decided to stay and build a life, career, and family here. After working in several different industries, I was encouraged to run for office by my community. From serving nine years in the Legislature to stepping up as Commissioner of Corrections and now as your Lieutenant Governor, I’ve always kept my word and put Alaskans first above party politics and political pressure. That’s how you have to lead in Alaska: with grit and the resolve to do the right thing. As governor, I’ll focus on what matters most: Protecting the PFD for families today and tomorrow Growing jobs and strengthening our economy Supporting resource development to lower costs and achieve energy independence Backing law enforcement and keeping our communities safe Balancing budgets and cutting waste Building strong schools and preparing students for the future. Alaska gave me everything, and I vow to continue giving back. Now that you know my story, I hope to hear yours over the next year. Today, I am hopeful that you will take two minutes to become a part of our with a small or large financial contribution. Whatever fits your budget! I’d be honored to have your support. Together, we will build a stronger future for Alaska. With gratitude, Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Matthew Frohlich, Executive Director
subject: Regale in the Golden Era: WAGOP Annual Fall Dinner Set for Friday, Oct. 24, 2025
body:
Regale in the Golden Era: WAGOP Annual Fall Dinner Set for Friday, Oct. 24, 2025

| | | | | [|
---](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4fcdcbc910&e=6a281f566d)
| | | | |
---
| |

Join the Washington State Republican Party (WAGOP) as we celebrate our 48th annual dinner at the Bellevue Hyatt on Friday evening Oct. 24th from 5:30-9:30 pm.

Gather and mingle with like-minded conservatives and high-profile speakers and guests, including Fox News contributor and former Utah Congressman Jason Chaffetz, who served on the House Oversight Committee.

At the VIP reception, beginning at 6 PM, guests will also have an opportunity to have their picture taken with Jason, who will be delivering the evening keynote.

For too long, Republicans across WA have been in the political wilderness, but a resurgence is afoot—enthusiasm and momentum are building. Hear from Chairman Rep. Jim Walsh on the party's plans to take back our state.

Washington is worth fighting for. With your help, we will win! For more information on the WAGOP 2025 Annual Fall Dinner please click [here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1d1d0bb74e&e=6a281f566d). We hope you can make it.
Thank you.

subject: The finish line is in sight, Friend.

body:
| | | Running this campaign has felt like running a marathon. Step by step, block by block, conversation by conversation—we’ve built something powerful together. **And now, I can see the finish line ahead.****_Victory is in sight._** But anyone who has ever run a race knows the last stretch is the hardest. That’s when your opponents push the pace. That’s when every ounce of energy matters. That’s when you dig deep and give it everything you have. That’s where we are **right now.** I’m asking you to help me dig deep. With your support, we can push past the attacks, cross the finish line, and prove that a grassroots campaign powered by people — not big money — can win. **[Can you donate whatever you can today to help us make one final push to victory?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6HF4v65VHENXKXmwg_p7czKt_4p0hcdQV6Yo3CVDkc-aVpJqj2t555fs9rkrHXPFMPWr3tHRjMzsEG2CgMsT-XdTtRB-Qi4q8AoDZ6fnzgllp5ly5WPCgoAjaUq3x5HwJ2XH4mSUTYWDtiClND87pbABU1nnMlVLjZgHMz6eWpmle09owGHva5tQgAUaV4M20E6yHxwxTjIT8lUrwTitOKP4aMSgyhmDEtZInn5SbCwA/4kk/MO1UALONQKycxSBCcQa9Aw/h0/h001.pWkecPFmiZaRYP8bEojd8-RWbNBLoT8PjEjw_uhToU8)** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

And now, I can see the finish line ahead.Victory is in sight. But anyone who has ever run a race knows the last stretch is the hardest. That’s when your opponents push the pace. That’s when every ounce of energy matters. That’s when you dig deep and give it everything you have. That’s where we are right now. I’m asking you to help me dig deep. * **TOP NEWS**

**" National Guard members from Texas are in Illinois in Trump's latest move to send troops to cities," **AP's **Erin Hooley** and**Christine Fernando** \-- "National Guard members from Texas were getting settled at an Army Reserve center in Illinois on Tuesday, the most visible sign yet of the Trump administration's plan to send troops to the Chicago area despite a lawsuit and [vigorous opposition](https://substack.com/redirect/f97ab99c-d2cc-4bc3-bccd-b4234cb6039c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Democratic elected leaders.

Illinois Gov. **JB Pritzker** , who has accused President **Donald Trump** of using troops as "political props" and "pawns," said he didn't get a heads-up from Washington.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b1dcd74d-4cbb-4ed5-89aa-a6d2b7ebd185?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Associated Press saw military personnel in uniforms with the Texas National Guard patch at the U.S. Army Reserve Center in Elwood, 55 miles southwest of Chicago. Trucks marked Emergency Disaster Services pulled in and out, dropping off portable toilets and other supplies. Trailers were set up in rows. Extra fencing was spread across the perimeter.

The Guard's exact mission was not immediately clear, though the Trump administration has an aggressive immigration enforcement operation in the nation's third-largest city, and protesters have frequently rallied at an immigration building outside Chicago in Broadview. The president repeatedly has described Chicago in hostile terms, calling it a "hell hole" of crime, although police statistics show significant drops in most crimes, including homicides.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b1dcd74d-4cbb-4ed5-89aa-a6d2b7ebd185?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Trump's bid to deploy the military on U.S. soil over local opposition has [triggered a conflict with blue state governors](https://substack.com/redirect/bc71d47a-982d-46b5-9a00-b6943be27352?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Illinois and Chicago are urging a federal judge to intervene and stop "Trump's long-declared 'War'" on the state. A court hearing on their lawsuit is scheduled for Thursday. In Oregon, a [judge over the weekend](https://substack.com/redirect/8202a9db-bf23-4027-b82c-97b6c874429d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) blocked the Guard's deployment to Portland, Oregon.

Pritzker had predicted Monday that Illinois National Guard troops would be activated, along with 400 from Texas. Texas Republican Gov. **Greg Abbott** posted a picture on social media showing troops boarding a plane and declared, "ever ready."

Pritzker said he "literally canceled everything" Saturday in anticipation of a call from Defense Secretary **Pete Hegseth**.

"They have not picked up the phone and called me. Not once," Pritzker said Tuesday at a gathering of business, cultural and political leaders in Minneapolis.

The nearly 150-year-old [Posse Comitatus Act](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb320fb-2687-4541-bc87-7991512a259c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) limits the military's role in enforcing domestic laws. However, Trump has said he would be willing to invoke the Insurrection Act, which allows a president to dispatch active duty military in states that are unable to put down an insurrection or are defying federal law.

The Federal Aviation Administration [ordered flight restrictions](https://substack.com/redirect/aee44a46-474e-4f44-a4d1-0ba55054eab2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the Army Reserve Center for security reasons until Dec. 6.

**Robert Hartley** , 62, who works at Raceway Pizza & More near the site, said he has doubts about putting the Guard on duty.

"I think the president might be overstepping his boundaries," Hartley said." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/68a150ad-fb45-4e0f-ae9e-dfa2b21e4815?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker , who has accused President Donald Trump of using troops as "political props" and "pawns," said he didn't get a heads-up from Washington. The Associated Press saw military personnel in uniforms with the Texas National Guard patch at the U.S. Army Reserve Center in Elwood, 55 miles southwest of Chicago. Trucks marked Emergency Disaster Services pulled in and out, dropping off portable toilets and other supplies. Trailers were set up in rows. Extra fencing was spread across the perimeter. The Guard's exact mission was not immediately clear, though the Trump administration has an aggressive immigration enforcement operation in the nation's third-largest city, and protesters have frequently rallied at an immigration building outside Chicago in Broadview. The president repeatedly has described Chicago in hostile terms, calling it a "hell hole" of crime, although police statistics show significant drops in most crimes, including homicides. Trump's bid to deploy the military on U.S. soil over local opposition has . Illinois and Chicago are urging a federal judge to intervene and stop "Trump's long-declared 'War'" on the state. A court hearing on their lawsuit is scheduled for Thursday. In Oregon, a blocked the Guard's deployment to Portland, Oregon. Pritzker had predicted Monday that Illinois National Guard troops would be activated, along with 400 from Texas. Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott posted a picture on social media showing troops boarding a plane and declared, "ever ready." Pritzker said he "literally canceled everything" Saturday in anticipation of a call from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. "They have not picked up the phone and called me. Not once," Pritzker said Tuesday at a gathering of business, cultural and political leaders in Minneapolis. The nearly 150-year-old limits the military's role in enforcing domestic laws. However, Trump has said he would be willing to invoke the Insurrection Act, which allows a president to dispatch active duty military in states that are unable to put down an insurrection or are defying federal law. Robert Hartley , 62, who works at Raceway Pizza & More near the site, said he has doubts about putting the Guard on duty. "I think the president might be overstepping his boundaries," Hartley said." * **TOP NEWS**

**" National Guard members from Texas are in Illinois in Trump's latest move to send troops to cities," **AP's **Erin Hooley** and**Christine Fernando** \-- "National Guard members from Texas were getting settled at an Army Reserve center in Illinois on Tuesday, the most visible sign yet of the Trump administration's plan to send troops to the Chicago area despite a lawsuit and [vigorous opposition](https://substack.com/redirect/4314bf1c-8288-4def-a6db-e30a0c886898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Democratic elected leaders.

Illinois Gov. **JB Pritzker** , who has accused President **Donald Trump** of using troops as "political props" and "pawns," said he didn't get a heads-up from Washington.

The Associated Press saw military personnel in uniforms with the Texas National Guard patch at the U.S. Army Reserve Center in Elwood, 55 miles southwest of Chicago. Trucks marked Emergency Disaster Services pulled in and out, dropping off portable toilets and other supplies. Trailers were set up in rows. Extra fencing was spread across the perimeter.

The Guard's exact mission was not immediately clear, though the Trump administration has an aggressive immigration enforcement operation in the nation's third-largest city, and protesters have frequently rallied at an immigration building outside Chicago in Broadview. The president repeatedly has described Chicago in hostile terms, calling it a "hell hole" of crime, although police statistics show significant drops in most crimes, including homicides.

Trump's bid to deploy the military on U.S. soil over local opposition has [triggered a conflict with blue state governors](https://substack.com/redirect/13ae973b-6cf6-4c2d-8b5f-cb64f0f5c7f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Illinois and Chicago are urging a federal judge to intervene and stop "Trump's long-declared 'War'" on the state. A court hearing on their lawsuit is scheduled for Thursday. In Oregon, a [judge over the weekend](https://substack.com/redirect/4b7756f7-e1b4-45ac-8b4b-62f96702a294?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) blocked the Guard's deployment to Portland, Oregon.

Pritzker had predicted Monday that Illinois National Guard troops would be activated, along with 400 from Texas. Texas Republican Gov. **Greg Abbott** posted a picture on social media showing troops boarding a plane and declared, "ever ready."

Pritzker said he "literally canceled everything" Saturday in anticipation of a call from Defense Secretary **Pete Hegseth**.

"They have not picked up the phone and called me. Not once," Pritzker said Tuesday at a gathering of business, cultural and political leaders in Minneapolis.

The nearly 150-year-old [Posse Comitatus Act](https://substack.com/redirect/8f218616-4571-4bbb-93c0-cee88d380c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) limits the military's role in enforcing domestic laws. However, Trump has said he would be willing to invoke the Insurrection Act, which allows a president to dispatch active duty military in states that are unable to put down an insurrection or are defying federal law.

The Federal Aviation Administration [ordered flight restrictions](https://substack.com/redirect/1e83535d-5a14-4b2b-aaa7-cc0d499f6911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the Army Reserve Center for security reasons until Dec. 6.

**Robert Hartley** , 62, who works at Raceway Pizza & More near the site, said he has doubts about putting the Guard on duty.

"I think the president might be overstepping his boundaries," Hartley said." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/5fccc6e3-9a63-45ec-8f8a-d321d92238ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS " National Guard members from Texas are in Illinois in Trump's latest move to send troops to cities," AP's Erin Hooley andChristine Fernando \-- "National Guard members from Texas were getting settled at an Army Reserve center in Illinois on Tuesday, the most visible sign yet of the Trump administration's plan to send troops to the Chicago area despite a lawsuit and from Democratic elected leaders. Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker , who has accused President Donald Trump of using troops as "political props" and "pawns," said he didn't get a heads-up from Washington. The Associated Press saw military personnel in uniforms with the Texas National Guard patch at the U.S. Army Reserve Center in Elwood, 55 miles southwest of Chicago. Trucks marked Emergency Disaster Services pulled in and out, dropping off portable toilets and other supplies. Trailers were set up in rows. Extra fencing was spread across the perimeter. The Guard's exact mission was not immediately clear, though the Trump administration has an aggressive immigration enforcement operation in the nation's third-largest city, and protesters have frequently rallied at an immigration building outside Chicago in Broadview. The president repeatedly has described Chicago in hostile terms, calling it a "hell hole" of crime, although police statistics show significant drops in most crimes, including homicides. Trump's bid to deploy the military on U.S. soil over local opposition has . Illinois and Chicago are urging a federal judge to intervene and stop "Trump's long-declared 'War'" on the state. A court hearing on their lawsuit is scheduled for Thursday. In Oregon, a blocked the Guard's deployment to Portland, Oregon. Pritzker had predicted Monday that Illinois National Guard troops would be activated, along with 400 from Texas. Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott posted a picture on social media showing troops boarding a plane and declared, "ever ready." Pritzker said he "literally canceled everything" Saturday in anticipation of a call from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. "They have not picked up the phone and called me. Pritzker had predicted Monday that Illinois National Guard troops would be activated, along with 400 from Texas. Texas Republican Gov. **Greg Abbott** posted a picture on social media showing troops boarding a plane and declared, “ever ready.”

Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker , who has accused President Donald Trump of using troops as “political props” and “pawns,” said he didn’t get a heads-up from Washington. » The Associated Press saw military personnel in uniforms with the Texas National Guard patch at the U.S. Army Reserve Center in Elwood, 55 miles southwest of Chicago. Trucks marked Emergency Disaster Services pulled in and out, dropping off portable toilets and other supplies. Trailers were set up in rows. Extra fencing was spread across the perimeter. The Guard’s exact mission was not immediately clear, though the Trump administration has an aggressive immigration enforcement operation in the nation’s third-largest city, and protesters have frequently rallied at an immigration building outside Chicago in Broadview. The president repeatedly has described Chicago in hostile terms, calling it a “hell hole” of crime, although police statistics show significant drops in most crimes, including homicides. » Trump’s bid to deploy the military on U.S. soil over local opposition has . Illinois and Chicago are urging a federal judge to intervene and stop “Trump’s long-declared ‘War’” on the state. A court hearing on their lawsuit is scheduled for Thursday. In Oregon, a blocked the Guard’s deployment to Portland, Oregon. Pritzker had predicted Monday that Illinois National Guard troops would be activated, along with 400 from Texas. Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott posted a picture on social media showing troops boarding a plane and declared, “ever ready.” Pritzker said he “literally canceled everything” Saturday in anticipation of a call from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. “They have not picked up the phone and called me. Not once,” Pritzker said Tuesday at a gathering of business, cultural and political leaders in Minneapolis. The nearly 150-year-old limits the military’s role in enforcing domestic laws. However, Trump has said he would be willing to invoke the Insurrection Act, which allows a president to dispatch active duty military in states that are unable to put down an insurrection or are defying federal law. The Federal Aviation Administration over the Army Reserve Center for security reasons until Dec. 6. body:
You don't know me, but I'm emailing you today with a humbling final plea for your help.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**These emails aren't working anymore.**
I guess I had too high of hopes, and I was wrong.
I was praying there'd be a bunch of Patriots like you who would have stepped up to help - but it hasn't happened.
Peter, this is Troy Downing. You don't know me, but I'm emailing you today with a humbling final plea for your help.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & proud dad.
**[And I'm also the conservative Republican running for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._8-Pdi5WphQ)**
**My plan is really simple:****_-Tell the truth
_**** _

So, I'm just going to come out & say it: [Will you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[ENLIST TODAY

If I can win this, it'll be an absolutely humiliating defeat for the radical Left.
[What do you say, Peter - will you help a combat vet like me beat the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._FIjHA4Eq9CJQ)[ENLIST TODAY

Thank you & God bless,

name: Pastor Lucas Miles, TPUSA Faith
subject: What mattered most to Charlie
body:
Just a few months ago, Charlie was asked a simple but profound question during a podcast interview:

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjm2eak72bcfn49i7vvdjski342peu1097e98dp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)
---
Friend,Just a few months ago, Charlie was asked a simple but profound question during a podcast interview: _"If everything goes away... how do you want to be remembered?"_ That's not an easy question to answer. **Because the truth is, there are**** _so many_****ways Charlie could have answered.** He could have said he wanted to be remembered as a bold leader who shaped the hearts and minds of an entire generation...And that would have been true. He could have pointed to his work in inspiring young people on campuses from coast to coast to get registered to vote... He could have said: "I want to be remembered as a loving husband." Or as a devoted father. Or as a loyal friend who never turned his back when things got hard. Any of those answers would have been right. **Because Charlie**** _was_****all of those things.** He was a faithful husband to Erika. A proud father who loved his children dearly. A friend who stood by people in adversity. Charlie left behind a _powerful_ legacy in every one of those areas. He built one of the most influential movements of our time. He poured into his team--always giving, always investing, always believing. Charlie was _extraordinarily_ gifted by God. He had a once-in-a-generation mind. He could walk into any room, any interview, any debate--and speak with clarity, conviction, and courage. But none of those things were what _mattered most_ to him. So how _did_ Charlie answer that question? He didn't pause. He didn't hesitate. He didn't preface his response. **He said with clarity:** _" I want to be remembered for courage for my faith. That would be the most important thing."_ _" The most important thing is my faith in my life."_
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrfha7tpv9ldee01qqajpghle9ief979vgsbnc08_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)
---
Friend... Charlie Kirk loved and trusted in Jesus Christ. He knew who his Savior was. He lived with eternity in mind. And that is the legacy he wanted to leave behind. Not just influence. Not just achievement. Not just family. But **faith.** Faith that endures. Faith that stands in the fire. **The impact of Charlie 's courage for his faith is already sweeping across the nation, and even the world.** In city after city, prayer vigils are being held. On campuses and in towns, people are gathering--not just to remember--but to worship.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztjkdmqk6k7h4ga7crtd6i968g0q5vdcnc7mjth8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)
---
Churches are filling again as families return to the pews together. And stories are pouring in of men and women even finding faith for the very first time... because of Charlie's bold witness. This is Charlie's legacy. What's happening right now--hearts turning back to God, lives being forever changed--that's what Charlie wanted most. A faith that is alive.
A faith that multiplies.
A faith that inspires millions to stand with courage. Friend, this is only the beginning. The mission Charlie poured himself into is not finished. The fight for faith and freedom still lives on. And the next generation still needs the truth. Charlie helped raise up the most powerful pro-faith, pro-America youth movement in history. And now it is our turn--yours and ours--to carry that torch forward. To live with that same courage. To keep pointing this generation back to what matters most. For Charlie, Pastor Lucas Miles _Senior Director of TPUSA Faith_
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4ph4e61bslops9ml9aicodibhdhmf55rpp1s33o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)
---
_**P.S.** As the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith, a pastor, and a friend of Charlie's, I know this mission is far bigger than one man -- together, we can carry forward the vision Charlie gave his life for. _
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7avoge505lqricmdem42549m50snqumsh7d9ai8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My Democrat opponent is telling vicious lies about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Sick, sick lies, Friend.

| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9mn3rb5klvmts3apcaaqp60u3tslhoqnqd4gnl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)Friend,
This is sick - Abigail Spanberger, my Democrat opponent, has launched attack ads telling vicious lies about me!
I'm not in the business of lying to voters and supporters, so I'm going to tell you the TRUTH. Here it is:

* Abigail Spanberger has taken over $550K in donations from a George Soros-backed group and a Chinese Communist Party member! She doesn't fight for you, me, or our nation; she's looking out for megarich liberals and literal COMMUNISTS!
* Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn't anything new for her.
* Spanberger took cues from Biden 100% of the time while she was in Congress. If she became Governor, she'd bring the same lies and downturn that we saw under Biden!

I'm a Christian, Marine, and mother. I don't just pay lip service to honesty and service; they're in my nature. I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart: [PLEASE help me and my team fight back against Abigail Spanberger's sick, sick lies by donating $18 or more right now!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvekqg26u7q5690g8ukvv0tp8lg3pmorv7ofa0jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sji61pb5clh2bs)[DONATE $1,000 >>

name: Pastor Lucas Miles, TPUSA Faith
subject: What mattered most to Charlie
body:
Just a few months ago, Charlie was asked a simple but profound question during a podcast interview:

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoioqp7pcjqpejg59bvqi8c68cokaitjagk3vbjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjh64p36c9h2bs)
---
Friend,Just a few months ago, Charlie was asked a simple but profound question during a podcast interview: _"If everything goes away... how do you want to be remembered?"_ That's not an easy question to answer. **Because the truth is, there are**** _so many_****ways Charlie could have answered.** He could have said he wanted to be remembered as a bold leader who shaped the hearts and minds of an entire generation...And that would have been true. He could have pointed to his work in inspiring young people on campuses from coast to coast to get registered to vote... He could have said: "I want to be remembered as a loving husband." Or as a devoted father. Or as a loyal friend who never turned his back when things got hard. Any of those answers would have been right. **Because Charlie**** _was_****all of those things.** He was a faithful husband to Erika. A proud father who loved his children dearly. A friend who stood by people in adversity. Charlie left behind a _powerful_ legacy in every one of those areas. He built one of the most influential movements of our time. He poured into his team--always giving, always investing, always believing. Charlie was _extraordinarily_ gifted by God. He had a once-in-a-generation mind. He could walk into any room, any interview, any debate--and speak with clarity, conviction, and courage. But none of those things were what _mattered most_ to him. So how _did_ Charlie answer that question? He didn't pause. He didn't hesitate. He didn't preface his response. **He said with clarity:** _" I want to be remembered for courage for my faith. That would be the most important thing."_ _" The most important thing is my faith in my life."_
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4jbtifs4eoe2vbrtg58goc2nno2hmkkqqrukh7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjh64p36c9h2bs)
---
Friend... Charlie Kirk loved and trusted in Jesus Christ. He knew who his Savior was. He lived with eternity in mind. And that is the legacy he wanted to leave behind. Not just influence. Not just achievement. Not just family. But **faith.** Faith that endures. Faith that stands in the fire. **The impact of Charlie 's courage for his faith is already sweeping across the nation, and even the world.** In city after city, prayer vigils are being held. On campuses and in towns, people are gathering--not just to remember--but to worship.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfl0k6o7rgu6tf7r93vtn1drgdiqkm7a2jtftkh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjh64p36c9h2bs)
---
Churches are filling again as families return to the pews together. And stories are pouring in of men and women even finding faith for the very first time... because of Charlie's bold witness. This is Charlie's legacy. What's happening right now--hearts turning back to God, lives being forever changed--that's what Charlie wanted most. A faith that is alive.
A faith that multiplies.
A faith that inspires millions to stand with courage. Friend, this is only the beginning. The mission Charlie poured himself into is not finished. The fight for faith and freedom still lives on. And the next generation still needs the truth. Charlie helped raise up the most powerful pro-faith, pro-America youth movement in history. And now it is our turn--yours and ours--to carry that torch forward. To live with that same courage. To keep pointing this generation back to what matters most. For Charlie, Pastor Lucas Miles _Senior Director of TPUSA Faith_
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z60t2nrek2s3aliou9396q9cdgghfs9qm36ngjeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjh64p36c9h2bs)
---
_**P.S.** As the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith, a pastor, and a friend of Charlie's, I know this mission is far bigger than one man -- together, we can carry forward the vision Charlie gave his life for. _
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjj7n9vkchf67ocaaebelf4rsj0eagr6puhrot7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjh64p36c9h2bs)

That's not an easy question to answer. Because the truth is, there are so manyways Charlie could have answered. He could have said he wanted to be remembered as a bold leader who shaped the hearts and minds of an entire generation...And that would have been true. He could have pointed to his work in inspiring young people on campuses from coast to coast to get registered to vote... He could have said: "I want to be remembered as a loving husband." Or as a devoted father. Or as a loyal friend who never turned his back when things got hard. Any of those answers would have been right. Because Charlie wasall of those things. He was a faithful husband to Erika. A proud father who loved his children dearly. A friend who stood by people in adversity. Charlie left behind a powerful legacy in every one of those areas. He built one of the most influential movements of our time. He poured into his team--always giving, always investing, always believing. Charlie was extraordinarily gifted by God. He had a once-in-a-generation mind. He could walk into any room, any interview, any debate--and speak with clarity, conviction, and courage. But none of those things were what mattered most to him. So how did Charlie answer that question? He didn't pause. He didn't hesitate. He didn't preface his response. He said with clarity: " I want to be remembered for courage for my faith. That would be the most important thing." " The most important thing is my faith in my life." Friend... Charlie Kirk loved and trusted in Jesus Christ. He knew who his Savior was. He lived with eternity in mind. And that is the legacy he wanted to leave behind. Not just influence. Not just achievement. Not just family. But faith. Faith that endures. Faith that stands in the fire. The impact of Charlie 's courage for his faith is already sweeping across the nation, and even the world. In city after city, prayer vigils are being held. On campuses and in towns, people are gathering--not just to remember--but to worship. Churches are filling again as families return to the pews together. And stories are pouring in of men and women even finding faith for the very first time... because of Charlie's bold witness. This is Charlie's legacy. What's happening right now--hearts turning back to God, lives being forever changed--that's what Charlie wanted most. A faith that is alive. A faith that multiplies. A faith that inspires millions to stand with courage. Friend, this is only the beginning. The mission Charlie poured himself into is not finished. The fight for faith and freedom still lives on. And the next generation still needs the truth. Charlie helped raise up the most powerful pro-faith, pro-America youth movement in history. And now it is our turn--yours and ours--to carry that torch forward. To live with that same courage. To keep pointing this generation back to what matters most. For Charlie, Pastor Lucas Miles Senior Director of TPUSA Faith P.S. As the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith, a pastor, and a friend of Charlie's, I know this mission is far bigger than one man -- together, we can carry forward the vision Charlie gave his life for. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Wednesday, October 8, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1918, U.S. Cpl. Alvin York was credited with killing 20 German soldiers and [leading the capture of 132 more](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdKC14bCvcJGG7tKmRAavYZMFn2zrEH8fkTTpU85oNDN6H4_x4YhpX97dhraEOO54ZMZSMI2BaVmLR3Zn3ihn2pfJMccyKlC3WkINZvSO-By7ytuAqLCt0Ep9u9-lvhtZrXYK2KGU4LVxZp4dhmCMdpPRrp9vk67IXm0SwEiAXkHTeg-9bIPqfCdVC6ID9FRiaj4j7WXFwGd8YWrmuFVs11KeWbRvQg1CDcdxNAe6hGXF7bp_XjGhhl9Rr5RLTKdQg-MX7fUZ09cfs0rWPw9iptxr0cGyOeKfofIvOi-rvgMAAP__ya57Zw) during the Meuse-Argonne offensive in WWI. He was promoted to sergeant and awarded the Congressional Medal of Honor. Today, we’re featuring the story of the newly [confirmed EF5 tornado](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOp_WNuancJHmukubEhl2DU4WfDKrO_H2EXmFlKORRvN9X4_xERKnffkMG3mJedzpfTCJUBkjp2UVJA7nsaXjSPsyBeYsowHjlAYF_Ygh8Tk2NfpIZMjW5HXnhkF3Q6_r1TuHE5pohilomDtr5hYsRdv2GubQ9XXy15oG6DVAa-BmEaHVNpoGG20sVA0QJsnl9p3TLitFPvOLym3OW81-FXkelf2ozL0y9_C8AK7qCkXSzFSZu-SyB8yKolNIAflUh-SyqT0XWRWGnyxBuaHrdAwY22HS5BxYNHaae7STizTpunh8vhNzOtquamDZQuK_G_Ivdy9vfgMAAP__RB6CDw) in North Dakota, the first to reach that strength in over a decade. ## Flight Delays Spread Across U.S.
Flight [delays continued Tuesday across major](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb8GOiN7DAYKF2noNm1K5MUDTGTslT27iL-PyHt_8LojjXQ05_55zA9HgeL22x1oeU1zxLMEZMY8r4G2nT0Gd5WDSqG4PV0IiWeQ0AklhRxm7yhcc1t7uyIC6hqt6rtxVP04qHq3_fpcFC7ejB2gWftWL4MejBuN7JTyY032tikpByWlAdlo76VReoXWtwq0rFqJnjjl5m-iyDuu4UofzM2SjjrYnflVKv2rgqmC6TzPJj6Xu-K-VzDdWMH0LuKbHOVXyiy-wsROLAouKXrh3SW2Wx0PjCzK_mafzijyEh1oowDqbP3rpBComL5q5XY4Cv8f4R-t97HwLwAA__9XooUc) U.S. airports, including Boston, Nashville, and Houston, as the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) grappled with staffing shortages caused by the government shutdown. Transportation Secretary Sean [Duffy warned that increased sick calls](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOww8cdSCYhu72XZLg_JQdhEm8GaMf79x5xO2u8lNTu65X_fpbnzwcf00O2pyaYp4lIBEmCcX_LqRxWDOsvtSfFxnE0KiCQS0XAou-skaH85JVVY7RMCmQi27dhhkN_Sy2jQ2PZqhBWVt0y4tdGqeFxBDB9KqoRsqry-aFKKXQtxA1I214iYbB8oqCY1gSqD1lHL9nXykDV040wtzvaS9CnojehTWfDAYGYzHcdTLXC6Lq2cwXpHB-JbhbxtufOaUjXN-4UuKlFMImAtfL3DcMRIv25NsOiIvaCK3T-dOPj_zbOIPg7HK2j4OH4Ivt44pse7Gh79F9K8bXxp-AwAA__-L7omX) may soon force the FAA to slow traffic further.
## White House Casts Doubt on Back Pay
Furloughed federal employees may [not be guaranteed back pay](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdF7Zw8-yBcUmEd1NihQpkRePYXKNjexhLd4-Iq9wu0_6pCOd8-dj-jDkKSw_zYYDuzgFLNkjM6bJeVpWtujNmTfKmcLyMt5HnkBBK7WSqp-sIX9OTWUHhwhYVzjoe_t46Puj19U69HUL-tG8-h7RWui6tn3dLXQIrkXldEXDRdNK9VqpDtSttlZ1unbQ2EZDrUSj0BLHdPsbKfCKzp_xjek2x63yw8q8Z1E_BYwCxlLKbcvh-gSMGOSRBYyXlIBxj56Y5mvmOcZdlpUY5RqPjHLDLcpszizdkXw8lhWtdGgxGS9LTJ-YsjQJA0sMTOzRSo7yZebP3ZwCRpPk86l_qfi9iHqMM1lR__h2tcWSf2PaqzTYvZD3lLu7aNSyGfL_LfhL6d8D_AsAAP__hc6a0Q) for missed work during the current government shutdown, according to a White House memo. The memo [challenges long-standing interpretations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwRsRfzbOwNDFW7p2tEi4NrcFE8F1rLx95b5C5yN9R-d83eabx4Tb-ukzOFrKvMHREhBBnZeEa6QAyb9bxtZwW-8-pUKzEqrnUnAxzsFjes-mC24BUKA7cNL216u011F20VlvgrWjsIv3Uj_0YKzR-m7HXthRi9ChOzUpxCiFGJS46BDEIPWiTDBSacGMgIBU6uW74EYRlvQuL6iXR8ldcpHo2Zj-YGpiaqIIEVM6M6amWDKcg5iafMi4YaPqCcvG1NT3Rplh4C3uFMqx8SMiAY9lb8Az5MKXvaayrxECP0r9gXo6XXXheWBK2AbLjFizx7-6jv7138up3wAAAP__hB-FHA) of a 2019 law passed after the last major shutdown, arguing it only covers that specific lapse in funding. As many as 750,000 workers are currently furloughed, and unless Congress approves new appropriations, they could be left waiting or unpaid entirely. The Senate failed to pass competing funding bills Monday, with no House votes scheduled [until Oct. 14](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhTAQhE8DnZFtzF_hIg3dS5sSGbyGTRYb4c0j7_YRuUK6kUb6NPN9PKaHQ8K4vrsdLIc0RbgyATOcUyBcN_ZA7pV3zBnjOjuixJOWuhFKCtlP3iG9JlN6GwA01CVY1TXDoLqhV-VmYe7AedPOfa2HZoBgWtWoJvjQeNODLtHeNCVlr6Rstaxq72Wr6qCNN0rXsjASPHI6q8-EkTcI9EpPOKsl7SXZjfnIRf1W6LHQ43VdVZyX-8XdF3o8EiHjkgs9LimuJ-Q7rjch7hBZ5O2bfbqigJ8DFgYv_OlWQeAyiwvgS5xLdLpujOzK0_rjQiLMbVcYue4O6W8I_8ve0-rfAAAA___5f4XE).
## New Orbital Military Plan Unveiled
A new private [space cargo vehicle called Arc](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u5CAQBODT2FmPMP4PCDaZ7G26odUPGtMrDCPoteXbr2au8OKvVCrVn6_tCzly2n_jQUZ83hJdNZIIlc1H3oM4injXg2vltH9jjFk2rfQInQK1bA453tvQOuOJNPUtmW4e17Wb16VrgxkmNwzWz_24-HFVakK7osbV-XHRappbNu-2TqmlU2rS6tE7p6au93pwQ6d71QyKHEsuj7-ZkwTy8c4nlYfNRxtNEHnVpv_V6Gejn9d1PeoLLb210U8hG1KOeb8b_Ux0wavwiUKAxcInaAt6AeSjgmRwFPmkAhbLnsGXfEAu3yxvw3RfgQpBTkBYJAAniFQrSMAEmCDkfwVOdpTbYtzr4hi5TnMzqP1Ajp_F8qObT6P_BwAA__9dC5Uc) was unveiled last week by California-based company Inversion, which designed it to revolutionize global logistics for the U.S. military and its allies. The company plans to deploy the reusable vehicles into low Earth orbit, where they'll act as orbital storehouses holding critical supplies, particularly for the military. [See a promo video here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAQBNDTQOaR3WaYIXCwCdnfdENkcBt61djI7gVx-9X8K_y8VKp6f76mL09Maf3td3QS85TwqowiWKbItG4SkP1dd6qV0jp75iwTaHgqo5V-T8ET31PXBhcRAW2Lzryew2Bew9u0m4vmOQx2mZ9ziDZ68H0HQ7Az9Ba7N8wtuU-b0fpttO5BP2wIujc2Qhc6A1Y3ncZAksvjb6YkG0a-84nlseS9ZbeJHLWxvxoYGxiv63oErLSmOef9E2lgFFy2lDmvdwMjpRNLpZxUwPmfVOXLoiKVKqoefkEVkOnEcqsTN1oYlRSf6pGLVLV7wUKeq0JfZPs26NXnQANjW1w4LmKm2r-aTq-7J_5eKT-iPR38DwAA___T1o_w). When a delivery is needed, the vehicle could immediately leave orbit and deliver cargo to any location on the planet [in less than an hour](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uwzAMRk9jbw4o-n_Q0CVbunY0lIiyWdBSIBEOfPsiuULn78N7wPu5LTfHwnH9djtZDWmJ9CpCqpSXILxu6kncWXYuheN6dyJJFwTsGwMNTIt3LOfS1d4GIqS2JmvGfp7NOE-m3iyO0-gGRLpjCOgQTB_w7vqBWpjmwdRs3zQDMBmAAeHSeg-DaQN2vjPYQtUBedaUL7-Jo24U5EwH5csj7bXYTfVZqvarwmuFV45KmYpyXCmuHIkyx_V9_YwxHU45xQqvr5TFlyZwLtqUp3tQ40n4oHw2B238EKqz9c8Xi3AZxqqDdXcsH63-q9Vh8S8AAP__uFOAEw), far faster than traditional air transport. The company plans to create a network of thousands of Arc vehicles, with the first orbital mission currently scheduled for 2026.

Transportation Secretary Sean may soon force the FAA to slow traffic further. White House Casts Doubt on Back Pay Furloughed federal employees may for missed work during the current government shutdown, according to a White House memo. The memo of a 2019 law passed after the last major shutdown, arguing it only covers that specific lapse in funding. As many as 750,000 workers are currently furloughed, and unless Congress approves new appropriations, they could be left waiting or unpaid entirely. The Senate failed to pass competing funding bills Monday, with no House votes scheduled . New Orbital Military Plan Unveiled A new private was unveiled last week by California-based company Inversion, which designed it to revolutionize global logistics for the U.S. military and its allies. The company plans to deploy the reusable vehicles into low Earth orbit, where they'll act as orbital storehouses holding critical supplies, particularly for the military. . When a delivery is needed, the vehicle could immediately leave orbit and deliver cargo to any location on the planet , far faster than traditional air transport. The company plans to create a network of thousands of Arc vehicles, with the first orbital mission currently scheduled for 2026. | Peter,
Defend Our Courts has been sounding the alarm for months about the outsized implications of losing this November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention race.
The consequences of failure here are nothing short of handing MAGA the keys to the nation's most important swing state ahead of next year's midterm election and, ultimately, the 2028 presidential election.
Donald Trump has strategically unleashed wave after wave of fascist brutality -- illegally occupying our cities and endorsing reprehensible acts of thuggery, violence, and intimidation aimed at American citizens.
He even suggested invoking a law from 1807 called the "Insurrection Act" to provide a shaky legal basis for suspending civil liberties and deploying the U.S. military on American soil against the American people.

| Friend,
Defend Our Courts has been sounding the alarm for months about the outsized implications of losing this November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention race.
The consequences of failure here are nothing short of handing MAGA the keys to the nation's most important swing state ahead of next year's midterm election and, ultimately, the 2028 presidential election.
Donald Trump has strategically unleashed wave after wave of fascist brutality -- illegally occupying our cities and endorsing reprehensible acts of thuggery, violence, and intimidation aimed at American citizens.
He even suggested invoking a law from 1807 called the "Insurrection Act" to provide a shaky legal basis for suspending civil liberties and deploying the U.S. military on American soil against the American people.

Make no mistake: if we lose here in November, the stage will be set for MAGA's darkest authoritarian ambitions to come true. The last guardrails keeping Trump in check will be totally removed.

He even suggested invoking a law from 1807 called the "Insurrection Act" to provide a shaky legal basis for suspending civil liberties and deploying the U.S. military on American soil against the American people. | | == | Trump has been systematically priming the public to accept a broader crackdown in the name of "national security." But while Congress has quietly enabled this, courageous judges all around the country have stood up for the Constitution and struck down some of Trump's most outrageous actions. That's why MAGA has set their sights on the upcoming November PA supreme court race. In a single election, they can knock out 3 Democratic justices all at once, clearing the way for Trump and his cronies to do whatever they want, completely unchecked. Make no mistake: if we lose here in November, the stage will be set for MAGA's darkest authoritarian ambitions to come true. The last guardrails keeping Trump in check will be totally removed. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for standing with the courageous judges putting their lives and safety on the line for our freedoms right now. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1926, the Witte Memorial Museum opened in San Antonio. Today, the [Witte Museum](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnwVusg1wMDAxdvKVrRwuXs42KIYJLnLx9lb5C91_f8H9dp6uPKeb10-_k-LmUKdPREjFTnW41tpLXu6-h-VqpMYXVpwdNCtTlJOEEZgo-pteEXXAzBCs7clJfrFVSWeg2N2ukBQHP2qBBCgaNtrjMMKDUQ6AuujcmAYyUIJXu0WuwBjVZGggtCgQKkUvteSOmp29LepUH1f677F1yG_OtifOHUKNQ43EcPbfNl5xipr7UVahx8znMpfwINVLmGqm9y8hMp_3e6L531YXbEVOKbdACYd19TH8-_-_Kw6nfAAAA__8IfHd1) houses over [320,000 artifacts](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuwyAUANDT4C0W_BADA0MXb-naEVH_bwcJmwh-QnL7qr1CL_CG93UN15hyOrbPuJPn11rCQb1lYqYa7jW1cmyPWLHFWqkx4RbzkwJIuJyUPEkbMKb8DnpA_y3RqYG8MhfnQIGTw82v2qrlEi3gahE0TitaA0BxmvA82fOQ_C-mpLRKSQVm1NFIZ7UhRxNpp4WWhIlLHflGTK_Y1vwuT6rjUvYh-xvzvYnzh4BZwNx7H3tipv3R6LGPpW4C5qXkTAuncjQB81A93nvKObXJCC23Pab8p_H_Dp4efgIAAP__Vd5xXA) that showcase the history and culture of Texas. Permanent exhibits include the Naylor Family Dinosaur Gallery. The NFL fined Cowboys owner Jerry Jones for making a crude gesture during the team's game this past weekend. Get the details on [today's _Flyover Podcast_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz01u6yAQAODT4F2sGSAGFiye9ORFpWRbdWURM7aRSLBg8nf7qr1CL_BJ3-dpOoWU0209hyt5fi1lutGzZWKmOu01tXJb76HGFmqlxhTXkB80SZDHA8IB7BRDyu9Jd9FfIDrsyKM5OidROug2vwxKKXDxQnaQ2s5GGrQ2KmPmGQ0uXfI_GAJYREBpeh0MOKsNORpIOy00UExcas8bMb1CW_K7PKj2c7l22W_MexPqn5CjkOO73PneX0jIcd_V-rHl03n-Empkof4rg131cX-mnFMbjNCwXkPKvxL_7f_w8jsAAP__LdNtMQ). [Click here to subscribe](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu9CAUhJ8GurU4GF8oKH5p5W7_JopSItYc2yTYrODs7e2jVVK4Tzmj75tiPk725EIM2_zfrWjoMSW74b1EJMJsLzmUtM1Xl31xOWMh9LOLN7RSyOYA4iB6612IT6u4N2fhNXA00DVaS5Ba8MUoJfUZRtFM4LwEjaNu3RlqUCO2E_Q8mNcYCNEDCJBdpVwndK861Nii0oopgT5QyhUtSPhwZYrPdMNcjWnl0SxEl8Lqf0wOTA5rrD5T2GjBHcXk8JtehJvDGMP2xeoBVxciq4_-cg8xhtJ2TDZKzK_6R2wLOUI7Jo-sPr6_MdleaWX1UQmezc7bWZz-duXNyO8AAAD__wGBiD0) and stay up to date with the latest national headlines--without the bias of legacy media outlets. If you've ever dreamed of owning a piece of a fast-growing craft brewery, today's sponsor, Colorado's award-winning [Westbound & Down Brewing Company](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGunSAQQL8Gd5oBUWTBosnL3b1uuyRzZZ6SIBhAfffvG2-b_kC3c05mJufXp_1EH3xcfuJGpn5_JRvpKoFqpWz37EuKy4HZFcyZSiW3YDjJChBDy6GFyTr04WVl48wTnOYNGa4GrQUXGprV4KiHEUZQjmiWktTA4ak1upn0JAQ13tzLOMDEOXChOokK9CQVaRpJaskkkPM15a6uVOkby1d4pZNyN6etCWatdS-s_8HEg4mHjyeV2l1U6jMd0WF0Ll3xdm-hfxx1syUdeSbWf9CGPjAx3sONnD821n_s6F27Y66Rcln9_pfPuO3ol_g2_kE-QStB2T8xjugr2n7ivRBS61E32bj98iH4MiomYbkPvh-v_5f7NOJ3AAAA___AGJVQ), is giving beer lovers the chance to invest in their incredible rise.
