name: Mark Kelly
subject: He can’t win the argument
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When you put the facts in front of any person interested in debating in good faith, it’s clear Donald Trump can’t win this argument.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.
Somebody was watching me while I was on Fox News this Sunday.
(And, before you look, let me just say that I don’t expect you to read this whole tweet. Thank you for your attention to this matter.)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251008-1-700k&t=1&akid=6210%2E6688874%2Etm5Xqx)
So, yeah, that’s... something.
Now, here’s the reason he’s so mad, and why he doesn’t want to see me on Fox News: **We’re winning the argument.**
Democrats in Congress are at work, and we want to figure this out. We’re not going to let millions of people lose their health care because they can’t afford it.
When you put the facts in front of any person interested in debating in good faith, it’s clear Donald Trump can’t win this argument.
We can stop this any day, but I’m going to keep fighting for the 24 million Americans we made a commitment to.
So, whenever Trump wants to sit down and work this out, I’m available.
Thanks, folks.
Mark
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251008-1-700k&t=2&akid=6210%2E6688874%2Etm5Xqx)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6210%2E6688874%2Etm5Xqx).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Secretary Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Americans Are Losing Trust In Our Leaders. Here’s How To Rebuild It.
body:
Faith in government, media, and business has collapsed. Rebuilding trust starts with developing character.

* * *
# [Americans Are Losing Trust In Our Leaders. Here's How To Rebuild It.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175616256&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1NjE2MjU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk5MjkzNjEsImV4cCI6MTc2MjUyMTM2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mUnGWs1EtoHmrCjaxQVaC6-bWk1LOlNoskt6BU0OKLw)
### Faith in government, media, and business has collapsed. Rebuilding trust starts with developing character.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Oct 8| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175616256&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1NjE2MjU2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTkyOTM2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzYyNTIxMzYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.52AGVFjeDVgkw-0CUNkbzB_ovyRemU9Zdq6gSFuS1R4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=175616256&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1NjE2MjU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk5MjkzNjEsImV4cCI6MTc2MjUyMTM2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mUnGWs1EtoHmrCjaxQVaC6-bWk1LOlNoskt6BU0OKLw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/americans-are-losing-trust-in-our?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b1b7fe67-1875-4af3-af8c-ef874e3da22f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
America's biggest crisis right now isn't just economic or political, it's a _crisis of trust._
When the government shuts down -- as it has[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/30f1258a-0ce8-465b-9842-ddd7410a0d10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ten times](https://substack.com/redirect/30f1258a-0ce8-465b-9842-ddd7410a0d10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ in the last fifty years](https://substack.com/redirect/30f1258a-0ce8-465b-9842-ddd7410a0d10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including _four_ under Trump -- it doesn't just freeze budgets. It freezes faith. Faith in the idea that this country still works. It's a failure of trust.
Here's an eye-opening perspective from [Bruce Mehlman's latest Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/2c84574a-8a14-4f3b-95cf-ed0d98d1820c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> **Americans don 't believe our leaders can solve problems**. We are presently in our 6th government shutdown of the past 30 years. During this period federal debt doubled from 66% of GDP (in 1995) to 125% today ([Treasury](https://substack.com/redirect/2c102e78-a12b-4206-adf7-496792fbb41e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), with **[interest payments now exceeding defense spending](https://substack.com/redirect/03c52b1b-b36a-484f-ae06-8bd2a1d21d62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and both Social Security & Medicare trust funds [hurtling towards insolvency](https://substack.com/redirect/70571ee7-75a9-46d5-ace8-0e7eb03bbb7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Voters fault leaders in both parties, with **[Democratic voters even net disapproving of](https://substack.com/redirect/f7b911e2-ec9c-4ae0-b4b4-25b2a77c6325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[their own](https://substack.com/redirect/f7b911e2-ec9c-4ae0-b4b4-25b2a77c6325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[party's leadership.](https://substack.com/redirect/f7b911e2-ec9c-4ae0-b4b4-25b2a77c6325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Young Americans have lost faith that our institutions, our leaders, and even our economy work for them. Rebuilding that trust starts not with new slogans or partisan fights, but with a return to character, purpose, and service -- the personal virtues that build social trust from the ground up.
If we want to rebuild faith in government, we must start by rebuilding faith in each other through gratitude, service, and the stoic pursuit of becoming better every day.
According to the _[Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/eacb8213-9981-4486-bf85-0b2976d6ac36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , "Nearly 70% of people said they believe the American dream--that if you work hard, you will get ahead--no longer holds true or never did, the highest level in nearly 15 years of surveys."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7093751-002c-4020-bd26-dcdf4a18aa7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ybr85_sPy_Xza-WWEGm9K55K8DB-6VFmggdyOpmV3Is?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=175616256)
# Young Americans Are Stuck
The stakes have never felt higher. For too many young Americans, the system isn't working.
Families are getting crushed by higher prices on everything from groceries to electricity.
Young people can't afford the things past generations could. They're still paying off their college loans (like me). Many are back living at home. And while political leaders talk past each other, our national debt has blown past **[$37 trillion](https://substack.com/redirect/d6826f1b-412c-4f79-b31d-641e3c11594b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --up $2.09 trillion from last year and $10.7 trillion higher than five years ago; $8 trillion came from Trump's first term. That breaks down to over **$110,000 per person,** and it's growing by roughly **$5.7 billion a day** -- **$66,000 every second,** according to the [Joint Economic Committee's September 2025 debt update.](https://substack.com/redirect/1e3b4381-34e0-429e-9f9d-91e12140527f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For decades, both parties have promised the American Dream while far too often delivering an American debt nightmare the younger generation will have to pay off.
You don't build trust by blaming the other side. Yet in Washington, that's all we see. We have a president presiding over his **fourth government shutdown** and a Democratic leadership that hasn't clearly communicated that it's asking for **$30 billion for healthcare subsidies in a $5.7 trillion continuing resolution**. Both sides are locked in the blame game and talking past each other while millions of Americans -- including our military families -- are left hanging without their earned paycheck.
In Pennsylvania, a [new survey](https://substack.com/redirect/7c73661d-2945-4f0d-b3ce-dbb2d190ba6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of over 2,800 Gen Z students found that **only about 2.1% believe elected officials make decisions in young people 's best interest**. Around 76% say they don't trust those same leaders.
Nationally, [Gallup's research](https://substack.com/redirect/6014a6a9-5df8-4faf-84cb-12b76b1d4e1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shows that **fewer than one in six Gen Z Americans** say they have "a great deal" or "quite a lot" of trust in Congress, the presidency, and the news.
These are staggering numbers, and they're not the product of bad messaging. They're the product of bad leadership.
The average 30-year-old is less financially secure than their parents were at the same age.
A _Science_ -cited study (highlighted by [the U.S. Treasury](https://substack.com/redirect/5d5fd291-5987-4df7-855a-6c79d01b6610?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) shows that 90% of children born in the 1940s earned more than their parents did at age 30, but only about 50% of those born in the mid-1980s do so today.
For most Americans, the home is still the biggest wealth engine they'll ever own. In 1970, the average house cost about **2 × the median salary**. **Today, it 's 5x** according to _[Harvard's Joint Center for Housing Studies.](https://substack.com/redirect/8e27eac3-e6e2-4f3b-9860-1aec676062f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
This widening gap -- fueled by stagnant wages, limited supply, and soaring demand -- has locked millions out of what used to be the cornerstone of middle-class security. It's one reason why [57% of 18-24-year-olds live at home.](https://substack.com/redirect/fbfa4a5e-e5c1-472c-b33a-c24f0756cc3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That's why I always tell my brother and sister veterans: take advantage of the **[VA Home Loan program](https://substack.com/redirect/a2cf010a-4572-4580-9623-a148694843d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** It's one of the few remaining on-ramps to building generational wealth -- no down payment required, no additional private mortgage insurance fees, and competitive interest rates backed by the Department of Veterans Affairs.
If my writing resonates with you, please consider becoming a free or paid subscriber...
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ybr85_sPy_Xza-WWEGm9K55K8DB-6VFmggdyOpmV3Is?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175616256)

In Pennsylvania, a of over 2,800 Gen Z students found that only about 2.1% believe elected officials make decisions in young people 's best interest. Around 76% say they don't trust those same leaders. Nationally, shows that fewer than one in six Gen Z Americans say they have "a great deal" or "quite a lot" of trust in Congress, the presidency, and the news. These are staggering numbers, and they're not the product of bad messaging. They're the product of bad leadership. The average 30-year-old is less financially secure than their parents were at the same age. A Science -cited study (highlighted by ) shows that 90% of children born in the 1940s earned more than their parents did at age 30, but only about 50% of those born in the mid-1980s do so today. For most Americans, the home is still the biggest wealth engine they'll ever own. In 1970, the average house cost about 2 × the median salary. Today, it 's 5x according to This widening gap -- fueled by stagnant wages, limited supply, and soaring demand -- has locked millions out of what used to be the cornerstone of middle-class security. It's one reason why That's why I always tell my brother and sister veterans: take advantage of the .** It's one of the few remaining on-ramps to building generational wealth -- no down payment required, no additional private mortgage insurance fees, and competitive interest rates backed by the Department of Veterans Affairs. If my writing resonates with you, please consider becoming a free or paid subscriber... Subscribe to The Secretary's SitRep to unlock the rest. Become a paying subscriber of The Secretary's SitRep to get access to this post and other subscriber-only content. A subscription gets you: | Subscriber-only posts and full archive ---|--- | Post comments and join the community | Annual paid subscribers will also receive a signed copy of my 2008 memoir, Taking the Hill: From Philly to Baghdad to the United States Congress. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Patrick J. Murphy ? ?

name: Time Sensitive Letter (via VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor’s STARK Warning >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our jaws are on the floor...
| _Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94502?t=6&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U) **If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94502?t=7&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94502?t=8&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94502?t=9&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94502?t=10&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94502?t=11&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21409%2E878179%2EcxKc9U)
---

**Do you have a minute?**

Read this: We need an immediate surge of grassroots support split with the Ohio Democrats.

Here's why it's critical ... 👇

The past few months have been a whirlwind, to say the least.

**But through it all, one thing has been clear: the strength of this grassroots team.**

Thousands of folks have stepped up to say enough is enough. You’ve spoken out, chipped in, and stood with me as I’ve worked to hold the line on truth, accountability, and national security.

When we defeat Trump’s Republicans in Virginia and defy the odds by taking back the Senate for Democrats next year – it will be because of committed grassroots supporters like you.

I can’t tell you how much that means to me – especially during moments like this.

So today, I just want to say thank you. Truly.

And if you’re able, I hope you’ll consider making your first $5 donation to my reelection campaign. Here’s a link to donate, if you can:

The fight continues,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Mark Warner is leading the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable – but that could make his race a top Republican target next year.

We need to be prepared for his toughest and most expensive reelection campaign yet.

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building? name: Gavin Newsom
subject: This is it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
If stopping Trump from rigging the next election is important to you

**I'm writing with a question:**
Do you think there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to make a contribution today to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California?
Let me try:
What if I told you that as you read this, voting is underway in California and that Election Day is in just a few weeks? Yes, this is all happening fast.
And what if I told you that Republicans are spending huge to beat us, hammering us with ads on television and the internet because they know if they win here, Democrats have zero chance of taking back the House?
How about if I told you that our final fundraising deadline of the campaign is coming up fast, and when it ends we're going to make some final budget decisions that can determine whether we win or lose?
This is it folks. All hands on deck. Right here, right now. If stopping Trump from rigging the next election is important to you, here's the ask:
[**Can you please make a contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California? Our average online donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. The amount matters less than the number of people donating today. It will all add up fast.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251008-1&refcode2=2652_4767699_z5gZr0&akid=2652%2E4767699%2Ez5gZr0)

U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi **[snapped at Democrat Sen. Amy Klobuchar](https://substack.com/redirect/b734f7f3-2320-4946-b7d7-b82898de2537?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during intense questioning, pointing the finger at her and the Democrats for snubbing federal law enforcement agents now working without a paycheck because her party voted to shut down the government.
**[Watch Klobuchar's pathetic response: ](https://substack.com/redirect/b734f7f3-2320-4946-b7d7-b82898de2537?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b734f7f3-2320-4946-b7d7-b82898de2537?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b734f7f3-2320-4946-b7d7-b82898de2537?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/a7a25de1-6cd2-48f5-b34b-275c62dc6a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **How To Survive in A World That Trades Without Us**
### **What good is a 401(k) in a world that no longer accepts USD? Exit now!**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a7a25de1-6cd2-48f5-b34b-275c62dc6a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Most Americans aren't aware of the worldwide impact BRICS has made. But soon they will feel it, directly in their retirement accounts.
Led by the alliance of Vladimir Putin & Xi Jinping, BRICS is over 4.4B members strong and they are building a new global monetary system without us.
One with resource control, strength in numbers, and zero need for the U.S. dollar in its ecosystem for global trade.
**[That's why central banks are loading up on gold](https://substack.com/redirect/a7a25de1-6cd2-48f5-b34b-275c62dc6a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while cutting their ties to US Treasury bonds.**
If your retirement depends on the value in your dollar backed 401(k)s, IRAs, TSPs, and pensions, you're choosing to go down with the ship.
That's why thousands of Americans are following the path laid out by central banks, transferring their retirement savings accounts into self directed Gold IRAs.
This way ensures your wealth is protected by physical gold that you own, not paper promises, or numbers on a screen.
**[Click here to download a FREE copy of our 2025 Wealth Protection Guide.](https://substack.com/redirect/a7a25de1-6cd2-48f5-b34b-275c62dc6a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/a7a25de1-6cd2-48f5-b34b-275c62dc6a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **It Begins: Texas National Guard deployed to Illinois**
The Pentagon **[confirmed 200 Texas National Guard troops arrived in Illinois](https://substack.com/redirect/c050c1c8-be7a-4667-a346-c537e095d377?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Tuesday for an initial 60-day period to "protect federal functions, personnel, and property" amid anti-immigration protests, with deployments following incidents where federal agents were rammed and boxed in by vehicles near an ICE facility in Broadview.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9559b890-f9eb-472a-bf99-3ba066a48509?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Local officials oppose deployment** : Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker filed a lawsuit to block the action, while Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson called the deployment "illegal, unconstitutional, dangerous and wrong" and signed an executive order creating "ICE-free zones" prohibiting federal immigration agents from using city-owned property for enforcement operations.
* **Activist resistance planned** : The Coalition Against the Trump Agenda organized an emergency protest for Wednesday, with spokesperson Hatem Abudayyeh stating Chicago communities are "organizing, resisting, and mobilizing in massive numbers" with rapid response teams and Know Your Rights presentations to defend immigrant neighbors from ICE enforcement.

* * *
# Elise Stefanik closing the gap on Hochul in already tight New York governor's race
An internal poll shows NY Gov. Kathy Hochul **[leads potential 2026 GOP challenger Rep. Elise Stefanik by only 5 points](https://substack.com/redirect/0fc89f5c-3fdf-495c-8102-7622a8ee030c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (48%-43%), but falls behind 46.4%-45.9% when voters hear about Hochul's endorsement of socialist NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani and other issues.
* **Deep unpopularity metrics** : Hochul's job approval is underwater at 56% disapproval to 39% approval, with only 34% of likely voters ready to re-elect her while 59% say "it's time for someone new," and she can only secure 43% support in a hypothetical Democratic primary against Lt. Gov. Antonio Delgado.
* **Mamdani endorsement damaging** : If Mamdani wins NYC mayor, up to 47% of independent voters said they'd be less likely to vote for Hochul or other Democrats in the midterms, with pollster Landon Wall noting her "endorsement of politically toxic Zohran Mamdani collapses support among Independents."
* **Stefanik positioning for challenge** : The House Republican Leadership chairwoman, who will formally enter the race after November 2025 midterms with a clear GOP nomination path, blasted Hochul for "destroying New York State" with high taxes, affordability crisis, failed bail reform, and "sanctuary state policies," with advisers noting the "devastating" poll comes before Stefanik has even officially announced.

* * *
# Tom Cotton proposes bill to punish transgender criminals the same as any other criminal
Senator Tom Cotton proposed legislation to bar federal judges **[from using gender identity as a reason to reduce criminal sentences](https://substack.com/redirect/09a3455b-8820-470b-8045-272f87f1062c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , stating "Criminals are criminals" and judges shouldn't use "gender confusion" to assign shorter sentences.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09a3455b-8820-470b-8045-272f87f1062c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Kavanaugh assassination plot case prompted bill** : The legislation follows a Biden-appointed judge sentencing Nicholas Roske to only 8 years in prison for plotting to kill Justice Brett Kavanaugh--22 years below the 30-year federal minimum--with much of the 7-hour sentencing hearing focused on how Roske's transgender identity warranted leniency.
* **Companion prison housing bill** : Cotton also introduced the "Preventing Violence Against Female Inmates Act" to mandate biological sex-based prison housing and block federal grants to states that place men in women's prisons, codifying Trump's executive order while citing safety concerns about placing male prisoners, including those identifying as women, with female inmates.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qi1mdghlyg47hjev7wi57ut4kv8avj0xpyk9qmk0cprkjbm27msjl3rktaipy5pzivbgfa7ek1fuhprr3f5p9m&__stmp=t3tfy9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wti77vm049ou3oz2dn71tpevrwionuyimcwlmv4p1tcn8m6twg4evwpu3ar0h3x8c29ofqpx1d0erxen9qg4dvmwfwwtdonu57pren2smjxmp4ye3kw69srpr01mdv31tobvx97&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qi1mdghlyg47hjev7wi57ut4kv8avj0xpyk9qmk0cprkjbm27msjl3rktaipy5pzivbgfa7ek1fuhprr3f5p9m&__stmp=t3tfy9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=rd06mgksptgug2imng5udqd9e54ud6sb2jcbspl5k4aegnoew7trk987yz05tw5qgxu4bwzrfg2zddaujy528106we1jzxujbyuwugnn25xyld80kymhypcpx0jbl93lff1vlwq9v5oo9rg0w19l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=edb8jn9ebfracp4n5k1tyasf830xy2tllnrpuzqtbv3c17bcktrsqlhyd3lyjh95mftpgv4vkxm7iczp6m81ctgolz7ooiikut03xn5wwp8oz1p3uawmw0skpllmlgfeya3tu0pbf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tfy9&__onlt=h)

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Why the market feels scary when it's flying high
body:
| Hi Peter, When the market hits a new high, a funny thing happens. Instead of celebrating, many investors might freeze. They worry that it's too late. That a crash is coming. That they should wait it out. But here's the thing: our brains are wired to feel anxious at the top. And understanding _why_ that happens can help you make more informed decisions (without as much stress), especially when things look good on the surface.
---
|
---
I put together a short article to explain what's going on inside our heads during market highs, and what history has shown about investing at the peak: [Read the full breakdown here](https://financeinsights.net/mM6mhEz4Ofr4QXMCPaDYqupEbrk?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IkpWZXFTNlFEd2Z6ZVBHRCIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. Let me know what stands out. Or what doesn't sit right. I'd love to hear your take.
---

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96387?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD)
Peter —
I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success.
**I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.** This country gave my family so much, and it’s always been obvious to me that I wanted to dedicate my life to public service.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an Outreach and Reentry Coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
**Peter, it’s why I first decided to run for office.**
In 2017, I watched Donald Trump attack every value that I had spent my life fighting for. And as I thought about it, I realized I couldn’t ask someone to do my fighting for me – that if I wanted to defend the country I love then I had to run toward the crisis.
It was a long shot to run as a nobody in a district that had been held by an entrenched Republican for more than two decades.
**But I knew what was at stake and I knew what I had to do.**
I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Congress — work that earned me the distinction of being named the most effective member of the New Jersey House delegation in just my second term.
**But I know I can do more as your governor. And that’s why I decided to run.**
By winning this seat, we reduce mortgage and rental costs, crack down on shady middlemen making prescription medications more expensive, and bring down utility costs by bringing more clean, cheap power like solar onto the grid.
But the truth is that this is already the most expensive New Jersey gubernatorial race on record. And my opponent is benefiting not only from Donald Trump's personal endorsement — but from the support of Trump's entire network of deep-pocketed, right-wing allies. So I am asking:
**[Will you consider splitting $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help power us to victory?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96387?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Mikie Sherrill and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96388?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96388?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96388?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96388?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96388?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96388?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96387?refcode=em20251008-9538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9538%2E614464%2E4GVhbD)
---
Thank you,
Mikie

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Pam Bondi told me she would fire me if she could
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The Department of Justice should be pursuing accountability, cracking down on corruption, and defending the Constitution. But under this administration, the DOJ is a tool for attacking enemies and covering up wrongdoing.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9054%2E5257348%2EilbFD3)
Derek —
Attorney General Pam Bondi appeared yesterday at her first oversight hearing after nine months of her stewardship of the Justice Department.
It was urgent — after all, hundreds of career prosecutors have quit because of the politicization of the Justice Department and the fear that they might have to take unethical actions at the direction of Trump and Bondi.
We’ve seen DOJ cover up the corruption of the administration and its friends — like the WH Border Czar taking $50,000 in cash from undercover FBI agents. Or the corruption case against the Mayor of NYC. Or the Epstein files.
And we’ve seen the department prosecute the president’s enemies at the president’s urging — like James Comey — even though career prosecutors said the case lacked evidence.
Derek, it’s safe to say Pam Bondi was not too pleased with my line of questioning. Don’t just take it from me, look at some of the headlines from the hearing:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251008_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9054%2E5257348%2EilbFD3)
Derek, the Department of Justice has become Trump’s personal sword to go after his ever-growing list of political enemies, including me. And his shield to cover up corruption and hide wrongdoing.
And Pam Bondi has enabled this behavior.
Instead of going after Tom Homan, Trump’s border czar for taking the 50 thousand in cash, the DOJ shut down the investigation.
When I asked Attorney General Bondi about this, she deflected responsibility. Said she didn’t know or wouldn’t comment about the case. She said that I should be **fired**. _Derek, she even said I should apologize to Donald Trump for leading his first impeachment trial._
_Not gonna happen._
**The Department of Justice should be pursuing accountability, cracking down on corruption, and defending the Constitution. But under this administration, the DOJ is a tool for attacking enemies and covering up wrongdoing.**
I will continue to use my position on the Judiciary Committee to conduct hard oversight and demand concrete answers. I will call out corruption and speak out against any and every attempt to weaponize our legal system against Trump’s political opponents. I will not give in, and not back down.
**[Please, help me stand up to this corruption — pitch in to our work demanding accountability.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251008_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=9054%2E5257348%2EilbFD3)**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0kpy0rrp3suhsk0i9pcyqawaztzd3w3ikc1dnc2f4mkw0eu4lwa6659funxj11z5163c775k96auqzmqwervgh2f2qxb&__stmp=t3thpj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10itym4oef4bqyegwt48vvg7b8szthemb4x296gp3q28vuyummz3qy2npv4cigi6xt2268hrlwxn9jklf5lmtldh2h737emzoihssdnt0qvjuivgme7hiydwshzqbm056u597noq1at2voph&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3thpj&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
You can make the difference. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtalrKquE0KHW6WQtsxJaGdfNrvrEvWLoHfnoEDq0am61JDsNA-5eKkPI63DNOqgNDFqWp3xTG0j4n-NSvjYqbVhwN_u2A-3ztYXmgDHmLPlj7v6vZQM5gK5utPpwsCPJcwEniG6v-OarghFSX-_xL3YFGhE7xr08cFIOtC_lim3v1fxlgwDCFwi0Oypak2Y8IRRzycGQhB92izbku_YfDXxjk70cc7phL8H6JzWP7zjl4B4XsY2x57AAcN-UqXkmTIiyZfGtMkbDYZT18DcND7tAVJTSrfCOLRiG00XRi9cTg-pEBWwoBtHWLqGsu1JreOD2QCkh5_HzX3Rcq49vTY1MgQuWD5G9uOj4Z-pyEv1sCmBFmEPQdvk4NgY85f-HiKI5FM2SAV_grnFaCmEFtV/4kk/wYGhZGQBRaKJXQEIFi_8Tg/h0/h001.i295eJQ8R5zv2jUsNFIxFoHbjhTwKfMWQaCUAaiMR3Y)
---
I don't mess around with something as important as representing the people of North Carolina, Friend. Every race I've ever run, I've been in it to win -- even when the odds seemed long. You've been there with me every time, and together, we've succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So [**when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and No Dem Left Behind,****it 's because your contribution**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtalrKquE0KHW6WQtsxJaGdfNrvrEvWLoHfnoEDq0am61JDsNA-5eKkPI63DNOqgNArnY9D_XbWUic4SMa233AOQXLUcILikdREqn8R_L8GSZUg9IreXimHcxKoM0Pow4XDh0GuSGT0wlX8184B5_2myth7CYzVW7s4Uk8fsvysBncmPjmP768ADJGwK1NOWShk60vwbSAPcwDklEwMTNgpxMTSh1IJBedfAWWOw3CJzOsC4RjDKc2oB97fSTizI-MIccCw7ISW8C19Tez9STJtvB_qilpZF3ZK9TfuRX5tkm4Nwgi8HP5OOzpgPWwczM_cvbW8Uz6Zy_uWtRX96-WOhd_suZeb0Wsipl804FIiMkNhmSLMX_kjIH5v87bpsDh3UsAg6jyTfseyY4hdT-lv/4kk/wYGhZGQBRaKJXQEIFi_8Tg/h1/h001.fdNBw-rwQZSh5cTdDxKsq94DyZq__7rwkPEkZb_uuhs) could make the difference between victory and defeat. **Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we're preparing for national GOP money groups to spend hundreds of millions against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.

clean_body: You can make the difference. | | I don't mess around with something as important as representing the people of North Carolina, Friend. Every race I've ever run, I've been in it to win -- even when the odds seemed long. You've been there with me every time, and together, we've succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So could make the difference between victory and defeat. Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we're preparing for national GOP money groups to spend hundreds of millions against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. I deeply appreciate all your support, Roy Cooper | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Katie Hobbs
subject: 4 more years
body:
Our work to keep moving Arizona forward has only just begun, and the stakes in this race are sky-high.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-1?refcode=em-20251008-1&refcode2=728_1086043_fiZZeh&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)
**Peter, it’s Katie. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for re-election as governor of Arizona.**
**[If you’re with me, will you split a donation between me and Wes Moore and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign? This race is already being called the most competitive toss-up governor’s race in 2026, and I’m counting on your early support to power us to victory.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-1?refcode=em-20251008-1&refcode2=728_1086043_fiZZeh&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251008-1&refcode2=728_1086043_fiZZeh&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)**
**I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges – unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games.**
I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families – they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face.
I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans.
**That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games.**
But all our progress is on the line in this election.
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report,_ Larry Sabato’s _Crystal Ball,_ and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a **pure toss-up.**
It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but **TWO** of my *three* GOP opponents.**
But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**
**[So please: Split a donation between me and Wes Moore and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-1?refcode=em-20251008-1&refcode2=728_1086043_fiZZeh&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251008-1&refcode2=728_1086043_fiZZeh&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)**
Let’s get to work!
— Katie

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251008-1&t=1&refcode2=728_1086043_fiZZeh&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=728%2E1086043%2EfiZZeh)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community. = Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress 600 Pennsylvania Ave, Unit 15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States **

name: Becca Balint
subject: You’ll never hear me say this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81342/images/BalintYellowCircle.png]
Peter, you won't ever hear me say this, but I really mean it today: I am ready to go back to Washington, D.C.

Vermont is home. Washington is where I work. Like all of you, I relish time spent at home with my family during the weekend.

But right now, our government is still shut down. We need to get back to Washington. So we can get back to work for the American people — like protecting the rule of law and access to health care.

Yet, Speaker Johnson keeps canceling votes again, and again, and again.

Because not only do Republicans refuse to negotiate with Democrats, they also don't want to swear in Representative-elect Adelita Grijalva, who would be the final vote needed to force the release of the Epstein Files.

It's ridiculous.

Until we can get back to Washington, I won't stop doing everything I can to advocate for Vermonters and ensure the American people know who's really to blame for this mess.

Thank you.

— Becca

name: Binkley for Congress
subject: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Congressional Candidate Ryan Binkley Shatters Expectations With $1 Million Quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress
body:
| | | | | |
---
| |
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact Name: Matthew Pagano** Contact Email: press@binkleyforcongress.com
**Congressional Candidate Ryan Binkley Shatters Expectations With $1 Million Quarter**
6 October 2025–Richardson, TX—Just weeks after launching his bid for Texas Congressional District 32, Republican Ryan Binkley announced that his campaign reached over $1 million in his effort’s first fundraising quarter.
“I gave our team an ambitious goal and we knocked it out of the park,” Binkley said. “Despite officially launching our campaign on September 14th, with just days to go in the fundraising quarter, we still surpassed our own goals and secured over $1 million.”
The Binkley for Congress launch event had over 250 energized supporters in attendance at the University of Texas, Dallas. Ryan Binkley was joined and endorsed by Kelly Shackleford of First Liberty.
According to Binkley, his campaign’s October FEC report will show more than 800 individual donors supporting his run.
“I’m humbled and motivated by the enthusiastic support we’re already seeing across the district,” Binkly continued. “It’s time for an economic revival in our country and the time for that revival is now.”
The local business leader and pastor is running to unseat incumbent Democrat Julie Johnson in the newly re-drawn TX-32. “I am running for Congress in the most important midterm election in decades to work with President Trump and Speaker Mike Johnson to ensure that the next generation has the greatest opportunities of success,” said Binkley.
“It’s clear that our current representative cares more about appeasing her liberal party bosses in DC and the extreme Left than fighting for the hard-working families of North Texas,” Binkley concluded. “Congresswoman Johnson voted for the Schumer shutdown, opposed President Trump’s fight to secure the border, and consistently voted for higher taxes and radical progressive policies. That is not what our communities voted for.”
Ryan Binkley is the CEO of Generational Group and the co-lead pastor and founder at Create Church with his wife, Ellie. They live in Richardson, Texas, and have five children. To learn more about the HSI campaign, visit [binkleyforcongress.com](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=7e2baa4fc2&e=a4fe331f26).
# # #

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

There's no way to sugarcoat this, Team: **Louisiana is asking the Supreme Court to gut the central provision of the Voting Rights Act and ban any use of race in redistricting.** In a legal brief filed just ahead of the new Supreme Court term, the state urged the Supreme Court to overturn a landmark 1986 ruling that established a legal test for when a voting map illegally dilutes minorities’ voter power. That ruling, Thornburg v. Gingles, has been understood for decades to require that states with significant communities of minority voters draw districts that fairly reflect their voting power. Louisiana also told the Supreme Court it has made the decision not to defend the state’s current congressional map from 2024. That map contains two majority-Black districts among the state’s six House seats. This unusual move comes as the state claims it was "_coerced_ " into complying with the Voting Rights Act. **This is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year.** Chief Justice John Roberts has been working to gut the VRA for more than a decade. The VRA's provision against racial gerrymandering is one of the last major legs of the law standing. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity. **[Team: We can't tolerate this kind of blatant partisanship interfering with our right to vote. Stand up for fair districts, ballot access, and more in Louisiana and beyond with $25 or whatever you can today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116854734/574650502/1498593520?refcode=100825_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliMTQwOWM4LTU3YTQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vSoUABr7SNtT-WgZptNcJvV4hKg-WxuHYUdAuLM8IYQ=)**

clean_body: Politico: Louisiana asks Supreme Court to gut Voting Rights Act and ban use of race in redistricting| | | | | | | = There's no way to sugarcoat this, Team: Louisiana is asking the Supreme Court to gut the central provision of the Voting Rights Act and ban any use of race in redistricting. In a legal brief filed just ahead of the new Supreme Court term, the state urged the Supreme Court to overturn a landmark 1986 ruling that established a legal test for when a voting map illegally dilutes minorities’ voter power. That ruling, Thornburg v. Gingles, has been understood for decades to require that states with significant communities of minority voters draw districts that fairly reflect their voting power. Louisiana also told the Supreme Court it has made the decision not to defend the state’s current congressional map from 2024. That map contains two majority-Black districts among the state’s six House seats. This unusual move comes as the state claims it was "coerced " into complying with the Voting Rights Act. This is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Chief Justice John Roberts has been working to gut the VRA for more than a decade. The VRA's provision against racial gerrymandering is one of the last major legs of the law standing. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=00d71bf35d7c4cb6b252b08d69ae1af4&_e=As4y1V4-IPH6d7OgM2izQU2UOAUdflqdlMn__yx6h8sGdWndUuhaRllxiV-LFL-Y0D9cl5nmNDwrPHlR3zEmHKCFnekeygJaivY2gyFYKcSGhrnlhnQUQuutTAWs7lqB92ac_jVviw-W6je2Sa9GKxt44T6r9-npVMwTn-bHR8KFZUc-_2DlO1hfSk7uRc_QF2wrFdPKJvJ--rKHukHl7qnfIknltwn4i86l0kfItgecHD9d7EPnBxQqMFvqEkJk3UFBsCfd9tozkQb0uXqwXEWx5Ajyie3B9jE8Y4-8hCQx8zZr7426EmGPmJiWV0m5yTsRuI7Ykfm5MjUPRhdN5r4w9R5jwmj5yuphMp5er8baImW9dJK0KDh1uR9yNCxRWDvHhT9S_q6c8exLWA6xTuVfU6Gol_jHj6-froW_ZUg7bCG_TDZJ9xsrhAU6-bG20OTNa-0qm0S8EzBSGd3JQK-ZgcL1mjw6AMM5dl5qayr0I5fhwC175KF3S_IyUEnQjAzQZrjopbUqSNbVxACvmxIWEJF70BJQiSlEeeb4SBiPPrhw8Dmsv9XwTEJI7lJyHIik_lCGawTGiZ4QuAMVUzbWKQFS1ilGvevo4ZcJQJM3LG5jYbkPFqqAI716aJ9ufaG1lYGaFaWlTN94AqtlxYPkP4QGeEIm-ZfniRiyl9O-5eSv5CDDFCv7kmy7wkrEqSIbFABnQLc4BfMGsn5Nz1hUNGuwhoO6iUp0BHRGNrUlxS-mwbPM-gWJPsNMQMIvh8NY1E5U6nepveGUDoTIRQ%3D%3D)

* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: This is Republicans’ shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — Donald Trump and Republicans forced us into a government shutdown because they care more about their billionaire buddies than hundreds of millions of Americans. **This shutdown is an outright act of economic sabotage aimed at extorting the American people by putting their jobs on the line to push through devastating healthcare cuts.** It is a failure to govern responsibly that lies solely on the shoulders of the party that controls the White House, the Senate, and the House: the Republican Party. Their refusal to engage at all with Democrats in Congress to fix the healthcare crisis they have created has left us at an impasse that threatens the livelihoods of countless families across the nation. **My fellow Democrats and I are not standing idly by.** We are united in our commitment to fight for your healthcare. Our democracy is under threat, but together, we have the power to defend it. Now more than ever, your voice and support are essential. Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving our nation and our democratic principles. — Dan | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116857259/574658099/-2144685249?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_NOA_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQzODY0YS01YWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTaA-Cooq7jhl8YKN3wA4sTfsFY5MARQB9HUJgKUpzY=)

Trump’s attacks on Portland, as well as similar ones in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Washington, D.C., are unwarranted and unlawful, Peter. We cannot normalize these escalating attempts to use the military to occupy our cities.
There is no need for military intervention in Oregon. The biggest threat to our public safety and our democracy is Donald Trump himself. I am committed to speaking out, standing with the people of Oregon, and solving the real problems facing our state.
**[I need you with me in this fight, Peter. Will you sign on right now to stand with me against Donald Trump’s unlawful military intervention?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116857647/574659321/-399259665?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWQ1ODBiNC01YWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AwdQpwqVARQr7Wm3FRE33dCNpghZeUlFT0uHpqNEFQ=&emci=d45ccac2-b2a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=95d580b4-5aa4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15353729)**

body:
Results from Tennessee...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116858064/574660654/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251008Results_DB_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMGUzOWIyLTViYTQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ypoiLLVw5NrnKLx7_G4GA7_fgEM-zlUWtUff6BMskdA=)
---
Peter – **ATTENTION EVERYONE!!!!!!!**

We have an amazing update: Aftyn Behn WON her primary election last night. She defied the odds and won – despite her Democratic male opponents _threatening_ her to get her to drop out of the race.

** Now she's headed to the general where she'll be up against the Trump-endorsed Republican nominee on December 2nd.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116858066/574660656/-1821248200?refcode=EM_F_251008Results_DB_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMGUzOWIyLTViYTQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ypoiLLVw5NrnKLx7_G4GA7_fgEM-zlUWtUff6BMskdA=)
---
**According to _Clarksville Now_ : Get-out-the-vote efforts paid off, with voter turnout almost evenly divided – 50.6% to 49.4% – between Democrats and Republicans during early voting. **

Turnout for both sides of this primary election suggests it's actually going to be a tight race in the general election, which is pretty shocking when we consider how deeply red Tennessee has been historically.

_“Tonight, Tennessee sent a message, and that message is**women can still fight,** organizers can still win, and Democrats in the Deep South aren’t done yet,"_ Aftyn said when she won her primary last night – and we couldn’t agree more.

**Aftyn is an incredible candidate and a deeply needed voice for women in Tennessee.**

**Here’s what’s up next: she'll need to hire more team members and staff to support her in this tough fight ahead of December 2nd. Tennessee ranks among the lowest for maternal care outcomes AND female representation in government. **We know we need women in the rooms where decisions are being made about OUR bodies – and Tennessee is a perfect example of what happens when men are the ones making all the laws.**

Peter –

Aftyn Behn will be the __only__ __woman__ on the ballot out of 16 candidates. The rest are men. She also has the most experience advocating for the women of Tennessee – and winning important fights that have protected thousands of Tennessee women.

** Her primary is _this_ _TUESDAY._ We can help advance the only proven pro-choice champion through the primary in this critical opportunity for Democrats to secure another seat in the U.S. Congress. **

In the official ranking of states based on women in government, Tennessee ranks 46th out of 50 states. Tennessee has nine House seats in Washington – only one is occupied by a woman.

Additionally, in Tennessee, Black women are nearly three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women — most of them preventable. **TN ranks among the bottom nationally for maternal health outcomes,** and the women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

[**It’s dangerous to be a woman in Tennessee, and Aftyn has been doing everything she possibly can to change that. This seat is in a red district in Tennessee, but recent polling indicates that of all the Democrats vying for the seat, **Aftyn would be the candidate with the best chances of winning against the Republican** in the General Election. If you were looking for a chance to elect a phenomenal woman _and_ flip a federal seat.... **This is it. Your support could make all the difference.**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: A month of work, community, and progress
body:
September highlights

| |
---
Hi friend, September was a busy month, and I am so proud of the work we accomplished together. Here are a few of the highlights from my time both in Washington and here at home in New Jersey. **I began the month at a community parade to celebrate Labor Day.** It was a reminder that working people are the backbone of this country, and that our fight for fair wages and dignity in the workplace is ongoing. **I visited South Hackensack,** where I spoke with families about the issues they are facing every day. Meeting constituents where they are, and hearing from them directly, is how I guide my work in Congress. **With our diverse community, we had many moments of celebration this month.** I celebrated Mexican Independence Day and Guatemalan Independence Day with our Latino communities, honoring their culture, history, and enormous contributions to New Jersey. **I spoke at the Congressional Hispanic Caucus** Institute’s celebration of Hispanic Heritage Month. **In Congress,** I fought to keep the government open and protect your health care. I also worked on legislation to address spiking energy prices, which are the direct result of Republican culture wars that are forcing clean energy projects to close. **At home,** I joined our community in remembering the lives lost on 9/11 and honoring the resilience of New Jersey families who still carry those memories. I also worked with local officials to address the Paterson fire hazard, because public safety begins with prevention. **[But here’s the truth: keeping this level of work going takes resources.
