clean_body: September highlights | | Hi friend, September was a busy month, and I am so proud of the work we accomplished together. Here are a few of the highlights from my time both in Washington and here at home in New Jersey. I began the month at a community parade to celebrate Labor Day. It was a reminder that working people are the backbone of this country, and that our fight for fair wages and dignity in the workplace is ongoing. I visited South Hackensack, where I spoke with families about the issues they are facing every day. Meeting constituents where they are, and hearing from them directly, is how I guide my work in Congress. With our diverse community, we had many moments of celebration this month. I celebrated Mexican Independence Day and Guatemalan Independence Day with our Latino communities, honoring their culture, history, and enormous contributions to New Jersey. I spoke at the Congressional Hispanic Caucus Institute’s celebration of Hispanic Heritage Month. In Congress, I fought to keep the government open and protect your health care. I also worked on legislation to address spiking energy prices, which are the direct result of Republican culture wars that are forcing clean energy projects to close. At home, I joined our community in remembering the lives lost on 9/11 and honoring the resilience of New Jersey families who still carry those memories. I also worked with local officials to address the Paterson fire hazard, because public safety begins with prevention. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for being part of this journey. Together, we are building a stronger, safer, and more inclusive New Jersey. With gratitude, Nellie Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

name: Steven Wendelin
subject: Thank You for Standing With Me
body:
Wendelin For Congress Dear Friends and Supporters, I want to take a moment to thank you for your continued support and encouragement as we keep building this movement together. From the start, this ca | | | **Wendelin For Congress**
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters,I want to take a moment to thank you for your continued support and encouragement as we keep building this movement together. From the start, this campaign has been about one simple idea — restoring integrity, decency, and common sense to our government.Every message, every handshake, every share on social media helps remind me why I’m running: to fight for the people of West Virginia, not the powerful few. Together, we’re proving that you don’t need to sell out to win. That’s why I’ve made a promise — I will **never accept PAC or corporate money**. My campaign is fueled entirely by individual supporters like you, because our democracy belongs to the people.I also promise not to clog up your inbox with spam asking for $5 or $10 every other day. You all know what’s at stake and I know you all will support me as best you can.If you haven’t already, I invite you to:
* Visit my website: [www.WendelinForCongress.com](https://q8w2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e6865da57dd702639730cc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wendelinforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68e67d2977867078c9e75101%26ss_email_id%3D68e6865da57dd702639730cc%26ss_campaign_name%3DThank%2BYou%2Bfor%2BStanding%2BWith%2BMe%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-08T15%253A42%253A21Z&w=64d253ff0603db3c564434a9&c=b_68e67d2977867078c9e75101&l=en-US&s=-Ke8wIw4YyMyzYF3kl5LEAQ9hhw%3D)
* Subscribe to my Substack for fact-checks and updates:[Read my latest on Substack](https://q8w2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e6865da57dd702639730cc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2F%40wendelin4congress%3Futm_source%3Dglobal-search&w=64d253ff0603db3c564434a9&c=b_68e67d2977867078c9e75101&l=en-US&s=Vu8QmQYzEhj-eIbDLNMfdxFjXgw%3D)
* Follow and share our message on Facebook:[Wendelin for Congress on Facebook](https://q8w2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e6865da57dd702639730cc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D61550962770186&w=64d253ff0603db3c564434a9&c=b_68e67d2977867078c9e75101&l=en-US&s=dwwucLIR4b4NDf-xjoO-iZr-zQ0%3D)

Your continued support means everything — whether through volunteering, spreading the word, or contributing what you can. Together, we’re building something real so we can take back our House in November 2026 and restore the Rule of Law and our Constitution back to We The People.Cheers,Steven
**Commander Steven M. Wendelin, USN (Ret.)**
Candidate for U.S. House – West Virginia’s 2nd Congressional District

---

Together, we’re proving that you don’t need to sell out to win. That’s why I’ve made a promise — I will never accept PAC or corporate money. My campaign is fueled entirely by individual supporters like you, because our democracy belongs to the people.I also promise not to clog up your inbox with spam asking for $5 or $10 every other day. You all know what’s at stake and I know you all will support me as best you can.If you haven’t already, I invite you to: Visit my website: Subscribe to my Substack for fact-checks and updates: Follow and share our message on Facebook: Your continued support means everything — whether through volunteering, spreading the word, or contributing what you can. Together, we’re building something real so we can take back our House in November 2026 and restore the Rule of Law and our Constitution back to We The People.Cheers,Steven Commander Steven M. Wendelin, USN (Ret.)** Candidate for U.S. House – West Virginia’s 2nd Congressional District | Wendelin For Congress, PO Box 623, Wardensville, WV 26851, United States Powered by

**I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges — unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games.**
I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families — they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face.
I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans.
**That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games.**
But all our progress is on the line in this election.
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend _whatever it takes_ to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report,_ Larry Sabato’s _Crystal Ball,_ and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a **pure toss-up.**
It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but **TWO** of my *three* GOP opponents.
But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**
**[So please: Split a donation between me and Roy Cooper and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116859252/574663969/-74621518?refcode=ea.af08827e-5ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.af08827e-5ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjA4ODI3ZS01ZWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3KXx3g_NuUvDoOjUY5iXdF7MkBKGNpL_NrFljiEwig=)**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: URGENT: Trump just called for elected officials to be ARRESTED — we must respond now
body:
🚨 BREAKING: Donald Trump just called for the arrest of Chicago’s Mayor and Illinois’ Governor!!!!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?refcode=100825_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?refcode=100825_1]
This is what authoritarianism looks like — targeting elected leaders, criminalizing opposition, and testing how far he can go.
We cannot stay silent while Trump lays the groundwork for a full-blown fascist crackdown.

body:
A TRUMP-APPOINTED Judge just ruled that Trump has no authority to send the National Guard into Portland.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116859509/574664900/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmQ4Y2IyZi01ZmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GcVjhtyscDNEDDPyfmvgH6xXeYYo7hs7wMGYJmnevjA=) It’s Andrea. I needed you to make sure you saw this critical update: **A _TRUMP-APPOINTED_ Judge just ruled that Trump has no authority to send the National Guard into Portland. ** Hear me loud and clear: This is a major win not only for the people of Oregon but for the rule of law. It affirms what we have always known — that there is no basis for the Trump Administration to federalize the National Guard. **[But: The ruling is not final — and our work to fight back against Trump’s authoritarianism and his assault on our state for even a moment cannot stop here. That’s why I’m calling on supporters to step up to step and prove that we’re still united against Trump’s latest authoritarian stunt, and have the momentum to fight back against his MAGA Majority. Will you show where you stand by adding your name to my petition calling out Trump’s abuse of power? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116859511/574664903/-971562749?refcode=email_100825_nationalguard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmQ4Y2IyZi01ZmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GcVjhtyscDNEDDPyfmvgH6xXeYYo7hs7wMGYJmnevjA=&emci=531a3f37-c3a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bfd8cb2f-5fa4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116859514/574664906/-971562749?refcode=email_100825_nationalguard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmQ4Y2IyZi01ZmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GcVjhtyscDNEDDPyfmvgH6xXeYYo7hs7wMGYJmnevjA=&emci=531a3f37-c3a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=bfd8cb2f-5fa4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Solidarity moves us forward / La solidaridad nos hace avanzar ✊🏿✊🏾✊🏽✊🏼
body:
THIS SATURDAY:
Coming together for a community-led candidate forum with Houston allies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/CD%2018%20Candidate%20Forum_Save%20the%20Date_to%20email%20%28Website%29%20%282%29.png]
HOUSTON! Come out this Saturday, October 11 to hear directly from candidates for City of Houston At-Large Council and Texas Congressional District 18 on issues that impact our neighborhoods the most -- from environmental justice, to infrastructure, housing, public health, and economic opportunity. Partners for this event include TOP, Houston Area Urban League, Hip Hop Caucus, Texas Campaign for the Environment, BakerRipley, CEER (Coalition for Environment, Equity, and Resilience), Greater Houston Coalition for Justice, Texas Organizing Project, Denver Harbor Cares, and Pleasantville Community.
These two races will shape the Houston area for years to come. Don’t miss out. Drop by and bring a friend!
https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env [https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env]
For more information on this forum, email Oscar at othomas@organizetexas.org [othomas@organizetexas.org] .
SIGN OUR PETITION:
Join the push for fair rent in Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Real%20Pages%20graphic.jpg]
Housing is a human right. Affording a safe, stable place to call home shouldn’t cost an arm and a leg. As prices for basic goods and services continue to rise, so does rent. And if you're a tenant in Dallas, a little-known algorithm is likely causing a spike in your rent.
Join TOP and DFW housing justice allies as we urge the City of Dallas to ban RealPage, as well as private data sharing between landlords through algorithmic price setting.
RealPage is currently under investigation by the U.S. Dept. of Justice and faces multiple lawsuits from states and cities for violating antitrust laws.
https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2]
For more information on this campaign, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
PREPARE TO VOTE:
Read up on the Texas statewide propositions that will be on your ballot
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20Capitol%20Austin%20building.jpg]
Tell your family and friends: There's an election taking place in Texas this November! In a matter of days, voters in our state will weigh in on 17 statewide propositions. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/09/22/texas-statewide-propositions-november-ballot-election/]
If approved by the majority of voters, these ballot propositions become constitutional amendments, which are then enshrined in our state constitution.
Early voting for this election starts Oct. 21 and goes through Oct. 31. Election Day is Tuesday, Nov. 4. Double-check your voter registration status. [https://www.vote.org/am-i-registered-to-vote/]
TOP Tip: Save our playlist celebrating National Hispanic Heritage Month
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Teal%20-%20National%20Hispanic%20Heritage%20Month%20graphic.png]
This month and every month, TOP celebrates the lives, contributions, and sacrifices of those across our diverse Latino communities whose resilience and tenacity has shaped the U.S. and our society for generations. Be sure to give our playlist [https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6tCfFKUVcXwikR6fOPXcUJ] celebrating National Hispanic Heritage Month a follow!
Español
ESTE SÁBADO:
Nos reunimos para un foro de candidatos liderado por la comunidad con aliados de Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/CD%2018%20Candidate%20Forum_Save%20the%20Date_to%20email%20%28Website%29%20%282%29.png]
¡HOUSTON! Ven este sábado 11 de octubre para escuchar directamente a los candidatos al Consejo General de la Ciudad de Houston y al Distrito Congresional 18 de Texas sobre los temas que más impactan nuestros vecindarios, desde justicia ambiental hasta infraestructura, vivienda, salud pública y oportunidades económicas . Entre los colaboradores de este evento se encuentran TOP, la Liga Urbana del Área de Houston, el Caucus de Hip Hop, la Campaña de Texas por el Medio Ambiente, BakerRipley, CEER (Coalición para el Medio Ambiente, la Equidad y la Resiliencia), la Coalición por la Justicia del Gran Houston, el Proyecto de Organización de Texas, Denver Harbor Cares y Pleasantville Community.
Estas dos contiendas definirán el área de Houston en los próximos años. ¡No te lo pierdas! ¡Visítanos y trae a un amigo!
https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env [https://secure.airalliancehouston.org/a/houston-voices-health-and-equity-cd-18-and-council-large-4-candidate-forum-health-env]
Para obtener más información sobre este foro, envía un correo electrónico a Oscar a othomas@organizetexas.org [othomas@organizetexas.org] .
FIRMA NUESTRA PETICIÓN:
Únete a la lucha por un alquiler justo en Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Real%20Pages%20graphic.jpg]
La vivienda es un derecho humano. Accesible para un hogar seguro y estable, no debería ser un gasto excesivo. A medida que los precios de los bienes y servicios básicos siguen subiendo, también lo hace el alquiler. Y si tu eres inquilino en Dallas, es probable que un algoritmo poco conocido esté provocando un aumento repentino en tu alquiler.
Únete a TOP y a los aliados de DFW por la justicia en la vivienda para instar a la Ciudad de Dallas a prohibir RealPage, así como el intercambio de datos privados entre propietarios mediante la fijación algorítmica de precios.
RealPage está siendo investigado actualmente por el Departamento de Justicia de EE. UU. y enfrenta múltiples demandas de estados y ciudades por violar las leyes antimonopolio.
https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/NXgD0nS8F02LVZwJDOVXgQ2]
Para obtener más información sobre esta campaña, contacta a Iman en ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
PREPÁRATE PARA VOTAR:
Infórmate sobre las propuestas estatales de Texas que estarán en tu boleta
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20Capitol%20Austin%20building.jpg]
Cuéntales a tus familiares y amigos: ¡Este noviembre habrá elecciones en Texas! En cuestión de días, los votantes de nuestro estado opinarán sobre 17 propuestas estatales. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/09/22/texas-statewide-propositions-november-ballot-election/]
Si la mayoría de los votantes las aprueba, estas propuestas se convertirán en enmiendas constitucionales, que quedarán consagradas en la constitución estatal.
La votación anticipada para estas elecciones comienza el 21 de octubre y finaliza el 31 de octubre. El día de las elecciones es el martes 4 de noviembre. Verifica tu estado de registro de votante. [https://www.vote.org/am-i-registered-to-vote/]
Consejos de TOP: Guarda nuestra lista de reproducción que celebra el Mes Nacional de la Herencia Hispana
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Teal%20-%20National%20Hispanic%20Heritage%20Month%20graphic.png]
Guarda nuestra lista de reproducción para celebrar el Mes de la Herencia Hispana. Este mes y todos los meses, TOP celebra la vida, las contribuciones y los sacrificios de quienes, en nuestras diversas comunidades latinas, han forjado su resiliencia y tenacidad en Estados Unidos y nuestra sociedad durante generaciones. ¡Sigue nuestra lista de reproducción [https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6tCfFKUVcXwikR6fOPXcUJ] para celebrar el Mes de la Herencia Hispana!
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=wdCerW7%2FQtGZST9mCKuc6qMLn4iN4esdBjvaDRCClLDOlX4LwQPTwHCcviCg2D6NyDvkwqNdke8Mxwq7dQ%2BN4vBPNF3U6iUN7cx6UVIoIxuO9XgoS8LLc4WV%2BoPKgW3hOF0kjnxnzyME%2BzyxKdBGxF%2BacNKADYXRRK6Q356lxRPHjc9XEESoJ8BHlew70PWOOxuOkZlYNctfaqyfci09EW9asPewg3G1LA6GcT3ooCBOnL590Bg%2FxgX1B9HVx295Q7F1KOpxqQ4oHR3LNKEDb2I58XtgeUtVwb2DP%2BjIMGimXAWgUmbqfPipK7b%2F%2BcxyzskOrpFJv3fk1AmUmKG%2BtQBFCo%2BnBVX60QV3T7HjUvbVSEt4wTmPFOm3aT6apoArXPpFKx5U7Tz7KlRNNBBU6WEwV4vC%2B%2BHorC6bmQMrXFw%3D .

La votación anticipada para estas elecciones comienza el 21 de octubre y finaliza el 31 de octubre. El día de las elecciones es el martes 4 de noviembre. Verifica tu estado de registro de votante. [] Consejos de TOP: Guarda nuestra lista de reproducción que celebra el Mes Nacional de la Herencia Hispana [] Guarda nuestra lista de reproducción para celebrar el Mes de la Herencia Hispana. Este mes y todos los meses, TOP celebra la vida, las contribuciones y los sacrificios de quienes, en nuestras diversas comunidades latinas, han forjado su resiliencia y tenacidad en Estados Unidos y nuestra sociedad durante generaciones. ¡Sigue nuestra lista de reproducción [] para celebrar el Mes de la Herencia Hispana! body:
| | | We’ve built incredible momentum for Elizabeth Guzman’s campaign — but this is no time to take our foot off the gas.
The stakes are too high, and **billionaire extremists are watching every move we make.**
Elizabeth has always stood up for working families, fought to protect our rights, and never backed down from tough battles. That’s exactly why powerful special interests are lining up against her. They know she’s a fighter who gets results — **_and they’ll spend whatever it takes to try to stop her._**
But here’s the truth: when grassroots supporters like you keep pushing, we win. Every call, every donation, every show of support fuels this movement and keeps Elizabeth in this fight.
_We cannot afford to slow down._

clean_body: | | | We’ve built incredible momentum for Elizabeth Guzman’s campaign — but this is no time to take our foot off the gas. The stakes are too high, and billionaire extremists are watching every move we make. Elizabeth has always stood up for working families, fought to protect our rights, and never backed down from tough battles. That’s exactly why powerful special interests are lining up against her. They know she’s a fighter who gets results — and they’ll spend whatever it takes to try to stop her. But here’s the truth: when grassroots supporters like you keep pushing, we win. Every call, every donation, every show of support fuels this movement and keeps Elizabeth in this fight. We cannot afford to slow down. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Together, we’ll prove that when people power goes up against big money, people power wins. Onward, Team Guzman P.S. Momentum is everything. ** | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Will you be part of our October focus group, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We're counting on your response.
#

**_— FOCUS GROUP —_**
**_DEADLINE: 11:59PM TONIGHT_** **[JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96402?t=1&akid=9543%2E614464%2EgwQ_jT)** _The 2026 elections will decide the future of the U.S. Senate, the U.S. House, and key state + local races across the country._ Before we get into the thick of it, we need your input. **Will you be part of our October 2025 Focus Group?** It takes less than 3 minutes. You can do it from your phone or your computer. And your answers will directly shape our strategy for how we elect Democrats in all 50 states in 2026. **If you’re ready, just click the button below to join:** **[JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96402?t=2&akid=9543%2E614464%2EgwQ_jT)**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Don't Pay Republicans in Congress until they end their shutdown
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't Pay Republicans in Congress until they end their shutdown](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8df6f2d0-cd72-44bd-a85c-d98702ef4c60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f6f983a-6238-44b5-89c7-3ffe4094cb20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T802dd543-4891-4f2f-9d8f-7212270c9ffc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then share with friends to help build support!)_ Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House. They started the shutdown, and they can end it. [**And they shouldn't get paid a damn penny until they do.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77d96ffb-344d-435b-a50c-70a19555a5c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) They're not working, so why the hell should they get paid? And with Trump threatening to withhold backpay from essential workers who do their jobs during the shutdown, why should we pay these NON-essential GOP clowns now, who are just sitting on their behinds? [**Add your name: "Don't Pay Republicans in Congress until they end their shutdown"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4866c67d-4812-4d79-8f0f-288ba900e2be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Election Rigging Response HQ (cadem.org)
subject: re: our greatest fear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Ugh, bad news:
Reports from media analysis groups have just suggested that our greatest fear has been realized...
“No on Prop 50” is apparently outspending the “Yes” campaign by more than $1.5 MILLION on TV. Their slick attack ads are flooding the airwaves, reaching voters nearly 50% more often than our message.
Will you rush a donation of $ right now to help us fight back against this GOP TV spending surge and keep our message in front of voters through grassroots organizing? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]These ads are paid for by the same MAGA megadonors and corporate interests trying to help Donald Trump rig next year’s elections before they even begin. They’re counting on confusion, fear, and repetition to do the work for them — hoping Californians won’t see through the noise.
We might not be able to match their TV spending dollar for dollar. But we can outwork them.
That’s why the California Democratic Party is doubling down on grassroots organizing — knocking doors, calling voters, and sharing the truth about Prop 50 with Californians face-to-face.
Every dollar you give today powers...
➡️ Canvassers talking to undecided voters across California;
➡️ Volunteer phonebanks correcting misinformation in real time;
➡️ Voter protection hotlines making sure every Californian knows when and how to vote.
Here’s the truth: Dark money ads might dominate the airwaves, but they can’t compete with a real conversation between neighbors. That’s where we win.
The GOP is banking on deception and deep pockets. We’re banking on people power.
Many of you may be considering donating for the first time. Others may have already supported us in this ballot initiative campaign. We are so grateful for your support. But with ballots now on their way to voters, can we count on you to make a rapid response donation to help us match GOP spending and reach every voter we can before it’s too late? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]

Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

subject: Leaders like Cori
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_buildingcommunityup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_buildingcommunityup_act]
Peter,
Cori Bush—our founder, our sister in struggle, our Politivist—is back doing what she does best: knocking broken systems down and building our community up.
She leads with integrity, something lacking in these political times. These are times that demand Democrats with a spine.
Cori has always stood up for peace, justice, and human rights, even when mega-donors and extremists tried to buy her seat. But she’s not the only one. We know this . Across this country, there are everyday people activated and organized in their communities just like her who are ready to take on entrenched power and fight for the people.
By becoming a member of Movement for Freedom , you’ll help us decide who those next endorsed Politivist candidates will be. Your membership means your voice shapes the slate. Your vote will literally decide who we lift up, support, and send to the halls of power.
We won’t ask you to nominate today—but we are asking you to step up as a member by making a $25 donation today and saying, count me in! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_buildingcommunityup_act&amount=25] If $25 is too much, donate whatever you can, we still need you in this work with us. Because this movement has always been about people power, not corporate dollars. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_buildingcommunityup_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_buildingcommunityup_act]
Together, we’ll prove what Cori already showed the world: the people united can never be defeated. When we fight with love and courage, we can take down dynasties, knock down barriers, and build a government rooted in people, not profit.
In solidarity,
Stephany

Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .

name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Tell Congress to release the full Epstein files.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: Representative Thomas Massie and I introduced a resolution to force a vote to release ALL of the Epstein files to the public. Republican leadership decided to shut down Congress rather than hold a vote.
THEN: We collected the 218 signatures necessary for our discharge petition to force a floor vote, over objections from Republican leadership. Representative-elect Adelita Grijalva of Arizona has committed to being our 218th signer upon her swearing-in.
NOW: Republicans are refusing to swear Grijalva in [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/10/06/us/politics/adelita-grijalva-house-epstein.html] and are using the government shutdown as an excuse to delay planned votes.
Americans deserve to know who is in those files, regardless of wealth, status, or party affiliation. The survivors deserve justice. TAKE ACTION: Tell Congress to release the full Epstein files. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-petition?contactdata=uBgRkb8NW9eBpEQAKK2yk48HN83A79NgNXvHV4C9Q5mJ8zkExWkGKT0wedJMfrn+maiIgEOlax6+gWbTPxCEMrDg9l5CKWw4MR3SDuz3ehf1nEe0XzkTEdj6D4AliH7oiLdb6ox20gOazDtjS9qEtjCOpO2jQbQ/RMT+RLnvcOV6tSDmIeOKdWYZbUrlUEhI]
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1975311968073621608 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1975311968073621608]
We need to build as much pressure as possible right now to ensure this is taken to a vote as soon as the House reconvenes. Every member of Congress must go on record and decide whether they will support corruption by the rich and powerful or stand up for transparency.
Sign if you agree: The American people need answers. Congress must vote to release ALL of the Epstein files to the public. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-petition?contactdata=uBgRkb8NW9eBpEQAKK2yk48HN83A79NgNXvHV4C9Q5mJ8zkExWkGKT0wedJMfrn+maiIgEOlax6+gWbTPxCEMrDg9l5CKWw4MR3SDuz3ehf1nEe0XzkTEdj6D4AliH7oiLdb6ox20gOazDtjS9qEtjCOpO2jQbQ/RMT+RLnvcOV6tSDmIeOKdWYZbUrlUEhI]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-petition?contactdata=uBgRkb8NW9eBpEQAKK2yk48HN83A79NgNXvHV4C9Q5mJ8zkExWkGKT0wedJMfrn+maiIgEOlax6+gWbTPxCEMrDg9l5CKWw4MR3SDuz3ehf1nEe0XzkTEdj6D4AliH7oiLdb6ox20gOazDtjS9qEtjCOpO2jQbQ/RMT+RLnvcOV6tSDmIeOKdWYZbUrlUEhI]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

**I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges – unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games.**
I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families – they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face.
I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans.
**That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games.**
But all our progress is on the line in this election.
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report,_ Larry Sabato’s _Crystal Ball,_ and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a **pure toss-up.**
It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but **TWO** of my *three* GOP opponents.
But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**
[**So please: Split a donation between me and Fight Like Hell PAC and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116863090/574677407/1821086054?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVhY2JhZjYtNjJhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jt8Xvp9yHQEzGKIDMTMz1RxXZ1TomziXoglGwL9vceE=)

clean_body: Our work to keep moving Arizona forward has only just begun, and the stakes in this race are sky-high. | = Team, it’s Katie. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for re-election as governor of Arizona. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Katie Hobbs and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges – unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games. I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families – they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face. I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans. That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games. But all our progress is on the line in this election. Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the Cook Political Report, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and Inside Elections have already called this race a pure toss-up. It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but TWO of my three GOP opponents. But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: You. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Katie Hobbs and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Let’s get to work! — Katie Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Let’s Get Rid of Property Taxes!
body:
Rep. Ryan Chamberlin’s FREEDOM 1-2-3 Plan to Eliminate Property Taxes in Florida | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12930169?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **Let’s Get Rid of Property Taxes!**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

During the 2023 special election for House District 24, I campaigned for and was elected on a platform of achieving property tax relief. **One of the first bills that I proposed after being elected was to move Florida toward the elimination of property taxes.** I also filed bills related to property tax relief in the 2025 Legislative Session.

**I firmly believe that now is the time to put Florida on the path to eliminating property taxes forever.** Many would argue that this can’t be done, and that there’s no way we can do it and still be able to fund our schools, public safety, and roads. **This is just not true, but there is a political risk for me or anyone else who rolls out an actual plan, because immediately, there are going to be those who organize opposition.** It’s easy to talk about doing something about property taxes without ever making any real progress, but I’m convinced that we must have a starting point. **We must have an initial plan that can be debated if we’re ever going to get something done.**

That’s why I rolled out a three-point plan on how to phase out property taxes in the state of Florida via a press conference on September 17.

**My plan, entitled FREEDOM 1-2-3, consists of three specific actions to create revenue to replace property taxes in Florida: One rollback, two transaction fees, and a 3-cent school funding fee on all transactions.**
---
| | **PROPERTY TAX PRESS CONFERENCE**
---
| [ ](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=679dd10e73&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| Please click above to watch my virtual press conference, where I officially unveiled my plan to eliminate property taxes in Florida.
---
| | **MY FREEDOM 1-2-3 PLAN**
---
| **1 – ROLLBACK:**
According to the Florida Department of Revenue, property tax revenues levied in the 2024-2025 totaled $55.05 Billion and are broken down as follows:

County Non-School Property Tax Levies: $21.58 Billion
County School Property Tax Levies: $21.45 Billion
Municipal Property Tax Levies: $8.52 Billion
Special District Property Tax Levies: $3.51 Billion

**MUNICIPAL** \- For now, I believe we can completely remove the idea of replacing municipal property tax levies. That is a decision for another day after solving the state’s part of the problem.

**SPECIAL DISTRICTS** \- I believe there are alternative ways to fund special districts. For instance, Water Management Districts could easily be funded with a fee on bottled water. Community Development Districts, Fire Control Districts, Park Districts, and Port and Inlet Districts can all be funded with other fees or consumption taxes.

My main focus for now is getting the state to a plan for completely replacing the $43 Billion in county non-school and school property tax levies. This plan consists of one rollback and a revenue replacement plan.

The rollback would move the state by legislation to the 2022-2023 property tax levies. The reason behind this is simple. The counties were not expecting this kind of increase, yet they’ve managed to spend it all. I am not trying to diminish inflation, but quadruple inflation on property taxes is just out of control. We’ve raised our property taxes by an average of 45% just in the last 4 years. I don’t believe we should roll back to 2020, but 2023 numbers are reasonable and doable. It would result in immediate relief and would move the total for replacement to as follows:

County Non-School Property Tax Levies: $17.41 Billion
County School Property Tax Levies: $17.05 Billion

**2 – TRANSACTION FEES:**
I am proposing the creation of a 5% transaction fee for all real estate sales. This would generate the first almost $12 Billion needed for non-school taxes. This 5% is a one-time fee in lieu of paying $3-5K per year and can be financed at closing. This one fee will lower the monthly payments for most homeowners by hundreds of dollars per month.

The second proposition is a public safety transaction fee of 5%. This would be a statewide fee applied to travel and tourism items like ride shares, hotel rooms, hospitality venues, and amusement parks.

This 5% safety surcharge could generate another $3.8 Billion in property tax relief and help fund safety for all travelers. Additionally, adding a 5% safety surcharge to sales of alcohol, tobacco, and medical marijuana could be considered as required to make up for any shortfall.

**3 – CENT SCHOOL SALES FEE:**
This would give the state approximately $20 Billion to completely help replace the school property taxes. The state already collects property taxes and redistributes them according to a per-pupil funding formula. This is not just a traditional increase in State Sales Tax since it does not go to general revenue. This is a replacement of what now is on the backs of homeowners. And we get the added benefit of the visitors coming into our state helping us fund it. This could be collected as a 2-cent statewide funding fee, and then every school district could have the option of levying up to 1 more cent to cover any gaps in state funding for schools. That way, some local control is maintained over taxation for schools.

Florida is already known as the freest state in the country, and we’ve been named as the top state economy in the nation. If we do this, no one will be able to touch us. And we will be the first state in the country to take a dramatic step toward eliminating the most hated tax in America.

---
| **Follow me on social media!**
---
| | | | | | [](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c204272069&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| | [](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=7460811567&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| | **FREEDOM 1-2-3 IN THE NEWS**
---
|
---
---
| My plan has garnered notable media coverage from various news publications across the state. Please visit the articles linked below:

Click Orlando: [_Florida lawmaker wants to eliminate property taxes. Here’s how_](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4b07ffd497&e=d1c1b9864f)

Florida Politics: [_Ryan Chamberlin rolls out plan to get rid of property taxes_](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=565546524e&e=d1c1b9864f)

Florida Phoenix: [_Noting ‘political risk,’ GOP House member reveals plan to cut property taxes_](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=8b314c18fe&e=d1c1b9864f)

Florida’s Voice: [_Rep. Chamberlin proposes ‘Freedom 1-2-3’ plan aiming to phase out property taxes in Florida_](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=6931fae82a&e=d1c1b9864f)

The Floridian: [_Rep. Chamberlin Outlines Plan to Eliminate Property Taxes in Florida_](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=737b209d64&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| I look forward to keeping you updated on my progress on this critical issue in the weeks and months to come. Let’s work together to get rid of property taxes!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
|
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=2396969bae) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=2396969bae).

---

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=1apjtn1vd0miq85c2nux59enub0hnwq3w46mvtr4j2pt5s604di7uiju5050rw1wrva9b37e9cwc3mfkkyoqlw5f09smc8gb133717tto7r35wm5zjx9nt1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h) [Mark as Spam](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2twat1cfj8xpaqpzcvdzw0hcqelshj2d70l0j4wgcofi5d9tf5i2ek756p54nkgjwpywd46u4gbyqbk7t5&__stmp=t3tnv8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2twat1cfj8xpaqpzcvdzw0hcqelshj2d70l0j4wgcofi5d9tf5i2ek756p54nkgjwpywd46u4gbyqbk7t5&__stmp=t3tnv8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=u3vjmpooycg0f1a8s5at6065rub8bh11lnz9wp1s5ji6fyfp5o5rzni1p0eeura8p5i6vjw5flhbmedfz0fwfn93qdinj93kfzc3yspbjam7g5k3in7tpl57zwvw3ckst4xhsyogkd1q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3tnv8&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I completely get it
body:
The opposite of most of what you’re reading.

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbj3og0fhs6mir1cpohm9tereo5mfuhmg1bis5t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjim6pj4c9h2bs)
---
Friend – You’re probably getting lots of emails asking for donations from politicians.
---
_But this email is a bit different._
---
Most of those other emails start off by asking YOU to donate and then guilt you into reaching for your wallet.
---
I refuse to play that game. Instead, I’m starting by telling you what _I’ve_ done.
---
**I personally put $2.5 MILLION toward saving our House Majority last cycle – __not__ for my own re-election or to defend myself from Soros prosecutors who were SUING me.**
---
_That was money to help conservative candidates WIN their toss-up battleground races!_
---
_Just like President Trump, I firmly believe elected officials need to put skin in the game._
---
_**If I’m going to ask you to give, then I better do it too!**_
---
Honest to God, if you cannot give right now, please don’t. You can just stop reading here.
---
[**_But if you can give, we’re going to need all of the help in the country we can get, because we’ve got an emergency on our hands._**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqlcjcfdmte2vf26j2pi711c9il6ru98deqa4sng_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjim6pj4c9h2bs)
---
**After losing back-to-back special elections, we’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the _bare_ _minimum_ _threshold_ to declare a Majority in the House!**
---
_And now even Obama is coming for our Achilles’ Heel – launching his _own_ $2.5 MILLION campaign to flip the House._
---
_**I’ll be honest with you: after we shifted funds away from my own campaign, we don’t have the funds necessary to stop Obama.**_
---
But with YOUR help right now, we can fight back and win.
---
We’re going to prove that here in America, elections are still decided by We the People.
---
[**So please, make a contribution, and together, let’s save the People’s House now that our majority is hanging by a thread.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znlgiochg96elu3m50kj8jkjhg46dotcmjr3s55o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjim6pj4c9h2bs)
---

---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn4u04eb1c6v1phae7fc8che6lh6f48pr0ugl7qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjim6pj4c9h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo5fp49hdnafscijuuqf180a41sjmmhnrf8mfod8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sjim6pj4c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Peter,
This past weekend, one of President Trump’s advisors made it clear what the Trump administration’s intentions are. I’ll let you read it for yourself:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116864557/574681016/-1899791616?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNlNTc4Zi02N2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ofVVl6dXpdBkGurw84D7q-MlupV5mXmbdO6RirCel8k=)

body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116865255/574683411/1981932150?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjMGU2NDQtNjhhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgsuxseVhkVx4PsP5PhsExfdXOCFJq1uB7_oNkg32uU=)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116865256/574683413/1733485174?refcode=em-10.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjMGU2NDQtNjhhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgsuxseVhkVx4PsP5PhsExfdXOCFJq1uB7_oNkg32uU=) Hi, David Hogg here, Parkland survivor and co-founder of Leaders We Deserve. **I'm reaching out to share the news that Leaders We Deserve has endorsed Randy Villegas in California's 22nd District.** **[I’ll explain why we are backing Randy, but first: Can you make a $3 donation right now to help Randy build a grassroots-powered campaign that can’t be ignored?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116865257/574683414/1733485174?refcode=em-10.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjMGU2NDQtNjhhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgsuxseVhkVx4PsP5PhsExfdXOCFJq1uB7_oNkg32uU=)** | | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116865258/574683415/1733485174?refcode=em-10.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjMGU2NDQtNjhhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgsuxseVhkVx4PsP5PhsExfdXOCFJq1uB7_oNkg32uU=)
---
When I first heard about Randy Villegas’s campaign, it reminded me why we started Leaders We Deserve in the first place.
Randy grew up in a working-class immigrant family in California’s Central Valley. His parents ran a small auto shop. They relied on Medicaid, food assistance, and public schools to get by.
He worked his way from that shop to earning a PhD, and now he’s running for Congress to fight for families like his own.
While establishment Republicans like his opponent David Valadao vote to gut Medicaid and hand out tax breaks to billionaires, Randy’s fighting for Medicare for All, affordable housing, and lower costs for families -- and he’s doing it without taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
That’s what real leadership looks like. Randy’s not a career politician -- he’s someone who’s lived the struggles he’s fighting to fix.
This is exactly the kind of next-generation leader we need in Congress -- someone who knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and still believe in a better future.
But this race could decide control of the House, and the GOP knows it. That’s why they’re flooding the district with corporate cash.
**[So I’m asking: will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help Randy Villegas flip CA-22 and bring real representation to his Central Valley community?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116865259/574683417/1733485174?refcode=em-10.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhjMGU2NDQtNjhhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgsuxseVhkVx4PsP5PhsExfdXOCFJq1uB7_oNkg32uU=)**

clean_body: | = = Hi, David Hogg here, Parkland survivor and co-founder of Leaders We Deserve. I'm reaching out to share the news that Leaders We Deserve has endorsed Randy Villegas in California's 22nd District. = | | = When I first heard about Randy Villegas’s campaign, it reminded me why we started Leaders We Deserve in the first place. Randy grew up in a working-class immigrant family in California’s Central Valley. His parents ran a small auto shop. They relied on Medicaid, food assistance, and public schools to get by. He worked his way from that shop to earning a PhD, and now he’s running for Congress to fight for families like his own. While establishment Republicans like his opponent David Valadao vote to gut Medicaid and hand out tax breaks to billionaires, Randy’s fighting for Medicare for All, affordable housing, and lower costs for families -- and he’s doing it without taking a dime of corporate PAC money. That’s what real leadership looks like. Randy’s not a career politician -- he’s someone who’s lived the struggles he’s fighting to fix. This is exactly the kind of next-generation leader we need in Congress -- someone who knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and still believe in a better future. But this race could decide control of the House, and the GOP knows it. That’s why they’re flooding the district with corporate cash. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. clean_body: cue Sarah McLachlan’s In the Arms of Angel | | | | | == | Peter, Pennsylvania's State Constitution requires that every ten years State Supreme Court Justices face a reelection vote. The three Democratic Justices responsible for the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme court are up for reelection this Nov. and MAGA has launched an unprecedented full scale assault on them to ensure they are removed. Their removal would mean a full GOP redistricting of the PA congressional map, a total abortion ban, and no accountability for MAGA vote rigging in 2026 and 2028. PA will go so far to the right it will be unrecognizable. | | == | | | | These three Democratic Justices are facing daily relentless attacks in the run up to their November 2025 retention election | | | | MAGA billionaires have started saturating Pennsylvania voters with attacks against these justices, telling vile lies like they "protect pedophiles." Democrats are getting massively outspent 10-1 and if the election were held today we would lose. We are on the brink of collapse. Sadly PA's rules of judicial ethics limits these justices from campaigning for themselves meaning they are completely defenseless in the face of the MAGA onslaught they are up against and they need our help 🥺🐶 cue Sarah McLachlan's In the Arms of Angel Defend Our Courts is one of the top Democratic organizations stepping up to save these justices and salvage this race. Time is running out, only 27 days remain until Election Day. == | | | | | == | | == | | | | == | | | | Thank you in advance for your support. We need you now more than ever. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: We missed our goal. Here’s what’s next.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
If anything, I’m more determined than ever to bounce back, stronger, faster, and louder than the Left could ever imagine. |
---
Fellow American,

I want to speak to you directly this morning — not as “Team Beth,” not as some polished campaign update — but as Beth.

We closed the books on our end-of-quarter deadline. I’ll be honest: we came up short of what my finance team expected.

That stings. Because I know how much was riding on those numbers. Reporters, party insiders, and, yes, even my opponents will dissect our report when it comes out — line by line — and look for weaknesses.

And to make matters worse, **we’re now on day 6 of the Democrat shutdown** — all because the Left is demanding billions in taxpayer dollars to fund **free healthcare for illegal immigrants** in places like **California, Illinois, and New York** while hardworking Texans are left waiting for answers.

You can bet they’ll use this shutdown to score political points — but here in Texas, we’re focused on getting Washington working again for the people who actually pay the bills.

But here’s the truth: campaigns aren’t won or lost in one deadline. [**They’re won by how we _respond_.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f311080133be4a09b7477ea70d56c26d&_e=2zSzMIAcD-4CrCq0NQ-reG_fcqWanJAkG3h2DFBBRQ-B-cetPidwRlvITROqaUTLA3U4EjlMzOVS9AxRzcOvEY0Gl2e9a9RRtCiVbY2fuSlkn0o1bblKW9o7vbXqGMjRsTK22P0IpGLHnW_ar5QNgwf0Rz51YTU7E9XCdVZ8yfd0Zzax2bBwZIs2HmyKj9eV9n4keg9MDarO_O8TpZW1xkHeqDKmR9ePy3pyIoPIxv4YnLVPZKCOGEMfjN90tXKb8a4bCIH5zGhil_GRZ-BpA2MEaIMxKAMLA9CdKaOeCxR4To_ucAz7MROri4yTg1qob6C2NQNyjVbENNmsJizsufi5OXgOmqCckEKrlIG0G4lfzzjn8uJVlNvN4c54qbEi4JugpduYSA7jJvu06cGVFPBUMjtZt4trFWvHOiGxWie-eW0LCAysqgPNgY3qMXdSK5SlVa18JtzTu6g4I7wDFKlokUYS0w8-0BzxCafDehLW-YqQpMjGIvkaKrhmxnI68cptk_OCEWQ0O827A1fvFaHZkC54q_uHbHam4DISJagbM07NYiUuB6FVGSQSgf8XHnNpzUmmqb6y5N_NjpQIOn054b0MHFLAad2S_jZy52B1bdbUNA_2byVD1MKN2JrUF4KpvoO-43u_lGePbC6kE5PByMKy7QhzTZ3Wo8ABsSnqLQBQZnclbTG0JRm8OKFj3FOVLgzsq-nfPLS1BUe5mZeVoOIdedcYU9akpwk5Wm10AAAGwVn-uKKlo7JOaGqX)

Here’s what I can say, fellow American: I’m not discouraged, and I’m certainly not backing down. **If anything, I’m more determined than ever to bounce back, stronger, faster, and louder than the Left could ever imagine.**

[**I need your help to make that happen. If we can show a surge today — the very first day of this new quarter — it sends an unmistakable message that our campaign — this district — is still unshakable.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f311080133be4a09b7477ea70d56c26d&_e=2zSzMIAcD-4CrCq0NQ-reG_fcqWanJAkG3h2DFBBRQ-B-cetPidwRlvITROqaUTLA3U4EjlMzOVS9AxRzcOvEY0Gl2e9a9RRtCiVbY2fuSlkn0o1bblKW9o7vbXqGMjRsTK22P0IpGLHnW_ar5QNgwf0Rz51YTU7E9XCdVZ8yfd0Zzax2bBwZIs2HmyKj9eV9n4keg9MDarO_O8TpZW1xkHeqDKmR9ePy3pyIoPIxv4YnLVPZKCOGEMfjN90tXKb8a4bCIH5zGhil_GRZ-BpA4BYuEO5Gc0UkktPQHRN8tBX5izuyjj0zMTop6WSnteFh-bCpfhfLVPANDeSSGXFZeGph-q1WAdxpIC9ZZ8id1m_hWFgxDiZ9fmtmI-HBSenQVOOzbNjJ53dS3XlBy4a1H2kje3ljhBTu8ICu1oy0U0Ln3HoNSrMx1EqvBuNB1TzgwvR0B7ADsM2FqMHYXu4e24m_-6_Mk1GY4nFofEj7RJXuVC0Dr8LXXo_CXqDsXPK7ASlC8T7pyCM_bjOxozHyzfoj5zXO-oS3kBTWUOC7c-la3DOMPRzPeHrAKzRvTCTcW4f-AwA8VhPwXQ_oYN-ULHsWbPgBrfby2EmIaixTDGbz3yjnTZuktPEWu_QC9jLd2L_nKTbaJAncoDL4Oz1Q9C1l1MF_-TvPBepOCU5mhtxKzZaJHNd614WYS_Kb9Q-TYHSaP8jImmIUODY52l_4r6q_HB0y3yuOG1Hg4ukeopkdq2gOzFbmjqVEdDnt7oW)

The Left would love to say this campaign is slipping. The same Democrats who caused this shutdown want to paint Republicans as the problem — but we’re the only ones standing up for taxpayers and border security. Let’s prove them wrong.

Thank you,

Beth
Sent from my iPhone

| | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This is my story.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7ec5b45e58484e908abbd9a26703d2e9&_e=vTvKk4sY6iFDvUjZy9ZcvltakoiD_4PlzhTyyd2izWDg9IpIJLxcAiYbGkWeiCpAjNjkFhriUmV8b7to8ZmhJ24OA9MUpKHMP_wx1fcdNhysolAgiVGPLsb2zl0ugX4ceaCjneOTX8BOH6Bwg3IwO6IWAYIJUFKx476kf3J7u6vGM2D6P9UcoO-RIC6x1MNaCUnQK4QlP576po-P9BTSI_03aoaSxOJZEyP6FE09sl35lNB0s2trb6R5ce42lydMgLhNs5MDVHWTxOGt5hAMCV-o1GBpgpmnL6oDl4kPd7mE1_9XpIoj4qpqGvTbdDtmt51SR1WC87gn0XAL_pT_P2-xr0i2lmmz-BXTw944aBYuD71I2SkhYUhFUxhidKteioC_16SsWin_jdq3d34Hu6Me7DTWWWCsU121VzmDQ8a7roXvniO63Ak_bpFPKsCYK7PNNwWLZa4INq58AznBkPrDLEJAcqO5koK2kt04-Izi1AVNAl041CNtuI5GSK2JLx8wlhdlc7z3Jb8_erJaU9elKDc2uyBa9tmbhz_qVyx09_k3lLE7Mj6lw1R84LPDUaajHnI0h3rqT_g_L9JBVyNO3rMLk5KWuGqMmAihik9enkFigNIzzD9Yu7NtHhk9BF-4ySYCt7_CxzzS1xwGq_ZEy8ZCjDJlNAJyUrjSZZw%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7ec5b45e58484e908abbd9a26703d2e9&_e=vTvKk4sY6iFDvUjZy9ZcvltakoiD_4PlzhTyyd2izWDg9IpIJLxcAiYbGkWeiCpAjNjkFhriUmV8b7to8ZmhJ24OA9MUpKHMP_wx1fcdNhysolAgiVGPLsb2zl0ugX4ceaCjneOTX8BOH6Bwg3IwO6IWAYIJUFKx476kf3J7u6vGM2D6P9UcoO-RIC6x1MNaCUnQK4QlP576po-P9BTSI_03aoaSxOJZEyP6FE09sl0skKN2A-y-0mX1mdyW-VD0pGuUVym6Beh3yWiBcfXKjfziJ0XmfWqqw0GTyZTxtbBPU_rnc7iVL0rwFCkZ38ArYRXN_mju_S0IH-m1B2vdYpgG546POeW7O5FNjcA3T5POZP4uaPJwe5SVyg00dDOeQDx0Yhs5AB3FYjFi_GsOfDGfNnTpYYuw3xWOiDCVgayNsS6aKL94y-Jarfk8zFUxl74F38RmFYKAaQIfbiFRerriCbbcfHwr7C-1TLeT84jH33pr4PeVJPYL2iT-U1wvK0g9QKHNYp1-RTQwZBbfg_CubH2MiH7ILFDPDp37_iA3mQuJFQfoa-4NqCLg7LTvlpbCpCO2E_OpnN5NAYnVOx8_JMtKBJ2ZHQd24B8iSgHftjIz9c9CB8y2FhbHNzObb2W_ULCFbYCnxVbRyjwO9lK4q0dfVt2hJg9f5G9oabs%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7ec5b45e58484e908abbd9a26703d2e9&_e=vTvKk4sY6iFDvUjZy9ZcvltakoiD_4PlzhTyyd2izWDg9IpIJLxcAiYbGkWeiCpAjNjkFhriUmV8b7to8ZmhJ24OA9MUpKHMP_wx1fcdNhysolAgiVGPLsb2zl0ugX4ceaCjneOTX8BOH6Bwg3IwO6IWAYIJUFKx476kf3J7u6vGM2D6P9UcoO-RIC6x1MNaCUnQK4QlP576po-P9BTSI_03aoaSxOJZEyP6FE09sl1Cttz-tnBTMNEYpLI4XaMflifoSxGrjeB5v4tjTDZSpqTJ7JRT_RzR61gaJwPR_4Hg5Jn4wW00IGxK1_OwC3fl3NnqrM5DX32Ax0B-3QJKWCBlwwyM0W-SaoAMbjHpHAFMW7NYfeZvh5Prncw-Uv_LOZcOhMLXTMCnL5Ex-dEoN114O5fmGgR7F655zIwkdCJo1zfkVhoRoIvK5OWvgp7w27EedvgPYr4K_OwM2sZjZtNpa-fcoHT_XaPTYQxjRFOLs5HW6rajMUbldNh9bqPKbhLrP3gu7TcFXT8N6BH5MDXFziGG7dA3YK4AyMPIEwV_5iUc6IJnzkdwpsODpKg3sfcTconqmkU1kTk2HMiiERZmCU3ZCa1V0wf1HnIlLqhR454P_td7R76P4WSkaSr4bMcuUjnrvDYGFtbNZMWsLKbSlYsOViOsepmTYvka21U%3D)**

| [**CONTRIBUTE HERE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7ec5b45e58484e908abbd9a26703d2e9&_e=vTvKk4sY6iFDvUjZy9ZcvltakoiD_4PlzhTyyd2izWDg9IpIJLxcAiYbGkWeiCpAjNjkFhriUmV8b7to8ZmhJ24OA9MUpKHMP_wx1fcdNhysolAgiVGPLsb2zl0ugX4ceaCjneOTX8BOH6Bwg3IwO6IWAYIJUFKx476kf3J7u6vGM2D6P9UcoO-RIC6x1MNaCUnQK4QlP576po-P9BTSI_03aoaSxOJZEyP6FE09sl0z3QdAquSxg6RmpApkoXAM8tuQuOu_efd_3PSXxrCc00WA0haayetItYNQOC1WuB5qOjxO--gMs8eh1KOccb-XfQwENVFZu5EuU6A4x-mgJHlCDfP4DBgyDhi1Apj0rE2Bec0wL5OUshYgAmtLoFI4WfEru6BI_8ye8ARYcCpumYd7tfnmJjV6z9wPPLRnG39juaHd970Efih6_gQuKLuKG9pQ6zuV1WhgY1ZNXPG-hrCNtKKFlcdpsWpDhvjZfRb5LmL_yFpn2i-PSg8awpRSyu4FwUKeXiTZaKEsTRLI2xG3PLM3KT1e-h8TmmfVYNqObnjS9bWX_HXFlP33WZm0WZIp7YEfkIuO2jTejdAbuDVSM820EZJ5933stnpZD3HG23Y4qVbe5zLFCpvtXPZ0B0j2L2uZZn_kiZWgwWkUTPSJz10CZi3h9fktljuDrvQ%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. **I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges – unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games.**
I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families — they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face.
I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans.
**That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games.**
But all our progress is on the line in this election.
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report_ , Larry Sabato’s _Crystal Ball,_ and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a**pure toss-up. **
It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but **TWO** of my *three* GOP opponents.
But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**
[So please: Split a donation between me and Yassamin and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116866886/574689127/-1981658856?amount=&refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Q4M2FmMS02OWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3jcQ3Mbd6MmqP-h3mdubmXWIMlk6qxX5MTwMiXMMLI=)
