clean_body: Our work to keep moving Arizona forward has only just begun, and the stakes in this race are sky-high. | = Peter, it’s Katie. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for re-election as governor of Arizona. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Yassamin Ansari and Katie Hobbs will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges – unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games. I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families — they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face. I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans. That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games. But all our progress is on the line in this election. Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the Cook Political Report , Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and Inside Elections have already called this race apure toss-up. It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but TWO of my three GOP opponents. But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: You. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Yassamin Ansari and Katie Hobbs will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Let’s get to work! — Katie Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

subject: BRICS is dismantling the dollar—are your savings safe?
body:

# When Everything You've Worked For Is at Risk, There's Only One Move That Makes Sense...
**The debt is exploding. The dollar is shrinking. And seniors are going back to work just to survive.** Dear Friends, Imagine waking up one morning and realizing that everything you thought was safe... isn’t. Your savings, your retirement accounts, even the value of the dollar in your wallet—it’s all being quietly eroded. You’ve already seen the warning signs:
* **$37 trillion in national debt** —and growing by a trillion every hundred days.
* Inflation making it harder and harder to stretch a dollar.
* **Bank of America confirming** the dollar has already lost **10.7% of its value this year**.
* Banks failing, BRICS rising, and the global stage shifting against America.

And now? **Senior citizens across the country are being forced out of retirement—back to work—because they can no longer live on what they saved.** Let me ask you: _Will you wait until it’s your turn? Or will you decide—right now—that your future deserves protection?_ Here’s what you can do immediately: pick up the phone and call **Monetary Gold** [ (888) 411-GOLD (4653)](tel:888-411-4653). We’ll show you a simple, proven strategy to shift part of your paper assets into **gold and silver** —real money that has held its value for thousands of years. When markets crash, when dollars collapse, when banks fail... gold and silver don’t. They remain. They protect. They secure. Every day you wait, uncertainty rises... but right now, you can choose differently. name: David Hogg
subject: This is the biggest primary fight we’ve taken on yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Leaders We Deserve is endorsing Justin Pearson for Congress.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251008-1&t=1&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)
Peter,
This is the biggest primary fight we’ve taken on yet — and I need you in it with us.
**Today, I’m proud to announce that Leaders We Deserve is endorsing Justin J. Pearson for Congress. Justin is a tested fighter who will deliver opportunity, affordability, safety, and justice to his constituents once he’s in Washington.**
**_And we’re backing him with a $1 million investment to win his race._**
**[If you’re ready to elect new leaders like Justin who will step up and lead in this critical moment, will you make a $5 contribution to his campaign right now?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251008_1_justinpearson.Fs15hp&refcode=em20251008-2727&amount=5&t=3&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251008_1_justinpearson.Fs15hp&refcode=em20251008-2727&amount=5&t=4&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)
Here’s why we’re backing Justin in this race:
**Justin isn’t just the real deal. He’s the future.**
He’s the student who demanded better textbooks for his classmates. The activist who led a people-powered movement that beat two billion-dollar oil companies to protect Memphis’s water. The state legislator who stood on the House floor demanding action after a school shooting — and got expelled for speaking out.
_And then got reelected with 94% of the vote._
Justin is everything we talk about when we talk about the leaders we deserve.
He’s bold, unbought, and unafraid to take on the toughest fights — whether it’s Big Oil, the gun lobby, or political cowardice. We need his leadership in Congress.
But here’s the catch: **He’s challenging a 9-term incumbent Democrat.**
Now, I respect Congressman Steve Cohen. He’s served Memphis for decades. But this moment demands new leadership. It demands someone who doesn’t just remember how things used to be — but can imagine what they need to become.
Justin J. Pearson is that leader.
And if we want him to win, we have to make sure he has the resources to go up against entrenched power. We’re committing $1 million, so that’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you donate $5 now to help Justin launch his campaign today?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251008_1_justinpearson.Fs15hp&refcode=em20251008-2727&amount=5&t=5&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251008_1_justinpearson.Fs15hp&amount=5&refcode=em20251008-2727&t=24&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)**
Our generation has been told to wait our turn. But every day we wait, people keep dying in classrooms, corporations keep poisoning communities, and politicians keep failing to meet the moment. Justin J. Pearson isn’t waiting. And neither are we.
**Let’s go make history.**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251008-1&t=25&refcode2=2727_587540_B_FkHf&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2727%2E587540%2EB_FkHf)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m standing shoulder to shoulder with impacted workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Friend,

The impacts of the government shutdown are already being felt far and wide – and unlike the Republican majority in Congress, I’m not turning my back.

Earlier this week, I rallied with AFLCIO along with American Federal of Government Employees (AFGE) Local 2192 and AFSCME. These are frontline workers at the TSA, VA, Social Security Administration, and more.

Our veterans, seniors, and working families will feel the most pain and disruption because of the Republican-led shutdown. Critical services are being interrupted, and thousands will be furloughed or go without pay, all because the GOP won’t come to the table.

This was my message to President Trump and Republicans in Congress: fix your manufactured healthcare crisis and fund the government for the American people.

I stand with the thousands of impacted workers and families during this shutdown, not only as a Member of Congress, but the proud product of a Union family. It’s why I am refusing to be paid during the shutdown – because Congress should play by the same rules as the people they represent.

Thank you,

Nikki

https://www.facebook.com/NikkiforCongress/?
https://www.instagram.com/nikkibudzinski/?
https://twitter.com/NikkiBudzinski?

Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. Chip in to Nikki's campaign today.

To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: NikkiForCongress.com [https://nikkiforcongress.com/?]
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to unsubscribe: https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/p/e8jmxCqJNkS72mawkeDcaA2?unsubscribedata=k1hbLWwDigdYOIamdEiU7400SjOaBlVV7A1fBwz1C5ZjcdNrVt9afmmowIiEr%2BPsEdsfj1QSCKpEvg4CnJfHD%2Bcdylq6XMqUobjSpI7c4bpf9LlQt4YIh37wcbIY4Oqocbk5Wx3ufc%2FukPtjSwogfUn7r844i9zcrFUw98h2AKRqIwdvEqhWbHlge0A858hu82opvtpOXJZmMpcXszEpM4f4dOafcTDWbhbYO7dOY7w4Fg6SIM%2FEqVVY6rBq0JSlm74Ee%2F0Y0gSgl6Kjo6cFTchTcLNHm9MLODeX6F%2FZ4e9ACsUwGjAI951Kh64rim6l9jn2x8DN2kA0NyGgx%2BqU9%2FSbFTy3c%2FuWjmxjZo0Tic6hfUXJ1B%2Fpv0suxiOrYxv8gBG4ME6G%2Fp6RZToQqTM4VWb7EJKmnK59agqXbK%2BspVvMwInwHFnQs07ITxxiuxfJ .

This was my message to President Trump and Republicans in Congress: fix your manufactured healthcare crisis and fund the government for the American people. I stand with the thousands of impacted workers and families during this shutdown, not only as a Member of Congress, but the proud product of a Union family. It’s why I am refusing to be paid during the shutdown – because Congress should play by the same rules as the people they represent. Thank you, Nikki ? ? ? Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. Chip in to Nikki's campaign today. To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: NikkiForCongress.com [?] We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to unsubscribe: . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: One week in: federal government shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
It’s been one week since the government shutdown began, and I am sorry to report from Washington that there is no end yet in sight.
House Republicans are blaming Democrats every chance they get and, at the same time, refusing to talk with Democrats to reopen the government and protect Americans’ health care. We can, and must, be able to protect Americans' health care and fund the government.
Republicans control the House, the Senate, and White House. They have not only the ability but the responsibility to end this government shutdown—as they did to prevent it in the first place—by putting a bill on the floor of the House and the Senate that has the votes to pass. It’s that simple.
Speaker Johnson, President Trump and others continue to try to say this is the fault of Democrats, but they are completely in charge. If they want to end the shutdown, they can.
First, they need to get back to Washington and get to work. But sadly, they are instead making false claims about what is (and is not) happening. You may have heard them saying that Democrats caused the shutdown to expand health care for undocumented immigrants. That’s simply not true. Under longstanding federal law, undocumented immigrants are not eligible for federally funded health care coverage. There is a lot of this kind of bad information floating around, getting us nowhere.
It doesn’t have to be this way. Texans and all Americans deserve a government that works for them, not against them. I’ve been in Washington with my House Democratic colleagues ready to work to solve these and other problems. And one of the things that we can do to help try to solve the problem is make sure that we have a new House Speaker in 2027, and that Democrats control the House of Representatives.
Thanks for your help in that effort, and for all you continue to do for our work together and for our country.
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe251008?refcode=lpfe251008]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=YCm3K%2FQIwGn3xNPiKRXoOACFPSTGQd2fODdCeTrQ7a%2BnAe9t2jGKbu8Jy82PLUdumuP2xxA0Wfi6iD9yZECwu1hzsyHlj%2BTg1NI4NHTE%2FEBl3caTKazvnOfmEcG7bSp95H4su7x65tDikV23oxlr%2BRYHbYJZffNMieF2cFzDV5FI9rMWkcTj65odpyQLuMqYA4D4%2FnkECXUiG%2FjgOkW7EKeBD5ITQJpJj9hv6O5SDMjoJOR0iDtwnBKUvKqio%2Fmz4B4aZe862oAI3dhJC26ypHz6PcVW5z2S%2B9%2BXK2EWdV%2BT%2F2kYzfnlH1VkHXtCkmBI2QNVkZ%2Bgm%2BAl2QVGCSqe1UK7YgTV2r%2FP%2BJVeldPS%2B9tLGC2UYvC10RFwbR2IIpnsUJSsRInDzk%2F1FdYkIipHBsd1eGMnvvHYpAWQpjpL8GXH5kI2QNNXZuKtdrh%2BP5R6 www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

clean_body: He’s the fighter we need Sen. Jim Banks: Split a donation with Tom Cotton to keep the seat red. | | This is Navy veteran and new U.S. Senator for Indiana, Jim Banks. I’m coming to you about my friend and fellow veteran, Tom Cotton. Tom is the leader of the new generation of America First conservatives in the Senate. He backed my campaign to the hilt last year, and I’m proud to stand with him this year. Take it from me: We need Tom Cotton back in the Senate to keep putting America First. Tom is fighting with me to build an economy for working Americans, to keep our border secure, and to get illegal immigrants out of our country. President Trump fully supports Tom Cotton, and so do I. He won’t let you down, but he needs your help to win his race and keep fighting for America First. For a lasting Senate Majority, Sen. Jim Banks Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: BREAKING: We’re endorsing Justin J. Pearson in TN-09!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Breaking news, Peter:

Today, Justice Democrats is proud to endorse our third 2026 Democratic
primary challenger: State Rep. Justin J. Pearson for Congress in
Tennessee’s 9th district!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-1-jp.W_KMA8&refcode=em20251008-37088&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37088%2E1203867%2EryMO4H ]Justice Democrats 2026 endorsed: Justin J. Pearson for U.S. Congress,
TN-09. DONATE

Justin is the second-youngest member of the Tennessee General Assembly
after being elected to serve as the State Representative for District 86
in Memphis when he was 28 years old — and he’s already making an
impressive impact.

You may remember Justin as one of the Tennessee lawmakers expelled from
office by Republicans for bravely protesting gun violence on the House
floor following a tragic mass school shooting in 2023.

Now, Justin is ready to take his courage and lived experience to Congress
to give the people of Memphis a bold, new leader willing to fight for them
in the face of worsening oligarchy and fascism.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-1-jp.W_KMA8&refcode=em20251008-37088&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37088%2E1203867%2EryMO4H ]Let’s set Justin up for success from Day 1: Will you pitch in right now
to become a founding donor of his progressive, working-class campaign?

Long before Justin became a state representative and made a name for
himself as one of the “Tennessee Three,” he fought to improve lives in his
community since the age of 15. He understands their needs and struggles
because he’s lived them.

Born and raised in Memphis to teenage parents who eventually became a
preacher and a teacher, Justin grew up in a redlined community
overburdened by pollution and held back by economic disenfranchisement. As
a teenager, he saw his high school go underfunded and fought for his
classmates at Mitchell High to receive new textbooks at the bare minimum.

After college, Justin returned to Memphis during the pandemic and
co-founded Memphis Community Against Pollution in 2020, an environmental
and climate justice nonprofit. He led the victorious fight against two
billion-dollar oil companies from building a pipeline that would threaten
Memphis’ pristine groundwater and take land from his neighbors, some of
whose property has been in their family since the abolition of slavery in
1865.

Justin has continued his work for environmental justice to this day, as he
currently fights alongside his community to protect Memphis families from
the toxic pollution and economic exploitation caused by billionaire Elon
Musk’s xAI data centers.

This young, energetic, and passionate leader could have given up when
Republicans expelled him during his first weeks in office, but that’s not
Justin. Instead, he was reinstated and won back his seat in a special
election three months later, amassing nearly 94 percent of the vote, and
was re-elected last November.

That is exactly the kind of fighter the Democratic Party needs in Congress
— not an absent, career politician on autopilot while Trump’s National
Guard takes over Memphis, like current TN-09 Rep. Steve Cohen.

Memphis deserves a warrior for justice and a champion for democracy who
not only understands the struggles of his working-class, majority-Black
district firsthand but also has the energy and proven track record of
organizing, mobilizing, and activating people power.

It’s never easy going up against an incumbent, especially one who’s been
in political office for over 40 years! But Justin is taking up the
challenge and meeting the moment for his community and his country, and I
know that with the support of our movement, he will WIN.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-1-jp.W_KMA8&refcode=em20251008-37088&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37088%2E1203867%2EryMO4H ]Rush $5 or more today to kick this campaign off strong

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Breaking news, Peter: Today, Justice Democrats is proud to endorse our third 2026 Democratic primary challenger: State Rep. Justin J. Pearson for Congress in Tennessee’s 9th district! [ ]Justice Democrats 2026 endorsed: Justin J. Pearson for U.S. Congress, TN-09. DONATE Justin is the second-youngest member of the Tennessee General Assembly after being elected to serve as the State Representative for District 86 in Memphis when he was 28 years old — and he’s already making an impressive impact. You may remember Justin as one of the Tennessee lawmakers expelled from office by Republicans for bravely protesting gun violence on the House floor following a tragic mass school shooting in 2023. Now, Justin is ready to take his courage and lived experience to Congress to give the people of Memphis a bold, new leader willing to fight for them in the face of worsening oligarchy and fascism. [ ]Let’s set Justin up for success from Day 1: Will you pitch in right now to become a founding donor of his progressive, working-class campaign? Long before Justin became a state representative and made a name for himself as one of the “Tennessee Three,” he fought to improve lives in his community since the age of 15. He understands their needs and struggles because he’s lived them. Born and raised in Memphis to teenage parents who eventually became a preacher and a teacher, Justin grew up in a redlined community overburdened by pollution and held back by economic disenfranchisement. As a teenager, he saw his high school go underfunded and fought for his classmates at Mitchell High to receive new textbooks at the bare minimum. After college, Justin returned to Memphis during the pandemic and co-founded Memphis Community Against Pollution in 2020, an environmental and climate justice nonprofit. He led the victorious fight against two billion-dollar oil companies from building a pipeline that would threaten Memphis’ pristine groundwater and take land from his neighbors, some of whose property has been in their family since the abolition of slavery in 1865. Justin has continued his work for environmental justice to this day, as he currently fights alongside his community to protect Memphis families from the toxic pollution and economic exploitation caused by billionaire Elon Musk’s xAI data centers. This young, energetic, and passionate leader could have given up when Republicans expelled him during his first weeks in office, but that’s not Justin. Instead, he was reinstated and won back his seat in a special election three months later, amassing nearly 94 percent of the vote, and was re-elected last November. That is exactly the kind of fighter the Democratic Party needs in Congress — not an absent, career politician on autopilot while Trump’s National Guard takes over Memphis, like current TN-09 Rep. Steve Cohen. Memphis deserves a warrior for justice and a champion for democracy who not only understands the struggles of his working-class, majority-Black district firsthand but also has the energy and proven track record of organizing, mobilizing, and activating people power. It’s never easy going up against an incumbent, especially one who’s been in political office for over 40 years! But Justin is taking up the challenge and meeting the moment for his community and his country, and I know that with the support of our movement, he will WIN. [ ]Rush $5 or more today to kick this campaign off strong and give working-class communities in Memphis the representation they deserve. [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Norma Shulman and Bill Galvin
subject: We Need Your Help to Make Election Day Voter Registration a Reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
It was great to see you at the convention, and thank you to everyone who answered our call for help to bring Election Day Voter Registration to Massachusetts!
We are reaching out again to ask for your help. With many outdoor events, upcoming town and ward committee meetings, local elections, and rallies scheduled over the next few weeks in October, there are plenty of great opportunities to gather signatures.
Can you help?
Visit our New Website [www.electiondayvoterregistration.com]
You’ll find contact information, detailed petition instructions, and guidelines on how best to collect signatures.
We appreciate your help — get your clipboards ready, and let’s make this happen!
Thank you,
Norma Shulman and Bill Galvin
To make it as easy as possible for you to get involved, we’ve attached a
printable version of the official petition to this email. Because ballot
question petitions must be signed on paper, not electronically, you can
use this PDF to start collecting signatures right away from registered
voters in your city or town. Please read below for a full message and
detailed instructions on how to properly print, collect and submit
petitions in accordance with Massachusetts election law. Following
these steps carefully is essential to ensure that every signature counts.
Prefer to pick up or get mailed hard copies instead?
We have a limited supply of printed petition sheets available for pick-up at the Massachusetts Democratic Party office. To schedule a time to collect them—or if you’d prefer to have petitions mailed to you—please email us at organizing@massdems.org .
Every signature brings us closer to making Massachusetts a national leader in voter access. Let’s work together to make sure every eligible voter has the freedom to register and vote on Election Day.
Access to Petition in PDF Format [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JpIPxAcZ0isl3EN-zUDcLtPjIE9ErdQy/view]
The Massachusetts Constitution is very strict about these petitions, so please
follow these instructions to make sure signatures can be counted:
DO:
1) Print the petition on white, letter-sized paper.
2) Print the petition double-sided .
3) Sign your name in the signature column and write your address in the column
next to it.
4) Sign as legibly as possible and make sure the address matches where you’re
registered to vote.
5) Write the name of your city or town in the box at the bottom of the page, and
encourage other voters registered in your community to sign the same sheet as
well.
6) Collect signatures using separate sheets for voters registered in different cities
and towns.
DON’T:
1) Do not alter the petition in any way.
2) Do not scribble, highlight, underline, or make any other marks on the petition.
3) Do not test pens on the petition. No coffee or food stains. NO STRAY
MARKS!
4) Do not write anything on the petition outside of the signature lines or the
boxes for writing the city/town.
5) Do not print the two sides of the petition on two sheets of paper.
6) Do not staple anything to the petition.
7) Do not collect signatures from voters registered in different cities or towns on
the same sheet.
When you’re finished with a sheet for a city or town, please submit it to the
local election official as early as possible . Petitions need to go to the clerk or
election office at the city or town hall where the signatures are gathered. For
example, sheets with signatures from Springfield voters go to the Springfield
Election Commission, while Plymouth signatures go to the Plymouth Town Clerk.
These petitions need to be submitted to local election offices no later than 5 p.m.
on Wednesday, November 19, 2025 , but please deliver or mail your completed
petitions as soon as you complete a sheet for a city or town or at least a week
before this deadline.
If you’re not sure where to submit your petitions, please email us at organizing@massdems.org for help or mail them no later than November 3rd to:
Petition Y
444 Washington St.
Brighton, MA 02135
Access to Petition in PDF Format [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JpIPxAcZ0isl3EN-zUDcLtPjIE9ErdQy/view]
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/kaPRTc7b2EuhMpLt4_5XZQ2?unsubscribedata=2p09HkLPbfQJ9wUD%2FxFxsnNP8QT%2F9mTCscdZXC2jS2vYDEK4ztcMXhlC6lkLCTN3529RsTQDU9DKyfAnwPNEpCuVULn5tqaUOe%2F7zl%2F7jXYDyq4lu9JMlyXtVLfNv%2BFt1WaKmZorb9uHE9GqSBYS96hyFkeVY%2FB4OMDlcIG7NZ%2BYRazzGVu88e0YXU%2FUU%2FnmkjSwBj3PeRR7cR7UrLCycqJB4VK7Kct8sJfedeSeUElHGjLQBhWouJ1WWwl7hA%2B8Nm9aL2IqAOBYgJk45aoeaU7XRqTgvEKr7mzLDkBzGiTCE3cLdA5AM%2BD7JD%2BrqhJd3fVBttjVJwo0hGIj3NKedRRXkh6uCmyvuS5K5v0KSvjKHb9pb3nSNufYF1BMwDE%2Ba8KxwEPa1ee%2FbFG69UpouOD5CU836yihgFs65%2FrX1UabIST%2BBYu9ys91iftmmpbM .

body:
As I see it, our campaign has become a beacon of hope.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116867977/574692612/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-08_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjZjN2M4MjgtNmRhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5JjoRCZqNc0sv4I0e8Go1hcYPZFudddlTtQ-G7ciL2I=)
Peter, I'd like to take a moment to share my thoughts ahead of the debate.
As I see it, our campaign has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history. There is no other candidate running to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
And can I be honest? _That places a lot of weight on my shoulders._
_But I'm ready to seize the moment tomorrow._ And with you by my side for these next four weeks — giving $25 or whatever you can to emails like this one — we won't just win this November. We'll win big and set an example for the entire nation to follow for years to come.
[_**Peter, I can't do it without you! Will you contribute $25 or even more to my campaign for Governor today, before I take the debate stage? We've set an ambitious fundraising goal so we can close the budget gap and stay on track to flip Virginia blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116867979/574692615/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-08_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjZjN2M4MjgtNmRhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5JjoRCZqNc0sv4I0e8Go1hcYPZFudddlTtQ-G7ciL2I=)

clean_body: As I see it, our campaign has become a beacon of hope. = Peter, I'd like to take a moment to share my thoughts ahead of the debate. As I see it, our campaign has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history. There is no other candidate running to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. And can I be honest? That places a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I'm ready to seize the moment tomorrow. And with you by my side for these next four weeks — giving $25 or whatever you can to emails like this one — we won't just win this November. We'll win big and set an example for the entire nation to follow for years to come. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Trevor Dolan, Evergreen
subject: Trump wants to let polluters off the hook
body:
Speak out against this dangerous proposal, friend
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069612/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| Trump’s EPA wants to eliminate the Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program—a vital tool that helps tackle climate pollution by collecting data on how much companies are currently emitting.

[**Sign onto our comment now to tell Trump that dangerous pollution doesn’t go away when you stop counting it.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069613/87SdQ4wZ) [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069614/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi Friend,

As the government shutdown continues to drag on, more and more of us are going to feel the impact: from higher bills and dirtier air to cuts to food assistance and other essential services that families depend on.

And make no mistake, this is all part of Trump’s larger scheme to destroy every part of the federal government that doesn’t directly enrich him and his cronies.

**The latest proposal from Trump’s Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is just another way to hurt working Americans while shielding polluters from any responsibility.**

That’s because Trump’s EPA is proposing to end the **Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program (GHGRP)** —a vital system that tracks climate pollution from the United States’ biggest emitters.

Without it, we’ll lose a critical tool for tracking progress on climate, holding major polluters accountable, and making data-informed decisions to protect public health.

[**EPA is accepting public comments on this proposal until November 3, and we’ve put one together calling on them NOT to repeal the GHGRP. Will you sign on in support?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069615/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069616/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Closing down the GHGRP would severely limit access to unbiased information on pollution in communities across the country—a move that advances the Trump administration’s imperative, backed by the oil and gas industry, to undermine any attempts to combat the climate crisis.

**It’s erasing data _and_ accountability.**

As we continue to see more record-breaking heat waves, unpredictable storms, and destructive wildfires, the public has a right to know how much dangerous, planet-warming pollution is being emitted by large industries. [**Add your name to our public comment now!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069617/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SIGN ON](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069618/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for all that you do, |
---
| | |
---
### Trevor Dolan
Senior Policy Lead, Industry & Workforce
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4069619/87SdQ4wZ)
---

body:
Last night in Tulsa at Sheridan.Church, we had an incredible time discussing all things: Israel, the Bible and more. It was a blast to have Erick Sta
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13204.1.cf48ff0bc0ff50fafbd6330087578793) |
---
Last night in Tulsa at Sheridan.Church, we had an incredible time discussing all things: **Israel** , **the Bible** and more. It was a blast to have **Erick Stakelbeck** join us. You can watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/DFFqRW1wEy8](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13205.1.61268c12c04358403652aa7344c9e6bb) **Topics Included** : **-Biblical Israel vs Modern Israel** **-Tucker Carlson + Candace Owens** **-Replacement Theology** **-Israel's war on Hamas** **-America First or Israel First?** **-Much more... + LIVE Q &A** Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Watch: The Case For Israel ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13206.1.2ee479557100b0a7764ff1b61c93aaf1)
---
---
## A Biblical Episode Of Jerry Springer
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13207.1.80adbc8404b5be71227d17c5f86097ad)
---
This last Sunday, we began a _brand new series_ at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13208.1.42e836f59f0e5d1369d654506c163e95) over the Gospel of Matthew. **Matthew 1:1-18** is what I describe as a [Biblical Episode of Jerry Springer](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13209.1.6adf6485d1a1fd94a451adb0364745fd)... The feedback that I received from this message was amazing. I believe it will bless you as well! Watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/doN5JPlwKBw](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13210.1.b45e5910022f4f3054f0981c2c2119b7) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13211.1.624797aa286b73e153fb7e0f0f6803ba)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13212.1.1bb58ce76d9ef02e4d2f0f075d30fe41)
---
I am excited to share with that my hour long in-depth sit down interview on **American Thought Leaders** is now available and you can watch it for **FREE** with this link: [https://ept.ms/4nyYC5A](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13213.1.cb1d03f4dd282ebbadfd3531d969e272)
I want to thank **Epoch Times** and **Jan Jekielek** for the opportunity to have a deep and meaningful conversation about **Charlie Kirk** , **American Culture** , the **impact of Social Media** and much more.
Watch it here for FREE: [https://ept.ms/4nyYC5A](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13214.1.a9da37db9992904af8f10b645272035f)
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13215.1.f6d0f73102e024019b333ee25cdc24d9) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13216.1.f3b443c96573fd911fab393cfe8f87db)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13217.1.a01122f3f4d6336375f26b23a396368e)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13218.1.0b1c498a3334ab59adc878fa90895075). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13219.1.b395aea940bf79ce135bd2e6960517ec) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13220.1.efd9a33ad70cd90f59add494e9364fb5) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13221.1.c870aa5fb11fac7311328224bac2be1f) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---

---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13223.1.c901f7e4b1952c5e28f72f3f936e599c) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25667779.13224.1.50e6cc66afa421bffa31fe23780ecb03) Thank you,

Today is International Lesbian Day, and I’m reflecting on the progress we’ve made toward equality and the long way we have ahead. | | | [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/VFJvQwwzKpulbfo59Hrt1iZmopkch70aM17wFWR5bnj2mkKjNxswVng7vtbY9SgfaiWmiyHeJ4RUNl_IlFMgRgAuFX8ZTUjKlDU2ODicIPJGcTJOQyPATomvbluHLZPOJX_OWKFk-0Y3Clf9LjReci9C82xlrE5nznpTW6ThTFr4YDxbsUd_hdgQ7c_wkJ7H9s9sB0ChojaGyAbbSGCzj7nH4G5gWO77LLrMJOHR58HPjlvuUQgwGDXo4EW2SSZdKlkIl7ew_urigHdrMpR9ByP5w2vB-CIjDzpqrjLAVF_iDFlBDr3z6FzD_jATWXT5gFfKdPYJ8ZXAH2QQD7ylcDJ0qV8cknL-EO3y1_QDeVmLzZ6WiM1Snp2kBHglSMQKs3EIzyJdr78rIyEv7-QlKV_KKFZE7B5vDykGspWO_o7AVWtGM0ZgXV_t-szA_bEV_LrtQMvukmdVjQMKFhRIcOv1qXrMHBmBG2TQKabW1Mav2ER8llb7tQe7tWy0u2GhCDY1-2g1u1pAeezVYOw4ks9LQSq2z-zEGYZvKVBIpPcNCz5Gspd5Yf48nRiw1W8q-xaPCPJxUcLUnAXgrWq5loTPABESS6XY_TOV04eTxUFBVwlFq8XrStfWAMsZ_xDaHZ2_ohqCfhlavTjxoHfWh5g51himRua-6loORiQyhxyrtI3jRauR4eUV2cM9bCRvfWJmOCxW7AT6sKZ7fgAS4Jxpwvb1nt8figfC1xYOUFKggKc-b8WMhwfzOSPgQGCpvlY72-xkxicnG5CpmsSqI36JOkP-e3tvZx7lsrkhGSelnNshIRL8SCDMZb2nJcOe7zsZxjV1TsvVFnGaW7Icfa59r9KHqDH-qihcDJKuqrib1yxbHhx8-32GNqIrKe5p7WAlO6Ye0UOQM7dly0cD4-B-M5e8109hrDmrsRPbwFpepOvRGv3J9C1K/XOlULjyaN9Ji-SFwngcHNttSxyqlVJEF/13) Hey Peter, Today is International Lesbian Day, and I’m reflecting on the progress we’ve made toward equality and the long way we have ahead. Here in Colorado, my wife and I have built a beautiful life together. Living authentically has not always been easy, but it has been the greatest gift of my life. Our story is a reminder that when we stand proud in who we are, we help pave the way for others to do the same.[](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/B_zYdJYTd-P_3uWjzeZUoKXPvMT-zoU50lETRGCfd3R3DS4Ya_N75SdPebsHGpm9HGwZKdQ17AaKSRVasREkyVx25GJ9z52EiFoPeFaVn2CPuc63LvsRNOfCcW28FDt5h_WLHq54A1TxsxkipbS8SaQRJRvXZPqo8iQtzA4qOzQEYSVo-JBXhdvBHhxWAxiXFNgMqUuc-mRb_0Qm3pd3DP_Y-8lQR8owepj_sjUKvfhqHdhFtBpBr5a_9tiWINE4geJpEGRYTmTnxrx1XoOwGJBsRTZSS0IR8lEoz29_n57AHS16bNuQz9nfdGtk_vLFtKpdTFKmdo-c96_ePrxa1Dtm61JP8ByIJt7F9FbLDCI5f2bcuxCpmJHWp2owJ27VLjP97V-nm3y2DICc5lr42TQUhS1hSs6dxjAZRoxCD5_uBrMnSCwt9xITKO28qFL37Jd5K1rA42RBamlIHo3kaastijdWSGRRKFsgGuPj5HOiM_lv5MgDhB9n2TfOz_6-V-GhL-gJiXpCg9p-p6GrTCfjBv_KDCKOGyGZYwzOR9_hZKs8gnNrtVF5gw32h2PlDVD3trIXr-rfVtTK1YIehV4ytc_wkpPffTD78lH597S6GIT6JEDKWspxDoNWfrdLtowSHmBoTRmDk3KNlbPoZwg2gwN0MVibqv5Mm15lFyCabLiAA1SZ6j8In5CyFqwJAZy9cHHCP0xR8RJ2NHqTI7J-kKk1xfWIRtuwbm7fRVkJBkPTChvCyB_wayx81YJvSfs-Av0Tp7LQ9BW-sMz_2GXTlIrmwOkfmFnb4jbtsie3cyABvm6PjHAkVDVBcyL_KfIDvmSiNY7nt2reJ8BFCOLl2mY0Tq1eej-AfId1qXGpDcC0m4aws6VVxDbQv-U6en7hUv011TmvE4eewZYhjIWJB6uuDIbTDVRXoKr2TwQ6knsfFAWRsWBd/8c7T7DKzRrKP1p-O-2M-P0Qx8IUpOnma/13) I know how important it is for young LGBTQ+ people to see leaders who reflect their own identities and experiences. When my colleagues and I worked to get the ballot initiative passed — with 60% of voters supporting the effort to enshrine marriage equality in our state constitution — it was more than a policy victory. It was a deeply personal moment for me and for our community. **Visibility matters. It saves lives, gives hope, and shows what’s possible.** I strive every day to be the kind of role model I once needed — someone who proves that no matter who you are or who you love, you belong in every space, including the halls of government. I’m deeply grateful to those who came before me and opened doors. Leaders like **Jennifer L. Veiga** , the first openly gay person to serve in the Colorado legislature, and **Clela Rorex** , who issued the first same-sex marriage license in the nation in Boulder County back in 1975 — long before it was legal. Their courage and trailblazing spirit made it possible for people like me to serve today. They remind us that progress is always worth fighting for. As we celebrate International Lesbian Day, let’s recommit ourselves to building a Colorado — and a country — where everyone can live openly, love freely, and lead proudly. With Pride, Brianna **[P.S. If you believe Colorado should keep breaking barriers and leading with love, consider supporting this campaign so we can continue the fight for equality and representation. ](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/TqK1Wxki_-QxyVKklIJqOXTcrrNrRbBJ3igNEURsb5m0fYYfKA3-09MJUGWU5zqwcugO2DgO56X-6JOIzGnl4Sllv1rgAqmEjq_gNZnifrFOkCpmms6PDYMmX_rYS2EmkfaQ3LbUzt7Y1QL6CJhLj1PlQSLZUj2WGBbYxm2Sh7C0OPPGxGW1UPeBX1stsyu-kz2xxeSdhhPq_TtjFmA1LzvYrC82n-wprKJ36jhoLE-ENDBd4wlkSD6alvDPULF5dp0lj5-hYPR1So95mQjSSaVKYbDwLDTEvxrxGegaQQ-heVq12BC09YvvobdJY8Yr8LiGshlz2oMRs6bEwiDD8joTKs1zxkB_MUiE2BE6LUUB9F7KhB4Blp61kpuAUIzNOenWa7wdWbzW6gHhwfAXZjST87Oy2xP0M3mA0rpVIsilTL3jyKjaJ87ORNJRB4rMboGPDrazb7NnC2dSbb1SWetwRrQ9RvgKmIjQTJZOkCCKjayD7A4FsTfMnc7JSoR8qAU4yJfE2k-ZoVujbUK3Dka7UsRTV2ChWhCaQGzTvSxj-pnf4689-kRDW37AxhHLUMvIpnS-tVbm9EZPvQ3EcYLrtKXfXBZ9mOg0hEo09usfXiNcXX1LyAkpX2YzivuuEl5QMdxTf0PkbO3tCLX7DX2_xu9yjSqAsuAu8uDpvlYV04Vzv2g7W-P0r1SR7M57Xr1jqhqQeqqPgivWDWeq-uykYnIjYs2E0_3lXlBdeo-KozoIqfnQ-B7WRnn981H4UVQ_eBcwS-ds_KgBBBh_DD_W9-Dxe_a9_1GinVpnmD12pfTMb6_Wna6ywyx7S9fS_9aMwsrU7qW6rQ7iZ5lh1m3Ixh7T3vExieeS_tDJh7qCu01_prcbT1SRGgXpyK9duLsMUcMRE0NWOAOYVD6aGOVQA-ucEieyl4lkbbVI2giGKt0U4hu5e-5R/pMtMH8-dB-Y8WaKSXMiNrxFy2UQrA_NY/13)**

clean_body: Today is International Lesbian Day, and I’m reflecting on the progress we’ve made toward equality and the long way we have ahead. | | | Hey Peter, Today is International Lesbian Day, and I’m reflecting on the progress we’ve made toward equality and the long way we have ahead. Here in Colorado, my wife and I have built a beautiful life together. Living authentically has not always been easy, but it has been the greatest gift of my life. Our story is a reminder that when we stand proud in who we are, we help pave the way for others to do the same. I know how important it is for young LGBTQ+ people to see leaders who reflect their own identities and experiences. When my colleagues and I worked to get the ballot initiative passed — with 60% of voters supporting the effort to enshrine marriage equality in our state constitution — it was more than a policy victory. It was a deeply personal moment for me and for our community. Visibility matters. It saves lives, gives hope, and shows what’s possible. I strive every day to be the kind of role model I once needed — someone who proves that no matter who you are or who you love, you belong in every space, including the halls of government. I’m deeply grateful to those who came before me and opened doors. Leaders like Jennifer L. Veiga , the first openly gay person to serve in the Colorado legislature, and Clela Rorex , who issued the first same-sex marriage license in the nation in Boulder County back in 1975 — long before it was legal. Their courage and trailblazing spirit made it possible for people like me to serve today. They remind us that progress is always worth fighting for. As we celebrate International Lesbian Day, let’s recommit ourselves to building a Colorado — and a country — where everyone can live openly, love freely, and lead proudly. With Pride, Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Chevron and Koch Industries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
You know it’s bad when Big Oil is spending against our candidates.

|
---
**I wish I was writing to you today with better news: a super PAC funded by Chevron, Koch Industries, and other big business interests, has already dumped more than $500,000 to unseat state Senators Victoria Hunt and Deb Krishnadasan.** **[Voters will begin casting their ballots in just nine days, so if you’ve been waiting for the perfect moment to join us, this is it. Please split a $20 donation today — just $10 for each of their campaigns — to directly help Victoria and Deb reach undecided voters before Big Oil drowns them out?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116868955/574696410/-1575571125?refcode=ea.dd4ff55b-70a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.dd4ff55b-70a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkNGZmNTViLTcwYTQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ogzUcVC_u82S8_Pq69HMpbCtQfSzZh284vwdjLOONL8=)** You may be wondering why fossil fuel giants are so desperate to replace our climate champions in the legislature? It’s simple: Victoria and Deb can’t be bought, so Big Oil is trying to buy their seats instead. Trust me when I say, this is the polluter playbook. They hide behind super PACs that bankroll floods of texts, mailers, and ads spreading lies about strong climate champions. And they’ve gotten away with it for years. But not this time. Not with people like you and me paying attention. | 🗳️ **Victoria Hunt (LD-5) has been a leading voice for climate and environmental sustainability in Washington State.** She modernized the Clean Energy Transformation Act, ensuring Washington stays on track for 100% clean power – and even won bipartisan support. Victoria is exactly the kind of leader this moment demands: principled, pragmatic, and determined.
---
🗳️ **Deb Krishnadasan (LD-26) is a lifelong Washingtonian who knows climate change isn’t abstract** — it’s burning our forests in Eastern Washington and flooding the state’s coastline. That’s why Deb supports bold, common-sense solutions: investing in clean energy jobs, growing the economy, and protecting forests, waters, and farmlands, while reducing emissions.
---
**[Will you split a donation of $20, or whatever you can, between Victoria and Deb right now? clean_body: You know it’s bad when Big Oil is spending against our candidates. | I wish I was writing to you today with better news: a super PAC funded by Chevron, Koch Industries, and other big business interests, has already dumped more than $500,000 to unseat state Senators Victoria Hunt and Deb Krishnadasan. = You may be wondering why fossil fuel giants are so desperate to replace our climate champions in the legislature? It’s simple: Victoria and Deb can’t be bought, so Big Oil is trying to buy their seats instead. Trust me when I say, this is the polluter playbook. They hide behind super PACs that bankroll floods of texts, mailers, and ads spreading lies about strong climate champions. And they’ve gotten away with it for years. But not this time. Not with people like you and me paying attention. | 🗳️ Victoria Hunt (LD-5) has been a leading voice for climate and environmental sustainability in Washington State. She modernized the Clean Energy Transformation Act, ensuring Washington stays on track for 100% clean power – and even won bipartisan support. Victoria is exactly the kind of leader this moment demands: principled, pragmatic, and determined. 🗳️ Deb Krishnadasan (LD-26) is a lifelong Washingtonian who knows climate change isn’t abstract — it’s burning our forests in Eastern Washington and flooding the state’s coastline. That’s why Deb supports bold, common-sense solutions: investing in clean energy jobs, growing the economy, and protecting forests, waters, and farmlands, while reducing emissions. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's show Chevron, Koch Industries, and every corporate polluter that their dirty money can't match the strength of our people-powered movement. In solidarity, xx Jane = P.S. I understand there's a heck of a lot happening in the world right now. If a donation today is not possible, that is okay! We need to get the word out about Deb and Victoria's races online — | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Justin P. Pearson
subject: I was expelled from office for protesting for gun reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Join me in building something new.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ca1fd3c-73cf-43c2-915c-57de7ae1cf5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0135d506-dba1-4d5b-83ae-e47c75f12a88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi, my name is Justin J. Pearson. I’m Memphis born and raised, the son of a preacher and a teacher. I was raised financially poor, but spiritually rich. I am a believer in justice and a fighter for our future. Today, I proudly announce my candidacy for Congress.
---
| | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $9](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecab5cea-e750-4d85-9b87-c7cda31d30e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In 2023, after standing alongside over 7,000 activists who marched for action to end gun violence, I was expelled from my duly elected office in the Tennessee State House alongside one of my colleagues, Rep. Justin Jones. The Republicans in the majority said I had "violated decorum" and deserved an unprecedented expulsion. The press called Rep. Jones, Rep. Gloria Johnson, and me "The Tennessee Three." With our expulsion, they thought they could silence our Movement. But they were wrong. The truth is that the fight was never about just one protest or one issue. It was about the kind of future we’re willing to fight to build — and still is. I’m tired of seeing the same corrupt, corporate- and special-interest-backed politicians sell our communities short. I’m tired of seeing Donald Trump and MAGA-sympathizers tear down democracy while working people suffer. Enough is enough, Peter. I am running for Congress to fight for our families, our values, and our future. We need new leaders in Congress who will stand up for what is right. If you’re ready to join me in building something new — politics that are rooted in justice, truth, and People Power, I need you in this fight with me. [Will you help get our campaign off the ground by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5794035b-c841-4e96-b14b-1abc3f381ef8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’ve seen what we’re up against. The same forces that tried to expel us once are ready to spend millions to keep their grip on power. But I believe in us — and I believe in the power of a people-first Movement to reimagine what’s possible. We’ve already made history once, Peter. Now, we’re ready to make a change in Congress. [Please split a $9 Founding Donation now to power our campaign and bring our vision for a better future to the halls of Congress. It would send a powerful message if we reach $50,000 raised in our first big fundraising push.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef33d620-1b9b-4458-b4ab-e20c1bd209d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $9](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d9cb393-474c-41b6-ae96-0139179166a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdeb0a988-55b8-4224-a524-a90f1cd46ebd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | | In Love and Service, Justin J. Pearson

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6757467-0155-419e-acea-0d75540037c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Elfreth
subject: Join Us For An Organizing Town Hall!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ [https://mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ]
While Republicans refuse to re-open the government and protect healthcare for tens of millions of Americans, we wanted to host a conversation about what we can still accomplish at this moment as a community.
That’s why we’re inviting you to join Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth and Maryland Democratic Party Chair Steuart Pittman on October 19th at 2:00 PM in Anne Arundel County (with an exact address provided upon RSVP) for an Organizing Town Hall [https://mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ] . Sarah is committed to fighting back against the Trump Administration in DC, but our work together on the ground is imperative to win a majority in Congress next year.
mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ [mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ]
The Town Hall will feature Q&A and a strategy session where we lay out key Democratic organizing goals to win majorities in 2026. We’ll be joined by organizing, labor, and local Democratic leaders across our community.
Address and further information will be provided upon RSVP. Click the button below to sign up.
Sign Up [https://mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ]
Thank you,
Team Elfreth
https://mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ [https://mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ]
Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
Elfreth for Maryland
PO Box 5935
Annapolis, MD 21403
United States

clean_body: [] While Republicans refuse to re-open the government and protect healthcare for tens of millions of Americans, we wanted to host a conversation about what we can still accomplish at this moment as a community. That’s why we’re inviting you to join Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth and Maryland Democratic Party Chair Steuart Pittman on October 19th at 2:00 PM in Anne Arundel County (with an exact address provided upon RSVP) for an Organizing Town Hall [] . Sarah is committed to fighting back against the Trump Administration in DC, but our work together on the ground is imperative to win a majority in Congress next year. mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ [mobilize.us/s/3F1pIJ] The Town Hall will feature Q&A and a strategy session where we lay out key Democratic organizing goals to win majorities in 2026. We’ll be joined by organizing, labor, and local Democratic leaders across our community. Address and further information will be provided upon RSVP. Click the button below to sign up. Sign Up [] Thank you, Team Elfreth [] Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21411%2E878179%2EYa_xYs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21411%2E878179%2EYa_xYs).**

body:
Consider yourself a top ally of President Trump? Then read this email NOW.

| | | | Peter,
It’s not up for debate. You’ve always been a top ally of President Trump.
When they IMPEACHED him twice.
Took his MUGSHOT like a common criminal.
INDICTED him four times.
RAIDED his family home.
ARRESTED him.
Made him sit through BOGUS witch hunt trials.
And MORE!
You never gave up. You never abandoned the fight. Time and time again, you SHOWED UP to defend the President.
And we will NEVER forget your loyalty.
You play a key part in his victory! [So now, we’re reaching out directly to see if you’ll submit your endorsement of President Trump’s second term so far!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-Ufj-lnYiJabbbFQ)
All responses will be IMMEDIATELY sent to the President’s team. We’ve set an ambitious goal of gathering ONE MILLION endorsements before the month ends, and we can’t reach this goal without everyone doing their part. | [ SUBMIT YOUR ENDORSEMENT OF DONALD TRUMP ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

[So, Peter, can we count on your endorsement?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._CJNCEPc1xs7g) Together, we’ll save America!

Thank you,

Team Marsha

subject: I’m being hunted. Stalked. Threatened. But that doesn’t scare me. THIS does:

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I will never stop fighting for this country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
My time in the Navy taught me to stand up for what’s right and to never shy away from a righteous fight for the hardworking people of our country. And I won't stop now.
**[Hey Peter, I’m Chris Deluzio, an Iraq War veteran and a Congressman representing my home district in Western Pennsylvania. And I’ve dedicated my life to serving this country.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95712?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95712?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx)
After the 9/11 attacks happened during my senior year of high school, I felt a call to serve. So I headed off to the Naval Academy as a teenager.
I served in the Navy—two deployments at sea, one on the ground in Iraq. I learned to put the mission first and those I served alongside ahead of myself. The motto was, “Ship. Shipmate. Self.” That same commitment drives me in Congress every single day to fight for my fellow veterans and the hardworking people of Western Pennsylvania.
But right now, Republicans in the House are threatening critical programs that so many Americans rely on—just so they can give a bigger piece of the pie to huge corporations and billionaires.
They’re bringing a chainsaw to the Social Security Administration and the VA, threatening the hard-earned benefits and care of millions of seniors and veterans. And now, they’re pushing a fiscally reckless plan that would cut billions of dollars from Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans without healthcare coverage.
My time in the Navy taught me to stand up for what’s right and to never shy away from a righteous fight for the hardworking people of our country. And I won't stop now.
**[I’m working every day to protect working families in Western PA and ensure our government works for the people, and I need you with me, Peter. Stand with me and defend hardworking Americans by making a split donation between Heartland Patriots and me today →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95712?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Chris Deluzio and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95713?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95713?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95713?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95713?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95713?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95713?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95712?refcode=em20251008-9539&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9539%2E614464%2EMojBHx)

name: Elect Mamdani via Our Revolution
subject: Trump Just Threatened NY – Help Us Defeat His Billionaire Agenda and Elect Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email-20251008_v&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump’s not done playing kingmaker in the NYC Mayor’s race. His plan to
get Eric Adams out of the race worked. And now he’s moved on to his next
strategy: blackmail.

Trump just threatened to strip federal funds from NYC should Mamdani win.
Why? Because Mamdani’s campaign is giving voice – and power – back to
working people. And Trump is terrified.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20251008&t=1061&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]Headline: Donald Trump threatens Zohran Mamdani's New York City funding

Trump sees what’s happening on the ground. The movement we’re building
doesn’t just threaten his grip on NYC – it threatens his power EVERYWHERE.
He knows Mamdani is not backed by deep-pocketed Wall Street donors.
Instead, it’s people like you – people who refuse to back down, even when
billionaires flood the airwaves with smear ads.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251008nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]If you're as fed up as we are, now’s the moment. Rush a donation to help
elect Mamdani and take on Trump, the billionaires, the Super PACs, and the
establishment. With just four weeks left before Election Day, every dollar
matters. Every phone call matters. Every conversation at the doors
matters. Donate now.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump isn’t even bothering to wait. Last week, he froze $18 BILLION in
federal funding for two infrastructure projects in NYC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20251008&t=1060&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]Headline: Mamdani condemns Trump's $18 billion funding freeze for New
York-area projects

He’s not stopping with NYC. By freezing or canceling funding for cities
and states that didn’t vote for him, Trump is now taking his war on his
opposition to a whole new level.

But here’s the thing: Mamdani and the movement he has ignited across the
country is our BEST chance at stopping Trump’s authoritarianism. By
speaking directly to the working class and offering real solutions, we can
win back the voters we need to get Trump and his MAGA cronies out of
office.

And that starts with a victory in 28 days in NYC.

We know what’s at stake. Trump and the billionaires want an oligarchy run
only for themselves. But we’re in this to build power for the 99%. Right
now, Trump and his allies are ramping up daily threats, and super PAC
money is FLOODING into Cuomo’s campaign.

So we’re holding three phone banks per week and knocking on thousands of
doors across every borough. We’re having real conversations with the
voters we need to turn out to win this election. The establishment is
counting on us to burn out, to give up, to back down. Will you prove them
wrong?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251008nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9478%2E5885482%2EEvef99 ]Chip in $5, $20, or whatever you can today to power our work to elect
Mamdani and beat Trump’s agenda for good. The next 28 days will decide not
just the future of New York City – but whose movement shapes America. Join
us. Donate now.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ ]Headline: Mamdani condemns Trump's $18 billion funding freeze for New York-area projects He’s not stopping with NYC. By freezing or canceling funding for cities and states that didn’t vote for him, Trump is now taking his war on his opposition to a whole new level. But here’s the thing: Mamdani and the movement he has ignited across the country is our BEST chance at stopping Trump’s authoritarianism. By speaking directly to the working class and offering real solutions, we can win back the voters we need to get Trump and his MAGA cronies out of office. And that starts with a victory in 28 days in NYC. We know what’s at stake. Trump and the billionaires want an oligarchy run only for themselves. But we’re in this to build power for the 99%. Right now, Trump and his allies are ramping up daily threats, and super PAC money is FLOODING into Cuomo’s campaign. So we’re holding three phone banks per week and knocking on thousands of doors across every borough. We’re having real conversations with the voters we need to turn out to win this election. The establishment is counting on us to burn out, to give up, to back down. Will you prove them wrong? The next 28 days will decide not just the future of New York City – but whose movement shapes America. Join us. Donate now. When we organize, we win. clean_body: If elected, I’ll make history as the first Latina from Pennsylvania ever to serve in Congress. | = | Hi Peter, it’s Carol. If elected,I’ll make history as the first Latina from Pennsylvania ever to serve in Congress. That milestone matters, = | = This race is a total toss-up , and PA-07 could decide control of the House next year. Experts say Mackenzie is vulnerable, and dark money GOP groups are already attacking me because they know we can win. I’m proud to be endorsed by BOLD PAC and Latino Victory Fund , as well as local leaders across the district who know I’ll fight for working families, lower costs, and good-paying jobs. I’m a mom, engineer, and longtime community advocate – not a political insider – and I’m ready to put people first, not big-money donors. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you! – Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: 750,000 Americans could lose the benefits they deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[PETITION] [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116871161/574703629/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ4OTNmNi03NWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6sQm540Tcga5Xt4TpwX9FhZYt9JbKlqny9TGiSa-XI=&emci=d6531ac0-a4a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=fb4893f6-75a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Right now, our government is in a Republican shutdown that could've been avoided.

Federal workers are worried about their next paycheck and families are worried about how they'll keep the lights on or pay for groceries. And instead of offering relief, **Donald Trump is looking for new ways to make things worse.**

His administration is floating a plan to cut Social Security disability benefits—removing age as a factor in deciding whether someone is too disabled to work. That means older Americans who are looking to retire with dignity could be suddenly told they need to return to work and be denied their benefits.

If Trump gets his way, up to 750,000 seniors, veterans, and workers lose their benefits over the next decade. That's 750,000 people who might be forced to retire early and take 30% smaller monthly payments for life.

Trump and his allies promised they wouldn't touch Social Security. They promised to protect our seniors and ensure everyone would have their benefits when the time comes. But now, they're turning their backs on that promise. They're playing politics with something that millions of Americans depend on.

Let's be clear, Peter: Social Security isn't a handout, _it's something people earned._ Every paycheck, every deduction was a promise that if you worked hard your whole life, this country would be there for you after retirement.

**Now, that promise is under attack.**

clean_body: [PETITION] Peter, Right now, our government is in a Republican shutdown that could've been avoided. Federal workers are worried about their next paycheck and families are worried about how they'll keep the lights on or pay for groceries. And instead of offering relief, Donald Trump is looking for new ways to make things worse. His administration is floating a plan to cut Social Security disability benefits—removing age as a factor in deciding whether someone is too disabled to work. That means older Americans who are looking to retire with dignity could be suddenly told they need to return to work and be denied their benefits. If Trump gets his way, up to 750,000 seniors, veterans, and workers lose their benefits over the next decade. That's 750,000 people who might be forced to retire early and take 30% smaller monthly payments for life. Trump and his allies promised they wouldn't touch Social Security. They promised to protect our seniors and ensure everyone would have their benefits when the time comes. But now, they're turning their backs on that promise. They're playing politics with something that millions of Americans depend on. Let's be clear, Peter: Social Security isn't a handout, it's something people earned. Every paycheck, every deduction was a promise that if you worked hard your whole life, this country would be there for you after retirement. Now, that promise is under attack. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. New Dems in Congress are fighting back, working to extend healthcare coverage and protect families from losing the care they depend on.
