name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: Supreme Court Oral Argument on Wednesday in Historic Illinois Election Integrity Case
body:
Judicial Watch announced that oral argument will be held on
Wednesday, October 8, 2025, in the Supreme Court of the United
States in a historic case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and
two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their
standing to challenge an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots
received up to 14 days after Election Day (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura
Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of
Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644,
24-568)).

[alt_text]

[*****]
October 08, 2025

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that oral argument will be held on Wednesday, October 8, 2025, in the Supreme Court of the United States in a historic case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). [alt_text] [*****] October 08, 2025 [article-image] [] Judicial Watch announced that oral argument will be held on Wednesday, October 8, 2025, in the Supreme Court of the United States in a historic case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). * * *
Peter — Donald Trump gave James Uthmeier his _"Complete and Total Endorsement"_ for Florida Attorney General. Trump looked at all the corruption, all the scandals, all the ways Uthmeier has failed Florida families — and decided he wants _**MORE**_ of it.
Uthmeier wasted over $200 million of your tax dollars building Alligator Alcatraz to help Trump's mass deportation agenda. He's been too busy bending the knee to Trump to fight the skyrocketing insurance rates and utility bills crushing Florida families.
**Let’s be clear about what this means: Trump wants an Attorney General who will do whatever he says, not one who will stand up for the people.** That's exactly who James Uthmeier is — a yes-man who puts Trump and DeSantis ahead of working families.
I'm running to be the People's Lawyer. Someone who will fight corruption, tackle rising costs, and keep our communities safe. Someone who will stand up to bullies, no matter how powerful they are.
**[This just put our race in the spotlight, Peter. We need to show Trump and Uthmeier that Floridians are ready for real leadership, not more corruption and political theater. clean_body: This race just became the most important in Florida. | POLITICO: Trump backs DeSantis-allied Uthmeier for Florida attorney general = | = Peter — Donald Trump gave James Uthmeier his "Complete and Total Endorsement" for Florida Attorney General. Trump looked at all the corruption, all the scandals, all the ways Uthmeier has failed Florida families — and decided he wants MORE of it. Uthmeier wasted over $200 million of your tax dollars building Alligator Alcatraz to help Trump's mass deportation agenda. He's been too busy bending the knee to Trump to fight the skyrocketing insurance rates and utility bills crushing Florida families. Let’s be clear about what this means: Trump wants an Attorney General who will do whatever he says, not one who will stand up for the people. That's exactly who James Uthmeier is — a yes-man who puts Trump and DeSantis ahead of working families. I'm running to be the People's Lawyer. Someone who will fight corruption, tackle rising costs, and keep our communities safe. Someone who will stand up to bullies, no matter how powerful they are. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = ** Let's do this. — Jose Javier Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116871801/574706277/-939470041?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_081025_FR_MillerShutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWRmZWU3MDgtNzlhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e-zIhCej8QUYtPprHLf7FaggVUMH0RGF5nzwlvGvXfM=)_
Mary Miller, like usual, has no idea what she’s talking about and no regard for the truth.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116871805/574706281/-939470041?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_081025_FR_MillerShutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWRmZWU3MDgtNzlhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e-zIhCej8QUYtPprHLf7FaggVUMH0RGF5nzwlvGvXfM=) Rather than doing the bare minimum of her job and keeping the government functioning, she’s getting on social media to blame the DEMOCRATS for the shutdown.

As a reminder: Republicans have a trifecta. They have a majority in the House, Senate, AND White House. They did not need a single Democratic vote in order to prevent a shutdown, and they don’t need a single Democratic vote in order to open it back up again.

But rather than advocate for her constituents, Mary Miller is wasting time on social media, peddling rhetoric and lying about the shutdown.

We’re tired of people like Mary Miller, Mike Bost, and Darin LaHood holding our government hostage to make Trump happy, but to get out of this, we need a majority in Congress. I don’t have the story of a typical politician, Peter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116871952/574706755/1554683404?refcode=photo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNGExNS03OWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MculBZJqwJEimo7wpUF9R2ANkNpInMFicvvZReFQb9w=)
I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. When my dad was between jobs, my family relied on our church community and food stamps to get by.
I got my first job at 16, working at Burger King and then Pizza Hut to put myself through high school and college. My husband and I raised our kids through the Great Recession, experienced a home foreclosure, and we’re still paying off our student loans.
Even after I was elected to public office, I took a second job driving for Uber to make sure my kids had Christmas presents.
So when I say this work is personal to me, I mean it. I know deeply what it’s like to do whatever it takes to provide for your family.
**As governor, I’ve always pledged to fight just as hard every day for your family as I fought for mine – and that’s what I promise to keep doing when re-elected.**

Over the last three years, we’ve cut taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans. We lowered childcare costs so working parents aren’t saddled with yet another expense. We erased medical debt for more than 350,000 Arizonans.
**_But all our progress is on the line in this race._**
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the Cook Political Report, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and Inside Elections have already called this race a **pure toss-up.**
Unlike my THREE GOP opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**

**[So please: Split a donation between me and Tim Walz and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116871955/574706785/1554683404?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxNGExNS03OWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MculBZJqwJEimo7wpUF9R2ANkNpInMFicvvZReFQb9w=)**

subject: How I grew up

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116872765/574709894/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBmYTJkYS03OWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NApQR_lB8hXUkq_XhqoHAgWyZN8_Vey0HnUpDkQfACE=)

Peter,

I know that choosing who to vote for isn't easy, and I believe it's important that you know the person asking for your trust. So I want to share a little bit about where I come from and why I’m in this fight. **[If we've already met or you're just that fired up to bring change to IA-01, you can go ahead and make a donation to my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116872770/574709898/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251007_work_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251007_work_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=ba0fa2da-79a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBmYTJkYS03OWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NApQR_lB8hXUkq_XhqoHAgWyZN8_Vey0HnUpDkQfACE=)**

**I grew up in a small rural community, in a trailer home with parents who never graduated high school.** My dad was a construction worker. He was good at it–he was a guy, like plenty of Iowans, who took his showers after work. My mom worked part-time at a daycare while raising us, juggling the care of other people's children while caring for her own. Both of them set an amazing example and taught me the value of hard work.

I’m running for Congress because I’ve seen, firsthand, the grit and strength it takes to raise a family. Our community is full of hardworking people and their children who deserve better: better representation, better leadership, better care as they keep Iowa moving forward.**I will bring every ounce of my experience, determination, and love for this district to Washington.**

**[We’re building a campaign rooted in hard work and hope — the same values my parents taught me all those years ago. If you believe in this fight, I would be honored if you'd chip in today to help us keep this momentum going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116872772/574709901/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251007_work_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251007_work_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=ba0fa2da-79a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBmYTJkYS03OWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NApQR_lB8hXUkq_XhqoHAgWyZN8_Vey0HnUpDkQfACE=)**

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Growing the food that feeds America
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend,

Ohio's farmers grow the food that feeds America. But today, too many family farms are struggling under the weight of Trump's tariffs, rising prices, and economic instability.

That makes Marcy's work for farmers more urgent than ever.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?amp;refcode=251008_team_smallfarmers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?amp;refcode=251008_team_smallfarmers]

Marcy has always had Ohio farmers' backs, fighting for transformative investments in sustainable agriculture, biofuel tax credits, and programs to make fresh, locally grown food more accessible to everyone.

In a show of her dedication to this work, Marcy even brought a local farmer and regenerative agriculture pioneer as her guest to this year's State of the Union address.

As long as she's in Congress, Marcy will go to work every day for the people who feed America. Thank you for helping support that work, friend.

Support Marcy's work [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?amp;refcode=251008_team_smallfarmers]With you,

— Team Kaptur
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=af6de9c8f7&e=5bd167f239)**

---

_**Shutdown Standoff & A Race Against Time.**_

**Who Wins? Who Loses?**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 33
| Mike Madrid and Chuck Rocha dive into **the government shutdown fight** , asking who benefits, who gets blamed, and what it means heading into the midterms. From debates over health care messaging to the political fallout for Trump, Schumer, and beyond, the hosts explore why **Democrats may be “racing against time”** and what’s at stake in **Virginia, New Jersey, and the broader midterm elections**. Our hosts also unpack **Trump’s unprecedented gathering of military leaders** along with the risks of his **military deployment to Portland** , while also drawing connections between country and ranchera music.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Government shutdown live updates as Senate prepares to vote again](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1d4f6fe10b&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

# [**ORDER
THE LATINO CENTURY**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=bdaf67db05&e=5bd167f239)
[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1e18365a66&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: need your response, friend (Social Security & some other things)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I can't make progress on your biggest issues unless I hear about what matters most to you.
| | |
---
Friend,
Social Security is a promise to every American that they can retire with dignity and stability after a lifetime of hard work.
Even still, I've heard from countless retirees, workers, and other Coloradans who rely on Social Security who are terrified that this promise could be broken under Trump's presidency – and rightly so.
After all, Trump and Elon Musk's DOGE:
* Slashed thousands of workers from the Social Security Administration’s already-overburdened staff,
* Increased wait times at field offices and on the phone, and
* Siphoned over 300 million Americans' sensitive data to an insecure cloud system.

In the wake of their recklessness, I'm fighting to protect Coloradans' well-earned benefits from the administration's attacks by working to pass bills like the Keep Billionaires Out of Social Security Act, which I introduced with my colleagues on the Senate floor just the other week.
**But as I run to keep up the fight for Colorado as our next governor, I still need to know what matters most to you.[Can you please take 60 seconds right now to let me know your priority issues?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116873738/574712816/431245772?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk938-su-nd&refcode=jtk938-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1ODE4Ni03Y2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0JbMex1PXZPG3cILd6jdIEmw9qxquoJjrPCWFo9OyI=&emci=fb10385c-dca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=23958186-7ca4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116873739/574712817/431245772?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk938-su-nd&refcode=jtk938-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1ODE4Ni03Y2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0JbMex1PXZPG3cILd6jdIEmw9qxquoJjrPCWFo9OyI=&emci=fb10385c-dca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=23958186-7ca4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)
---
When I'm not in D.C., I'm traveling across Colorado, talking with folks from all walks of life and hearing what's working and what's not.
Whether it’s housing, health care, child care, the cost of living, education, or our climate – I want to know what issues are keeping you up at night. **Because Coloradans like you deserve a governor who’s focused on the issues that actually affect your life.**
_[**I'm all ears, friend, so will you please add your voice to the conversation? Click here to sound off in my survey before midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116873740/574712818/431245772?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk938-su-nd&refcode=jtk938-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1ODE4Ni03Y2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0JbMex1PXZPG3cILd6jdIEmw9qxquoJjrPCWFo9OyI=&emci=fb10385c-dca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=23958186-7ca4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)_
Thanks in advance for your insight,

Michael

Louisville, CO 80027

name: Team Downing
subject: (1) Trump Performance Request for Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Now’s your chance to rate President Trump’s performance. Answers needed by 8PM.

2025 Presidential Performance Survey[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._d1VXnmiIJZRl2qoSwsfA)President Trump is delivering on his promises to the American people, but we need to know that our country is still on the right track. That's where you come in, Peter!
We're counting on the most loyal Patriots in America to weigh in on the issues that matter most.
[Take our 1-minute survey to give us your honest opinion on President Trump's performance in the following areas:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

* Border Security
* Immigration Policy
* Criminal Justice & Law Enforcement
* Education Policy
* Trade & Economy
* Energy & Environment

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Peter,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---

Hi team,

Let me be blunt: **_Once again, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans have made a mockery of the American people, endangering the well-being of all of us by refusing to fund healthcare for millions. It's negligent, greedy, and irresponsible!_**

But know I’m in the trenches fighting right beside you. The government may be shut down, but my fight for you won’t be. **I’m working tirelessly to protect the lives of you and your family. That’s why I need you now more than ever.**

Grassroots fundraising has continued to be the pillar of my success and has enhanced many impactful movements we support today. So please know that every cent you give matters greatly to me and helps. spread my vision of bright hope. Grassroots fundraising has continued to be the pillar of my success and has enhanced many impactful movements we support today. So please know that every cent you give matters greatly to me and helps. spread my vision of bright hope. = The time to invest in hope and impact shouldn’t be when it's too late, but when we have the means to stand up and fight back, now. name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump’s militarization of American cities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
LA. Portland. Chicago.
Donald Trump is trying to use the U.S. military as his personal police force and our cities as their training grounds. It’s unlawful, and we’re fighting back.
Illinois Attorney General Kwame Raoul is suing to block Trump’s illegal federalization of the Illinois National Guard and deployment of troops from other states, and I’ve filed a new amicus brief in support.
If you’re with us, add your name to our petition today to show your support. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B8OkSJnn8keNhiCJk8ZVzg2]
Trump’s campaign to militarize American cities began here in California when he illegally seized control of the California National Guard and deployed them to Los Angeles for civilian law enforcement. Now, we’re seeing the same unlawful power-grabs being attempted in cities across the country.
Californians don’t want to see their streets turned into training grounds for the military — and neither do our friends in D.C., Oregon, or Illinois.
I’m doing everything I can to fight back against this administration as they blast through legal guardrails and shatter our democratic norms — and I need to know you’re with me.
Add your name if you agree: Our cities are not training grounds, and our democracy is not a battlefield. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B8OkSJnn8keNhiCJk8ZVzg2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B8OkSJnn8keNhiCJk8ZVzg2]
Thanks for speaking out with me. Nothing is more powerful than a people united.
More to come as our legal battle continues.
—Rob

Peter, it’s Jason Miyares. I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General. But **nothing** prepared me for what **Jay Jones** said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages. Jay Jones fantasized about **shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head,** choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. clean_body: | | | | Then he wished death upon young children. This is truly sick. Peter, it’s Jason Miyares. I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General. But nothing prepared me for what Jay Jones said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages. Jay Jones fantasized about shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head, choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. Then he called Gilbert's young children "little fascists" who should be killed — in their weeping mother’s arms. This isn't politics. This is the unhinged, sick fantasy of a dangerous person. | Every parent in Virginia should be horrified. Jones dreams about executing his political opponents and having their children killed. No decent human being fantasizes about shooting their colleagues and killing their children. Jones is clearly disqualified — not just from being Attorney General, but from holding any office across Virginia or our country. This deranged individual cannot be trusted with a badge, let alone the power to prosecute Virginians. 🚨 — Attorney General Jason Miyares \- = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA AUTHORIZED BY JASON MIYARES FOR ATTORNEY GENERAL

clean_body: Remember what he did with Tylenol? Now he's coming after abortion pills. | = Hi Peter, RFK Jr. is continuing to weaponize his position as head of the Department of Health and Human Services to target mifepristone, an abortion medication with a 25-year safety record that's been used by more than seven million people. His playbook? Manufacture doubt, undermine trust, and restrict access. = | = RFK Jr. announced that the DHHS, through the FDA, will conduct a new "study" of mifepristone, including its safety protocols and how it's dispensed. We've seen this before, Peter. This is the exact same tactic he used with Tylenol — spreading baseless fears to pregnant women about autism risks, despite decades of evidence proving the safety of acetaminophen. Medical experts shut him down then, and we'll shut him down now. EMILYs List women in the U.S. House and Senate are the ones leading the fight to combat RFK Jr.'s dangerous disinformation campaign. This cycle, we can elect even more Democratic pro-choice women who will be the stopgap between the Trump administration's anti-science, anti-choice agenda and the vast majority of Americans, who are pro-choice. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Robert Garcia
subject: An update on California’s redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
More Republicans than ever
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116875783/574719644/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmVkMTVkMi04MWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eQrDvt0kAWEDdxMqlrsoV3Zqle1nsR-keP3TeIu1v4=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
In just a few weeks, California voters will go to the polls — and new congressional maps will soon be finalized. Once those maps are approved, we need to be ready to hit the ground running immediately.
Here’s the truth: The redistricting process will reshape California’s political landscape. My district will look very different — and I will soon be in one of the toughest districts in California. It will contain more Republicans and be more competitive than before, with the GOP already eyeing it as one of their best chances to flip a seat in California.
That’s why I’m asking for your help now — before the new maps are even finalized.
**We need to build a war chest strong enough to compete the second the new district lines drop. **
**[Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us hit the ground running?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116875784/574719645/789508428?refcode=251008_RG_cal-update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmVkMTVkMi04MWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eQrDvt0kAWEDdxMqlrsoV3Zqle1nsR-keP3TeIu1v4=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116875785/574719646/-309737922?refcode=251008_RG_cal-update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmVkMTVkMi04MWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eQrDvt0kAWEDdxMqlrsoV3Zqle1nsR-keP3TeIu1v4=)
The GOP is already plotting how to exploit these new lines — flooding the zone with dark money and extremist candidates. **But we’ve beaten them before, and with your help, we’ll do it again.**
Grassroots donors like you are the reason we’ve been able to stand up to Trump, fight for working families, and defend democracy in Congress. Let’s show we’re ready — no matter what the new map looks like.
Thank you for always being in this fight with me,
Robert Garcia

clean_body: More Republicans than ever = Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia. In just a few weeks, California voters will go to the polls — and new congressional maps will soon be finalized. Once those maps are approved, we need to be ready to hit the ground running immediately. Here’s the truth: The redistricting process will reshape California’s political landscape. My district will look very different — and I will soon be in one of the toughest districts in California. It will contain more Republicans and be more competitive than before, with the GOP already eyeing it as one of their best chances to flip a seat in California. That’s why I’m asking for your help now — before the new maps are even finalized. We need to build a war chest strong enough to compete the second the new district lines drop. = = The GOP is already plotting how to exploit these new lines — flooding the zone with dark money and extremist candidates. But we’ve beaten them before, and with your help, we’ll do it again. Grassroots donors like you are the reason we’ve been able to stand up to Trump, fight for working families, and defend democracy in Congress. Let’s show we’re ready — no matter what the new map looks like. Thank you for always being in this fight with me, Robert Garcia P.S. Here is a picture of my new district, to give you a sense of where I'm located: = = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

Democrats are fighting to extend these tax credits, but MAGA extremists Rep. Buddy Carter and Rep. Mike Collins REFUSE to negotiate. After gutting Medicaid and Medicare by passing the Big Billionaire Bill, they’ve put 500,000 Georgians on the path to losing their healthcare. subject: I’m ready to sit down with Republicans

body:
This shutdown puts southern New Mexico at risk.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=K5LIYkVCnAcCxZDWAnj1qUpM5SF3mMp7R8H2661CED7Xs2ZoWkQI5o%2Bz9ftA1f8o0Y%2FH%2BXHp2hQwDAhMRzivb0wSbIzmMGIoYGf2t%2F3XS55J9ojIsZlwrSAoGdpqeyaVi1FXPOXEG8oLg22hcnRheT0rd9gHxrheRP11dXoWgjlnQB%2F9M1SEHrKAJIz3hERYQJApyZ3a%2BBIfHmINUywuFGlpC7gu%2FnHTzlqOkDT5lc0ldFAFCbwAiXk2eOVeZ6kqZ7O1V7qPGG%2BWrqWm6MPqs47tFbVKdkVcL2iax0o3zPArKEOHxTjM9qzWauu0TStFAsrLtWXbjksP%2FuNh%2FI%2Bu2Wy%2BENiAI%2BSP%2BWc6fkreGKbClO7dXXsImQivn2X3fLs6%2BlMDqNOvj5ou6i6fmfqfifvnsCV1uIo4FCsSMgtqHu4%3D)

It’s Gabe Vasquez. We’re on the sixth day of the government shutdown, and instead of working on a real solution with Democrats, Republicans are nowhere to be found. Speaker Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership have made it clear: **they’d rather avoid talking about the healthcare crisis than negotiate.** Some of the deepest cuts they’ve already made will impact rural communities in southern New Mexico the hardest, and I won’t stand for that. Republicans are targeting the health care subsidies millions of families here rely on — the same support that helps people afford doctor visits, prescriptions, and basic care. If we don’t stop these cuts now using whatever leverage we have, **premiums could double or even triple for folks across our district.** And while they hold the government hostage, Republicans are busy working behind the scenes to flip NM-02. Big outside money is already pouring in, and national Republicans are lining up candidates who are MAGA loyalists to tow the party line and continue the chaos. [We need to show we’re ready to fight back — not just against this reckless shutdown, but against more MAGA chaos coming to NM-02. clean_body: This shutdown puts southern New Mexico at risk. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Gabe Vasquez. We’re on the sixth day of the government shutdown, and instead of working on a real solution with Democrats, Republicans are nowhere to be found. Speaker Mike Johnson and House GOP leadership have made it clear: they’d rather avoid talking about the healthcare crisis than negotiate. Some of the deepest cuts they’ve already made will impact rural communities in southern New Mexico the hardest, and I won’t stand for that. Republicans are targeting the health care subsidies millions of families here rely on — the same support that helps people afford doctor visits, prescriptions, and basic care. If we don’t stop these cuts now using whatever leverage we have, premiums could double or even triple for folks across our district. And while they hold the government hostage, Republicans are busy working behind the scenes to flip NM-02. Big outside money is already pouring in, and national Republicans are lining up candidates who are MAGA loyalists to tow the party line and continue the chaos. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . Hi Peter,We are fighting to protect healthcare for millions of families. Democrats are fighting to extend the Affordable Care Act subsidies and reverse the Medicaid cuts. Instead of fixing a broken system, protecting healthcare, and restoring the public’s trust in government, **Republicans are responsible for shutting down the government** and throwing the country into chaos. Why? Because they’re protecting the _massive_ tax giveaways they passed for their rich friends, corporations and billionaires. The very politicians responsible for this crisis continue protecting healthcare cuts they made **to pay for Trump’s tax breaks for the ultra-rich**. But we don’t have to accept this as normal. Today, we’re holding an **urgent** **town hall with House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries** , **Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, ECU President Tiffany Muller,** and Democratic members of Congress to bring people together, share more information about the shutdown and its impact on our communities, and **how to demand real action and accountability**.

Why? Because they’re protecting the massive tax giveaways they passed for their rich friends, corporations and billionaires. The very politicians responsible for this crisis continue protecting healthcare cuts they made to pay for Trump’s tax breaks for the ultra-rich. But we don’t have to accept this as normal. Today, we’re holding an urgent town hall with House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries , Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, ECU President Tiffany Muller, and Democratic members of Congress to bring people together, share more information about the shutdown and its impact on our communities, and how to demand real action and accountability. | | See you tonight,Team ECU Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. name: Seth Moulton
subject: I won’t rewrite the truth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Our country deserves honesty.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116876532/574722020/1866411932?refcode=251008_sm_truth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWVhMDk1ZC04M2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69CGF06wxCKC5LxnL2uEBMq4sHrE1fJSoITcsAEl8j8=)
---
Team, I voted NO on the bill for Charlie Kirk Remembrance Day. I condemn political violence in the strongest possible terms. No one should lose their life because of their speech, and my heart goes out to the Kirk family and all of those impacted by political violence. But frankly, this bill would rewrite history. Charlie Kirk effectively used his platform to divide people, spread misinformation, and fan the flames of political anger. To celebrate his legacy would be dishonest and a disservice to other victims of political violence, whom Kirk himself mocked. **We can grieve tragedy without erasing the truth. ** I’ll always condemn political violence in every form and protect free speech. But I refuse to, and Congress should not canonize a political influencer who regularly sowed division and hatred through political discourse **[If you’re with me, please consider making a contribution of $10, $20, or whatever is meaningful to you to help me spread this message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116876533/574722021/2005830277?refcode=251008_sm_truth&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWVhMDk1ZC04M2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69CGF06wxCKC5LxnL2uEBMq4sHrE1fJSoITcsAEl8j8=)** | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116876534/574722022/1866411932?amount=10&refcode=251008_sm_truth&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWVhMDk1ZC04M2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69CGF06wxCKC5LxnL2uEBMq4sHrE1fJSoITcsAEl8j8= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

subject: [Video] Did you catch me on the news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend, I've said it before, but:
"Kevin Kiley has never had the spine to stand up to Trump."
That's what I told ABC 10 the other day, and it's one of the reasons why the people in our district are struggling.
Will you chip in to our people-powered campaign today to help us flip this seat? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend, I made it clear in my interview that no matter what Californians choose when it comes to Prop 50 and redistricting, I'm running for Congress to deliver results for our community just like I did as Supervisor in Grass Valley.
For far too long Kevin Kiley has ducked his constituents and failed to show up for us in our district and in Washington, instead choosing to loyally serve Republican party leaders like Trump and appease the wealthy donors that donate to his campaign.
When he chose to cut Medicaid and SNAP and refused to work with Democrats to prevent a shutdown and save affordable healthcare, he didn't do that for us—he did it for himself.
Friend, spineless representatives like Kiley are only going to keep throwing us under the bus if we don't hold them accountable. Will you help me flip this seat and kick Kiley out by donating to our people-powered campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251008_em_fr_b1_HH_big]

Heidi Hall for Congress

Grass Valley, CA 95945

body:
Our work to keep moving Arizona forward has only just begun, and the stakes in this race are sky-high.
_Hey Peter – it’s Andy. My good friend Governor Katie Hobbs is running for reelection in Arizona and asked if she could reach out. She’s the only Democratic incumbent in a toss-up race for governor. Right now, she’s launching her reelection campaign, and she needs your support to make a strong statement. Will you give her message a quick read? Thank you._

I don’t have the story of a typical politician, Peter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116876750/574722579/663822599?refcode=em25_251008_hobbst_fndd_gq_act___KH_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251008_hobbst_fndd_gq_act___KH_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c8656b7c-84a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg2NTZiN2MtODRhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bQBFD6-k53OAiDTAlZFM5wGo8dXPpuLZyQy_F7A-kY8=)
I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. When my dad was between jobs, my family relied on our church community and food stamps to get by.

I got my first job at 16, working at Burger King and then Pizza Hut to put myself through high school and college. My husband and I raised our kids through the Great Recession, experienced a home foreclosure, and we’re still paying off our student loans.

Even after I was elected to public office, I took a second job driving for Uber to make sure my kids had Christmas presents.

So when I say this work is personal to me, I mean it. I know deeply what it’s like to do whatever it takes to provide for your family.

**As governor, I’ve always pledged to fight just as hard every day for your family as I fought for mine – and that’s what I promise to keep doing when re-elected.**

Over the last three years, we’ve cut taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans. We lowered childcare costs so working parents aren’t saddled with yet another expense. We erased medical debt for more than 350,000 Arizonans.

_**But all our progress is on the line in this race.**_

Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball,_ and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a **pure toss-up.**

Unlike my THREE GOP opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**

[**So please: Split a donation between me and In This Together PAC and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116876752/574722581/663822599?refcode=em25_251008_hobbst_fndd_gq_act___KH_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251008_hobbst_fndd_gq_act___KH_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c8656b7c-84a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg2NTZiN2MtODRhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bQBFD6-k53OAiDTAlZFM5wGo8dXPpuLZyQy_F7A-kY8=)

clean_body: Our work to keep moving Arizona forward has only just begun, and the stakes in this race are sky-high. Hey Peter – it’s Andy. My good friend Governor Katie Hobbs is running for reelection in Arizona and asked if she could reach out. She’s the only Democratic incumbent in a toss-up race for governor. Right now, she’s launching her reelection campaign, and she needs your support to make a strong statement. Will you give her message a quick read? Thank you. = Peter, I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for re-election as governor of Arizona. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- I don’t have the story of a typical politician, Peter. = I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. When my dad was between jobs, my family relied on our church community and food stamps to get by. I got my first job at 16, working at Burger King and then Pizza Hut to put myself through high school and college. My husband and I raised our kids through the Great Recession, experienced a home foreclosure, and we’re still paying off our student loans. Even after I was elected to public office, I took a second job driving for Uber to make sure my kids had Christmas presents. So when I say this work is personal to me, I mean it. I know deeply what it’s like to do whatever it takes to provide for your family. As governor, I’ve always pledged to fight just as hard every day for your family as I fought for mine – and that’s what I promise to keep doing when re-elected. Over the last three years, we’ve cut taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans. We lowered childcare costs so working parents aren’t saddled with yet another expense. We erased medical debt for more than 350,000 Arizonans. But all our progress is on the line in this race. Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the Cook Political Report, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and Inside Elections have already called this race a pure toss-up. Unlike my THREE GOP opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: You. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Let’s get to work! — Katie | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission? = Paid for by In This Together PAC. InThisTogetherPAC.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
This is authoritarianism knocking on our front door, once again. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsPwMDzSSevPBXMIb9Ka_32IH1NSsZM_aMXiK_yLTlt0486eW1MoCP56PBI6ume4ngIHGQMYQg-I3uXpXL86Ys79QioQ2W-9J_hX9RMXHrjXv5JEp7GGjaWf-lq9SH8STlNWEGqDlVFBwyaqk2BgQIo5so7_M64eA8gVq0yAcMBkjJFHemNcGVBB298ytDwmo75zYNDWBlzyvmfygAfchgEjA4Y5bVg4U_QJDlgSIkB617j3QQBtvw5vUX7gMkm-zTcRqyLbRM73G2-R4HVeyIy1ud_OCtnGDbojv60MqkrCDl4p5X4jlt1pGrgFnGNo_40Ly_6D1DWXQ3-wpK0hddyje47aK5Yk2q2XioNRL9omUv-gTQxEBq77n8NbU-aa7tw/4kk/MCy5O7rLT2elZT8_Idvn-Q/h0/h001.D5cJCxIcMqWkWQLMSl6plndwDo78gg_B0_LWvuVKycg)
---
Donald Trump keeps escalating the invasion of Chicago. In a Truth Social post, Trump called for **Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and Illinois Governor JB Pritzker to be jailed,** simply for standing up to his unconstitutional power grab. This comes as he deploys National Guard troops into Democratic-led cities like Chicago, Los Angeles, and D.C. over the objections of local leaders. Let's be clear: this isn't "law and order." It's authoritarianism.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsPwMDzSSevPBXMIb9Ka_32IH1NSsZM_aMXiK_yLTlt04zODs4C6uVHynQoIVYDPtd4mK4A6iZZj83SwGLgUDDZ3Ub0zNE8bFtU-RFkSb1NRznAZNejK3yONIJyPuJwCiHH51TPliYbfRVRKtvCCnqkNmdMRbCR_UJW4tRK20tJQZx7EE5nAqROGgMpUfjmJa1gjH19KPftJbeYz9H58YNE4QsliiZKzxRvg-mkWs6vvdLiX7FwfXyzGakQ7ajRlK07_kwm736uAir0qMLPre0ZS5xSMHiWL3Rqb7JKjDaI_VPtOT2kVPxn2Zg96h-Eg4Ias-60iY8LHFL09-AW81NEwdmTFTn2OsnEMKQuOwruZX3sYcxwdJ_-wVCBS4GXIslg/4kk/MCy5O7rLT2elZT8_Idvn-Q/h1/h001.B9fThbJyFJ6BrDnrx1i-y5d9DHmxZLX7VkhAV1UhKMI)
---
Trump is weaponizing the military to intimidate political opponents and punish communities that won't bend to his will. When state and local leaders push back, he calls for their arrest. This is not how democracy works -- this is how it ends. Governor Pritzker said it best: "Trump is now calling for the arrest of elected representatives checking his power. What else is left on the path to full-blown authoritarianism?" At **No Dem Left Behind** , we're not standing by while Trump threatens our democracy. [**We 're mobilizing in every state. Organizing, educating, and fighting to stop Trump's extremist agenda before it goes any further. But we need your help to keep the pressure on. clean_body: This is authoritarianism knocking on our front door, once again. | | Donald Trump keeps escalating the invasion of Chicago. In a Truth Social post, Trump called for Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and Illinois Governor JB Pritzker to be jailed, simply for standing up to his unconstitutional power grab. This comes as he deploys National Guard troops into Democratic-led cities like Chicago, Los Angeles, and D.C. over the objections of local leaders. Let's be clear: this isn't "law and order." It's authoritarianism. | Trump is weaponizing the military to intimidate political opponents and punish communities that won't bend to his will. When state and local leaders push back, he calls for their arrest. This is not how democracy works -- this is how it ends. Governor Pritzker said it best: "Trump is now calling for the arrest of elected representatives checking his power. What else is left on the path to full-blown authoritarianism?" At No Dem Left Behind , we're not standing by while Trump threatens our democracy. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 10/8/2025
body:
Is Rep. Marshall’s narrow 2024 win now at risk in Douglas County?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Weld County folks! Round up your family and friends for a night of food, fun, and freedom at the **[Weld County GOP Fall Hoedown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** on **Saturday, October 25 from 5:30–9:00 PM**. The evening kicks off with a Trunk-or-Treat for kids from 5:30–6:30 PM — costumes encouraged — followed by a delicious Georgia Boys BBQ dinner and live music. It’s a chance to relax, connect, and celebrate Weld County’s strong conservative values in a family-friendly setting. Don’t miss it!
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** In Douglas County, [Rep. Bob Marshall’s narrow 2024 win is under fire](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as critics accuse him of alienating suburban voters over gun restrictions, TABOR cuts, and a secret “quadratic voting” scheme. CU Boulder is [deploying plain-clothed police](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) at football games to monitor fan behavior, while the FAA blames a [national controller shortage](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for nearly 500 DIA flight delays in one day. Denver’s [$950 million “Vibrant Denver” bond](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) drive, backed by major developers and tax-funded groups, is drawing backlash over potential long-term tax extensions. And in a first, Colorado [capped the price of Enbrel](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), an arthritis drug, at $600 per dose—hailed by consumers but condemned by drugmakers as “reckless.”
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Sen. Chuck Grassley revealed that the Biden FBI [spied on eight GOP senators](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and 92 conservative groups under “Operation Arctic Frost,” later tied to Jack Smith’s Trump probe—a scandal Grassley called “worse than Watergate.” Meanwhile, a two-year review of Hamas’ Oct. 7 attack shows U.S. and Israeli intelligence [ignored warnings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), having miscast Hamas as a political faction instead of a terror threat. Lastly, the [VA is accused of diverting medical resources](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from veterans to process cases for illegal immigrants through ICE.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Jake Fogleman warns that scrapping [Colorado’s 4.4% flat tax](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for a progressive system would devastate the economy, punish workers, and erode taxpayer protections that have fueled growth for decades, pointing to failures in Connecticut and Massachusetts.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, October 8, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Is Rep. Marshall’s narrow 2024 win now at risk in Douglas County?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Rep. Bob Marshall (D-HD43) represents one of Colorado’s most politically mixed suburban districts, covering parts of Highlands Ranch and Littleton. The area is built around families, good schools, and a long-standing belief in local control and fiscal restraint.
Marshall often calls himself a centrist Democrat and a retired Marine who puts people before politics. But his voting record at the Capitol tells a different story.
Marshall once appealed to a wide mix of voters. Whether that still holds is an open question, especially given how much the mood in Douglas County has changed. Prices have climbed. Crime feels closer. And faith in state leaders is wearing thin.
Out of Douglas County’s 323,000 registered voters, around 288,000 are active. That makes for some very tight math in every election. The political split? Pretty much three ways. Roughly 36 percent lean Republican, 28 percent Democrat, and the rest don’t claim either side.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Who’s funding Vibrant Denver? Big developers, nonprofits and tax-funded arts groups](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVERITE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Vibrant Denver bond campaign has raised over $1 million, driven by donations from developers, nonprofits, and tax-funded cultural groups, while opposition funding trails at just $3,000.
* Major Tier One institutions—including the Denver Art Museum, Denver Zoo, and Denver Botanic Gardens—each donated $50,000, saying the bond would improve public safety, accessibility, and cultural infrastructure without raising taxes.
* If approved, the $950 million bond would extend existing property taxes for several years to fund transportation, housing, health, and cultural projects—costing taxpayers up to $2 billion with interest.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Why Ditching the Flat Tax Would Be Colorado’s Biggest Mistake](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A 2026 ballot proposal backed by progressive advocacy groups seeks to replace Colorado’s 4.4% flat income tax with a five-tier progressive system with rates up to 9.5%, which critics say would make the state one of the least competitive in the nation.
* Jake Fogleman warns this change would destabilize Colorado’s economy, increase complexity for taxpayers, and undermine decades of fiscal discipline that have helped attract businesses and workers.
* He notes that no state has ever reversed from a flat tax to a progressive one successfully—citing Connecticut and Massachusetts as examples of economic decline following similar moves.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Colorado: Where Criminals Come to Stay and Play](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 6** _The FBI recently released detailed data on more than 14 million criminal offenses from calendar year 2024, reported to the Uniform Crime Reporting (UCR) Program by participating law enforcement agencies. More than 16,000 state, county, city, university, college, and tribal agencies, covering around 95.6% of the population of the United States, submitted data to the UCR Program through the National Incident-Based Reporting System and the Summary Reporting System._
__
**[“This is too important to improvise”: D49 superintendent says sports lawsuit seeks clarity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | OCTOBER 6** _Colorado Springs’ School District 49 made headlines in May when it filed a federal lawsuit challenging the state’s anti-discrimination law and CHSAA’s transgender athlete policy. “We wanted to get in front of the coming legal conflict,” he explained in an interview with RMV. “We think this is too important to improvise.”_ __

**[The Sword of the Spirit – Transformative Power](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 5** _When I was younger, I was fascinated with Disneyland in Anaheim, California. My dad had worked there, and my mom had books on Walt Disney—how he dreamed up new worlds, turned them into concepts, and then made them a reality. We’d watch shows about the planning, the struggles, and the breakthroughs. Then we’d stand in the park itself, surrounded by castles, rides, and lands that once existed only in his imagination._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|

|
---
**⚾️ DID YOU KNOW?** In baseball’s early days, **umpires didn’t stand behind home plate** — they sat in rocking chairs about 20 feet back to call the game. The National League later changed the rules in 1878, requiring home teams to pay umpires $5 per game, bringing a bit more formality (and less comfort) to America’s pastime.

Lastly, the from veterans to process cases for illegal immigrants through ICE. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... Jake Fogleman warns that scrapping for a progressive system would devastate the economy, punish workers, and erode taxpayer protections that have fueled growth for decades, pointing to failures in Connecticut and Massachusetts. This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, October 8, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY SHAINA COLE, Rep. Bob Marshall (D-HD43) represents one of Colorado’s most politically mixed suburban districts, covering parts of Highlands Ranch and Littleton. The area is built around families, good schools, and a long-standing belief in local control and fiscal restraint. Marshall often calls himself a centrist Democrat and a retired Marine who puts people before politics. But his voting record at the Capitol tells a different story. Marshall once appealed to a wide mix of voters. Whether that still holds is an open question, especially given how much the mood in Douglas County has changed. Prices have climbed. Crime feels closer. And faith in state leaders is wearing thin. Out of Douglas County’s 323,000 registered voters, around 288,000 are active. That makes for some very tight math in every election. The political split? Pretty much three ways. Roughly 36 percent lean Republican, 28 percent Democrat, and the rest don’t claim either side. | The Vibrant Denver bond campaign has raised over $1 million, driven by donations from developers, nonprofits, and tax-funded cultural groups, while opposition funding trails at just $3,000. Major Tier One institutions—including the Denver Art Museum, Denver Zoo, and Denver Botanic Gardens—each donated $50,000, saying the bond would improve public safety, accessibility, and cultural infrastructure without raising taxes. If approved, the $950 million bond would extend existing property taxes for several years to fund transportation, housing, health, and cultural projects—costing taxpayers up to $2 billion with interest. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | A 2026 ballot proposal backed by progressive advocacy groups seeks to replace Colorado’s 4.4% flat income tax with a five-tier progressive system with rates up to 9.5%, which critics say would make the state one of the least competitive in the nation. Jake Fogleman warns this change would destabilize Colorado’s economy, increase complexity for taxpayers, and undermine decades of fiscal discipline that have helped attract businesses and workers. He notes that no state has ever reversed from a flat tax to a progressive one successfully—citing Connecticut and Massachusetts as examples of economic decline following similar moves. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 6 The FBI recently released detailed data on more than 14 million criminal offenses from calendar year 2024, reported to the Uniform Crime Reporting (UCR) Program by participating law enforcement agencies. More than 16,000 state, county, city, university, college, and tribal agencies, covering around 95.6% of the population of the United States, submitted data to the UCR Program through the National Incident-Based Reporting System and the Summary Reporting System. BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | OCTOBER 6 Colorado Springs’ School District 49 made headlines in May when it filed a federal lawsuit challenging the state’s anti-discrimination law and CHSAA’s transgender athlete policy. “We wanted to get in front of the coming legal conflict,” he explained in an interview with RMV. “We think this is too important to improvise.” DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 5 When I was younger, I was fascinated with Disneyland in Anaheim, California. My dad had worked there, and my mom had books on Walt Disney—how he dreamed up new worlds, turned them into concepts, and then made them a reality. We’d watch shows about the planning, the struggles, and the breakthroughs. Then we’d stand in the park itself, surrounded by castles, rides, and lands that once existed only in his imagination. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat | | ⚾️ DID YOU KNOW? In baseball’s early days, umpires didn’t stand behind home plate — they sat in rocking chairs about 20 feet back to call the game. The National League later changed the rules in 1878, requiring home teams to pay umpires $5 per game, bringing a bit more formality (and less comfort) to America’s pastime. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "A political party cannot be all things to all people. It must represent certain fundamental beliefs which must not be compromised to political expediency or simply to swell its numbers." – Ronald Reagan | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Tony Thurmond
subject: I promise it won't be an unhappy experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026, FPPC# 1461509
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Dear Peter,
In the wake of a CBS News story featuring California’s gubernatorial candidates responding to questions on redistricting — including a viral interview between Reporter Julie Watts and former Congresswoman Katie Porter — today I respectfully called on the esteemed journalist to moderate a debate among the Democratic candidates for Governor.
Watch our side-by-side responses to the same question:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xlMFqbspaVg [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xlMFqbspaVg]
To date, there has been a series of forums in the race to determine who will be the next Governor of California, but a formal debate has yet to be held. Today, I am respectfully and officially asking CBS News to host a debate among the Democratic candidates for Governor and to invite Julie Watts to serve as moderator.
Candidates for Governor should have a respectful, thoughtful dialogue with trusted journalists like Julie to share our vision and priorities for California. The voters deserve nothing less. I hope all the candidates will participate in this debate so that voters can hear directly from all of us on the most pressing issues facing our state.
I'm in. Are you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
At a time when Donald Trump is silencing journalists who criticize him, candidates for California Governor should be available to answer substantive questions from reporters. I have never shied away from tough questions or the hard fights.
I still believe in the California dream – where public education, health care, a good-paying job, an affordable home, and a safe community are accessible to everyone. Join our movement today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Sincerely,
Tony Thurmond

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: This isn’t just a wristband. It’s a symbol of your conviction.
body:
Tell the world you’re standing for faith, family, and freedom.

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhZU/?__vbtrk=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Patriot, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That’s the rally cry on the lips of millions of Americans – and the message they’re carrying out into the world with their “We are Charlie Kirk” wristbands. We want you to have one. To be a part of the incredible movement carrying Charlie’s legacy forward. **When you make a gift of any amount today, we’ll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the movement Charlie started and the mission we carry on.**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhZU/?__vbtrk=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ **Carry the Torch Charlie Lit
Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhZU/?__vbtrk=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
This isn’t just a wristband, friend. It’s a symbol of bold conviction. It’s a tribute to Charlie’s legacy of courage. **And when you wear it, you’re sending a statement.** You’re declaring that you stand for America. For faith, for family, and for freedom. _And most of all, for the vision Charlie ignited._ Your donation will help carry this vision forward and fuel the next generation of leaders who will defend these values — and never surrender. **And when you give any amount today, we’ll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhZU/?__vbtrk=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0Njc0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Cori Bush
subject: Brick by brick, month by month.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act]
You were there when I needed you the most, Peter. I don’t take that for granted.
Now, I’m running for Congress again, and every insider and special interest that wants us to fail is watching. They’re waiting to see if we can raise the money it takes to run this campaign. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me again as I run for Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act]
If we fall short, they’ll say our movement is finished. If we rise up together, they’ll see the truth: we still have fight in us.
When I ran before, we shocked the establishment by building a campaign powered by people, not special interests. We did it once, and we can do it again. But we’ll need a steady base of support that shows we’re in this for the long haul.
To win , we need to prove that this campaign has the strength, energy, and grassroots power to win.
That’s why I’m asking you to become a monthly supporter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act&recurring=1] today.
Your recurring gift is more than a donation; it’s a commitment to keeping this movement alive. It’s an opportunity to show up for St. Louis and what matters most to our communities.
Will you join me with a monthly gift of $5, $10, or $20 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act&recurring=1]
BECOME A MONTHLY SUPPORTER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act&recurring=1]
Every brick counts. Every month matters. Together, we’re building a movement that can’t be bought and won’t be silenced.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251008_brickbybrick_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]

**I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges — unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games.**
I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care more about billionaires than working families – they deserve leaders who actually understand the struggles we face.
I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I are still paying off student loans.
**That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real results for families, not playing Washington political games.**
But all our progress is on the line in this election.
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report_ , Larry _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ , and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a**pure toss-up. **
It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but **TWO** of my *three* GOP opponents.
But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**
**[So please: Split a donation between me and the Arizona Democratic Party and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116877593/574725542/-1501784862?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ2OTgzOTktODhhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vrnXKG3bAlP4QLvx6VQvA9Gasn5WWIrXF9tpvKQzHSg=)**

Peter, it’s
Katie. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for
re-election as governor of Arizona.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-hobbs.dx4XkQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=5039%2E35263%2EdwakJg ]If you’re with me, will you split a donation between me and Tammy
Baldwin and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign? This race
is already being called the most competitive toss-up governor’s race in
2026, and I’m counting on your early support to power us to victory.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Tammy Baldwin and Katie Hobbs will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-hobbs.cYj26r&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=5039%2E35263%2EdwakJg ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-hobbs.jXOwmB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=5039%2E35263%2EdwakJg ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m running to serve you for four more years because our work to deliver
on the Arizona Promise has only just begun. From cutting taxes for
middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans, to lowering
childcare costs, to erasing medical debt for over 350,000 Arizonans, I’m
focused on creating real solutions for our state’s toughest challenges —
unlike the Washington politicians who prefer to play partisan games.

I’m proud to be the first social worker ever elected governor in this
country. Arizonans don’t need out-of-touch, career politicians who care
more about billionaires than working families — they deserve leaders who
actually understand the struggles we face.

I know what working families are going through — because I’ve lived it. I
grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. I worked at
Burger King and Pizza Hut to put myself through school. I lost my home in
the Great Recession. I drove for Uber to make ends meet. My husband and I
are still paying off student loans.

That’s why every decision I make as governor is about delivering real
results for families, not playing Washington political games.

But all our progress is on the line in this election.

Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s
race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to
spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the Cook
Political Report, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and Inside Elections have
already called this race a pure toss-up.

It’s why Trump has endorsed not one, but TWO of my *three* GOP opponents.

But unlike my Trump-endorsed opponents, I don’t have a vast personal
fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far
better: You.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-hobbs.dx4XkQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=5039%2E35263%2EdwakJg ]So please: Split a donation between me and Tammy and become a Founding
Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in 2022,
and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country
and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Tammy Baldwin and Katie Hobbs will go through immediately:
