name: Wesley Bell
subject: Day 8 of the shutdown and still no plan from Republicans.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
So far, Republicans are unwilling to work with us to find any real solutions. Peter,

We're now on **Day 8** of the GOP's government shutdown. Washington gridlock is hurting hardworking families who deserve better across St. Louis and the nation. But Donald Trump is twisting the knife and threatening to block furloughed federal workers from receiving back pay once the shutdown is over.

Let's be clear: Families shouldn't have to worry about missing a paycheck or losing access to services they've earned just because extreme Republicans want to play political games with people's lives.

Extreme Republicans in Congress _still_ don't have a plan to protect folks from rising health care costs or to reopen our government. **And so far, they are unwilling to work with Democrats to find any real solutions.**

But I'm staying in this fight with House Democrats to get things moving again.

Democrats will keep showing up, fighting for solutions, and standing with the people who hired us to do this job, no matter what.

In solidarity,

Wesley

name: Tobias Read
subject: BREAKING: Judge temporarily blocks President Trump from deploying troops in Portland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251008em-ob2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251008em-ob2]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Federal troops have arrived in Portland.
This is not a drill. This is not politics as usual. This is an outright challenge to our communities, our rights, and the very authority of our state.
Thankfully, a federal judge has temporarily blocked this overreach, calling it what it is: An attack on Oregon’s sovereignty.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251008em-ob2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251008em-ob2]
But the threat isn’t gone. The administration plans to appeal, and they will try again. Oregon can’t and won’t stand down.
As Secretary of State, I stand with every Oregonian who believes our state should be governed by the people who live here — not by authoritarian overreach from Washington, D.C.
Will you join me in standing up for what's right? I’m fighting to protect our democracy and our city from federal intimidation, but your support makes my fight possible. Every contribution helps us fight back, organize our communities, and ensure Oregon’s voice is heard loud and clear. I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251008em-ob2]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251008em-ob2]
They may have federal resources, but we have the power of a united Oregon. Let’s make sure they never forget it.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State

This is an outright challenge to our communities, our rights, and the very authority of our state. Thankfully, a federal judge has temporarily blocked this overreach, calling it what it is: An attack on Oregon’s sovereignty. [] But the threat isn’t gone. The administration plans to appeal, and they will try again. Oregon can’t and won’t stand down. As Secretary of State, I stand with every Oregonian who believes our state should be governed by the people who live here — not by authoritarian overreach from Washington, D.C. Will you join me in standing up for what's right? I’m fighting to protect our democracy and our city from federal intimidation, but your support makes my fight possible. Every contribution helps us fight back, organize our communities, and ensure Oregon’s voice is heard loud and clear. I count on you? [] DONATE NOW [] They may have federal resources, but we have the power of a united Oregon. Let’s make sure they never forget it. Thank you, Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State [] CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
The entire country is watching this race
There are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.
[**All eyes are on New Jersey, and this race is a toss-up. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Deb Haaland today to help me win and chart a better path forward for my state and our country?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251008_1_split.doPeDM&refcode=em20251008-4927&t=1&akid=4927%2E400544%2E-03RzX)

Thank you,
Mikie

name: LaTosha Brown and Cliff Albright (via Fair Fight Action)
subject: [New Report] A Supreme Court case that could rig control of the U.S. House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
We’re meeting the moment to confront a massive attempt at voter suppression. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878600/574729103/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251008_T1_BVMSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM2ZGUwZC04YmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAHgRcsnTAQh-dOy8k5lshpuLsoiz6bjV4WIdfc3GYg=&emci=ff35de0d-8ba4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1136de0d-8ba4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)

| | In one week, the Supreme Court will re-hear a case where they could strike down Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and remove protections against discriminatory redistricting maps, which could lock in one-party rule of the U.S. House of Representatives. According to a new joint report penned by my organization, Black Voters Matter, and Fair Fight Action, taking away this section of the Voting Rights Act would open the floodgates to discriminatory mapmaking, particularly in the South, effectively gutting the political power of Black voters and other voters of color. **Our analysis shows that this could lock in an estimated 27 additional safe U.S. House seats for the GOP, with at least 19 in the South directly tied to striking down Section 2.** Combined with Republicans’ mid-decade gerrymandering scheme in states like Texas and Missouri, a ruling against Section 2 could allow them to cement one-party control of the U.S. House for at least a generation. **It’s all part of the MAGA operation’s strategy to create a new “Solid South.”** Black Voters Matter and Fair Fight Action are meeting this massive voter suppression attempt by organizing the strongest pro-voting backlash of Black voters and allies’ power we’ve ever seen. We’re supporting local leaders in key states, growing our grassroots networks, and demanding that the Supreme Court and Congress protect our maps from discriminatory redistricting ahead of the 2026 midterm elections and beyond. [**As someone born and raised in the South, this hits home for me. But this fight for the Voting Rights Act affects voters everywhere. Will you split a donation between Fair Fight Action and Black Voters Matter to help mount an effective fight against the MAGA movement’s anti-democracy strategy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878601/574729104/-1941948355?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251008_T1_BVMSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM2ZGUwZC04YmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAHgRcsnTAQh-dOy8k5lshpuLsoiz6bjV4WIdfc3GYg=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878602/574729105/-1941948355?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251008_T1_BVMSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM2ZGUwZC04YmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAHgRcsnTAQh-dOy8k5lshpuLsoiz6bjV4WIdfc3GYg=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878603/574729106/-1941948355?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251008_T1_BVMSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM2ZGUwZC04YmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAHgRcsnTAQh-dOy8k5lshpuLsoiz6bjV4WIdfc3GYg=)

---|---
The Voting Rights Act has been one of the most successful pieces of legislation in our country’s history. End of sentence. When it was passed, it had an immediate impact on increasing Black voter registration rates and protected Black voters’ access to the ballot.
And by prohibiting lawmakers of any party from adopting redistricting maps that have racially discriminatory effects, Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act works to fulfill the guarantee of the 14th and 15th Amendments that minority voters must have equal voting rights. A decision against Section 2 would be a huge loss for both Black Voters Matter and Fair Fight Action in our work to protect our freedom to vote.
**We can’t allow MAGA to eviscerate the voting power of communities of color – fair representation is a critical piece of our democracy’s foundation. The window for action is closing rapidly, and the consequences of inaction are generational.**
[**Find out more about the damage this Supreme Court case could do to our democracy by reading our new report.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878608/574729111/-1777104539?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251008_T1_BVMSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM2ZGUwZC04YmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAHgRcsnTAQh-dOy8k5lshpuLsoiz6bjV4WIdfc3GYg=&emci=ff35de0d-8ba4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1136de0d-8ba4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)
[READ THE REPORT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878609/574729112/-1777104539?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251008_T1_BVMSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM2ZGUwZC04YmE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAHgRcsnTAQh-dOy8k5lshpuLsoiz6bjV4WIdfc3GYg=&emci=ff35de0d-8ba4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1136de0d-8ba4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)

And thank you for every action you’ve taken in solidarity with Fair Fight Action. At make-or-break moments like these, we must be able to lean on each other, and I’m grateful to be on this team with you.

clean_body: We’re meeting the moment to confront a massive attempt at voter suppression. | | | In one week, the Supreme Court will re-hear a case where they could strike down Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and remove protections against discriminatory redistricting maps, which could lock in one-party rule of the U.S. House of Representatives. According to a new joint report penned by my organization, Black Voters Matter, and Fair Fight Action, taking away this section of the Voting Rights Act would open the floodgates to discriminatory mapmaking, particularly in the South, effectively gutting the political power of Black voters and other voters of color. Our analysis shows that this could lock in an estimated 27 additional safe U.S. House seats for the GOP, with at least 19 in the South directly tied to striking down Section 2. Combined with Republicans’ mid-decade gerrymandering scheme in states like Texas and Missouri, a ruling against Section 2 could allow them to cement one-party control of the U.S. House for at least a generation. It’s all part of the MAGA operation’s strategy to create a new “Solid South.” Black Voters Matter and Fair Fight Action are meeting this massive voter suppression attempt by organizing the strongest pro-voting backlash of Black voters and allies’ power we’ve ever seen. We’re supporting local leaders in key states, growing our grassroots networks, and demanding that the Supreme Court and Congress protect our maps from discriminatory redistricting ahead of the 2026 midterm elections and beyond. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- The Voting Rights Act has been one of the most successful pieces of legislation in our country’s history. End of sentence. When it was passed, it had an immediate impact on increasing Black voter registration rates and protected Black voters’ access to the ballot. And by prohibiting lawmakers of any party from adopting redistricting maps that have racially discriminatory effects, Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act works to fulfill the guarantee of the 14th and 15th Amendments that minority voters must have equal voting rights. A decision against Section 2 would be a huge loss for both Black Voters Matter and Fair Fight Action in our work to protect our freedom to vote. We can’t allow MAGA to eviscerate the voting power of communities of color – fair representation is a critical piece of our democracy’s foundation. The window for action is closing rapidly, and the consequences of inaction are generational. And thank you for every action you’ve taken in solidarity with Fair Fight Action. At make-or-break moments like these, we must be able to lean on each other, and I’m grateful to be on this team with you. LaTosha Brown and Cliff Albright Co-founders, Black Voters Matter = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: One voter at a time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Our mission boils down to one thing: Increasing voter participation across the country.
A participation rate for eligible voters that hovers below 70% in most elections is abysmally low. That means millions of our fellow Americans feel disengaged, or feel their vote is meaningless, or are being outright suppressed by the policies where they live. We're working to change that, one voter at a time.
Please, Team, RUSH $25 or more right now to fuel our efforts to educate Americans about their rights, get them registered, and turn them out to vote in the next election >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100825_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
folks,
We're gearing up to engage voters across the country ahead of next year's crucial midterm elections. That means meeting voters where they are , from young voters to voters of color to disabled voters who need mail-in ballots to cast a ballot.
With the ongoing threats to our right to vote and efforts to restrict access to the ballot, our work to mobilize these voters is more important than ever. That’s why we’re making it a priority to help potential new voters make a lifelong habit of voting, return lapsed voters to the process, and make sure long-term voters can still participate.
This work doesn't happen overnight , and getting people in every corner of the nation excited to vote requires a lot of resources. We're starting now, a year ahead of these elections, in order to make a worthwhile investment to reach voters however we can.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like what we, the people, want it to be. But to reach these voters and get them involved, we need your help .
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us reach every voter we can ahead of theses midterm elections? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100825_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100825_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100825_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100825_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100825_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100825_2&amount=35]
There's a lot we've started doing, but your support will give us the resources we need to keep it going from today through next year's critical mid-terms.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Turnout Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100825_2&amount=20]

name: President Trump
subject: If I say please, will you answer my first question?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207o51j40608031exkrah739muac8l8i4vcghgs19893gxor63igtox1e4a0yj6vat04y2hot8tm666jkxh&__stmp=t3u0cd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3ercs1299s748suurj04w2s76z19p1nx95bijxfpkwad4g3k2tcjo0g1smzfnbo83aoyngcsqtuux76ketom0iicagh0oi6mf1m5erdyfydddaufvt8z7x3t695orery5bhrhfb4pa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3ercs1299s748suurj04w2s76z19p1nx95bijxfpkwad4g3k2tcjo0g1smzfnbo83aoyngcsqtuux76ketom0iicagh0oi6mf1m5erdyfydddaufvt8z7x3t695orery5bhrhfb4pa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cd&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Donald Trump promised to unleash hell and you won’t believe what happened next
body:
President Trump faced a crisis. [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=22iq9naceuk62laqr7npogdvp416ii9edgm62677ts1t3ain94lfw6hz77aml5ygro9dwsul9s4ii4jg5wv3r6dvycsmhw40zug5j10bxgfssd9q5y23q2jnjg1huovmpxv0356ucpvte2y9aaytwtpkq6wezks7309qh0vz1s7zbs8jqadecjxomol9l26czl4kpqnytqgzsgimjuqudux4fm0d43v2l9fbwx3rxrxbc0h0tnk8yo3ke9xefla344klzlb6by4qqo4h5eapu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3u0cl&__onlt=h&ocx_contact_id=5afc5ff347bb03be3f8e35b3)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: This Is What Momentum Looks Like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
We're going to win. Are you in?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.fSqNMeAedC1MJCf4N8Rl24vhHC-pQ8lGo_KVam-2-ws?) for more
---
# [This Is What Momentum Looks Like](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=175655350&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1NjU1MzUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTk5NTgzNDMsImV4cCI6MTc2MjU1MDM0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XY1bs661c-RkQN6QtcL3W5_CQxiYBnBaLBdWtYmj_P4)
### We're going to win. Are you in?
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Oct 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..ITAlQqlVb5vqHXtkTAQP8Zd7cdCoW7dFWI8vCyMDRro?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/this-is-what-momentum-looks-like?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi team,
I've got some big news to share, straight from the heart of our campaign:
**We just outraised every other Democrat in this race.**
That's right. My team and I announced this morning that we raised more last quarter than any Democrat running for Michigan's open U.S. Senate seat.
I'm blown away and so incredibly grateful for the grassroots support my campaign has received.
But it's not just about the dollars. It's about what those dollars represent: the teachers, auto workers, nurses, retirees, parents, and truck drivers -- people who chipped in five bucks at a time because they believe in this grassroots campaign. And they're willing to stand up and join me in fighting for the workers who built this country.
That's humbling. _And it 's powerful._
**It tells me our momentum is real. Our message is resonating. And our movement is growing.**
Let me tell you something else: Over the past several months, polls have consistently shown **I 'm the best Democrat to defeat the Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers.**
_Why?_ Because Michiganders know I show up and listen, I tell the truth, and I'm always going to fight for them.
They also know I have a winning record:
* I flipped a longtime Republican district blue in 2018.
* I helped save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession while working on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
* I've consistently delivered for working families in Congress on health care, jobs, infrastructure, and more.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to keep doing what I've always done -- fight for the people I love and make our government actually work for them.
But here's the truth: **There 's so much at stake, so we can't afford to get this wrong.**
This is the battleground race that experts say could ultimately decide Senate control. Trump and his MAGA megadonors know it -- which is why they're lining up behind Mike Rogers and preparing to spend tens of millions of dollars to flip this seat red. **They almost succeeded in 2024, losing by just 0.34% of the vote.**
That's why early, strong, and consistent support matters. And it's why I'm so proud of what we've built. We're powered by grassroots supporters who are ready to get in this fight.
So if you've been watching this race, reading these emails, and wondering when to get involved, I've got a message for you: **This is the moment.**
We've got the polling. We've got the people. We've got the momentum.****_**Now, we just need you.**_
**If you 're able to, can you chip in to fuel our campaign, defeat Mike Rogers, and help Democrats flip the Senate?**
[Chip in now](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/88ac79b6-b8e4-41f2-990f-f450f0e75164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for being in this fight with me. Let's win this.
More soon.
--Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in $5 today?
[DONATE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5e08a52a-c6e9-4de7-977b-7075553312aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan.

---

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Josh Harder
subject: Even Marjorie Taylor Greene agrees with me on this 😳
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878807/574729861/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQzMzk5M2QtOGNhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHdk9jZ9_5tMU4hQm-mlhWUVIUXJxRzA4O6zZjBpCQs=) | Peter, it’s Josh. I can’t believe I’m about to say this, but... I agree with Marjorie Taylor Greene. Here’s why. You’ve been hearing about how healthcare costs are about to skyrocket for people who get insurance from the Affordable Care Act (ACA). When President Obama signed the ACA into law, it made healthcare more affordable for millions of families. Over the years, Congress has continually expanded ACA tax credits — lowering costs and helping people stay covered during tough times. But now those tax credits are set to expire at the end of the year. MAGA Republicans are refusing to pass an extension, and that means families will start getting notices soon that their premiums are going to double in January. **Healthcare is personal to me. My brother was born with a pre-existing condition and when our Congressman voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, I decided to run against him and won.** Here’s where it gets wild: Even Marjorie Taylor Greene agrees with me. She said last night that letting these tax credits expire is a bad idea._I had to re-read her statement a few times because I was so shocked._ For the sake of our families, I’m glad she’s seen the light? Now we have more work to do to convince Trump and Speaker Johnson to think the same. [_**If you agree that politicians should stop playing politics with people’s healthcare, please chip in now to help me keep up the fight in Congress!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878808/574729862/-596618888?&refcode=E15604-20251007-HealthcareExplainer-SL-HealthCare&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQzMzk5M2QtOGNhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHdk9jZ9_5tMU4hQm-mlhWUVIUXJxRzA4O6zZjBpCQs=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878809/574729863/-596618888?express_lane=true&&refcode=E15604-20251007-HealthcareExplainer-EG-HealthCare&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQzMzk5M2QtOGNhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHdk9jZ9_5tMU4hQm-mlhWUVIUXJxRzA4O6zZjBpCQs=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116878810/574729864/-596618888?express_lane=true&&refcode=E15604-20251007-HealthcareExplainer-EG-HealthCare&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQzMzk5M2QtOGNhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHdk9jZ9_5tMU4hQm-mlhWUVIUXJxRzA4O6zZjBpCQs=)**

clean_body: | = | Peter, it’s Josh. I can’t believe I’m about to say this, but... I agree with Marjorie Taylor Greene. Here’s why. You’ve been hearing about how healthcare costs are about to skyrocket for people who get insurance from the Affordable Care Act (ACA). When President Obama signed the ACA into law, it made healthcare more affordable for millions of families. Over the years, Congress has continually expanded ACA tax credits — lowering costs and helping people stay covered during tough times. But now those tax credits are set to expire at the end of the year. MAGA Republicans are refusing to pass an extension, and that means families will start getting notices soon that their premiums are going to double in January. Healthcare is personal to me. My brother was born with a pre-existing condition and when our Congressman voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, I decided to run against him and won. Here’s where it gets wild: Even Marjorie Taylor Greene agrees with me. She said last night that letting these tax credits expire is a bad idea.I had to re-read her statement a few times because I was so shocked. For the sake of our families, I’m glad she’s seen the light? Now we have more work to do to convince Trump and Speaker Johnson to think the same. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- — Josh *

name: Mark Kelly & Ruben Gallego
subject: We had an interesting talk with Mike Johnson today…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.Mark Kelly
And Ruben Gallego.Ruben Gallego |
| Today, in the Capitol, we had an unexpected conversation with Mike Johnson about reopening the government and swearing in Adelita Grijalva.Mark Kelly
Johnson didn’t want to have that conversation.Ruben Gallego |
| He didn’t want to talk about millions of people seeing their health insurance premiums doubling.Mark Kelly
He didn’t want to talk about how he refuses to swear in our friend, Adelita Grijalva, after she won her election to the House.Ruben Gallego |
| And, of course, he tried to put the blame back on us — instead of on himself and Trump, where it should be. Mark Kelly
That’s what we’ve come to expect right now, from a bunch of folks who’d rather shut down the government than help out the American people.Ruben Gallego |
| It doesn't have to be this way, but that’s where we’re at... and it’s a real shame. Mark Kelly
But we’re not going to let up. Not a chance.Ruben Gallego |
| And if you have our back, we've got a humble request: [Can you please use this link and chip in $5 to Ruben?](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct25.OOqsxV&refcode=em21008-1-f&t=1&akid=4014%2E734936%2Eu3qqxw)Mark Kelly
It’d mean the world to have your support.Ruben Gallego |
| Even just a few bucks ads up fast when a ton of people chip in together.Mark Kelly
But we know not everyone can donate.Ruben Gallego |
| That’s why it’s so important that you do, if you can. Mark Kelly
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct25.OOqsxV&refcode=em21008-1-f&t=2&akid=4014%2E734936%2Eu3qqxw)
* * *
Thanks for your help — really. It means a lot.
– Mark Kelly & Ruben Gallego –

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=4014%2E734936%2Eu3qqxw). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4014%2E734936%2Eu3qqxw). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4014_734936_u3qqxw&akid=4014%2E734936%2Eu3qqxw)

[_**At this critical moment, we’re asking if you’ll make a donation of any amount to our anti-gerrymandering fund to support fair maps and fair elections in our state?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116879314/574731611/-1275564556?refcode=251008vp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkMGYwOS04ZWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KapntYDjD9llC1-87N0qbfVIneBNYDA9Z663W4wwJMs=) The federal government is shut down, veterans are going without critical services and Hoosier families are struggling under tariff taxes. Democrats are focused on solving those issues for our families while Republicans only focus on how to win more power. [_**It’s time to end the Republican stranglehold on our democracy. [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=61bbe71b52124730a69271c9bafbfc4b&_e=3K0tErhWzd2x8HqNbe2EPXUyzYluv5BhpHN_Em2dljo9v6DxN1UMx0E2UxzbSz8N8RUPEtw0yQFJ5Ojm-Z8wzZm6BuWxLRgExJwP9omOEIWd131VCOqE5KJ0u1qMMhYJqMPiJS9eFlGq5Id4BhZeaYt6Sqso4HsZO1keiV-Frhy1vpIYKQ1IjuOvOqzhRrAniLsANe7WeSCCE8s-JTZ54MGoEg1BhKvxbTrSO8MIKXQ2AzCZgMo2dBfX_KRtXUstbmehRGUggQonm7pteIkQyAld8eQ7bHhsqXiMVF2OWghtbazIE_4TK_ISBIZmhS1tK1qC6N0NckGzEae__9ARYZ0CmyiWOW_8nEjNq9V2kXt2SijlD7o-7uHnLBc1sYziNpxlkk4gunEPsktnPI0na2fHWdCgBgT5Be4iUDaJ5aBTP9WaCFku3Mi8agdb2xvH1LFpq93_G9QtHyp02DKk_O3Nyed47PXd8xHCBqUxb0B_mJyPf_6SkSHzzJLj_JMhzgyRmPDHmzs59MFZWoWC1izbkixvi1sMJTMKsLGMoDUhnyAxFq5Lfl2T8u2FVNmX44ql6E-LdVogo5WtZye9ZITZMr9cELSPX7U8DBHOEAa-bgsOjp83aAIxh2JJGcy_xpMXgV9PYs0PYc0aBGBUog%3D%3D) Semper Fi. Always faithful.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=61bbe71b52124730a69271c9bafbfc4b&_e=3K0tErhWzd2x8HqNbe2EPXUyzYluv5BhpHN_Em2dljo9v6DxN1UMx0E2UxzbSz8N8RUPEtw0yQFJ5Ojm-Z8wzZm6BuWxLRgExJwP9omOEIWd131VCOqE5KJ0u1qMMhYJqMPiJS9eFlGq5Id4BhZeaYt6Sqso4HsZO1keiV-Frhy1vpIYKQ1IjuOvOqzhRrAniLsANe7WeSCCE8s-JTZ54MGoEg1BhKvxbTrSO8MIKXQ-T3x6zRFXRA3QY3stt2iux0KOfc_BbjVAt28VipYsQNFb-ctBwKnu0r1VRLWFq-BJRR76eG1tr8IVJ3N9a4lWam3b7TOG_Xdz4p6H7jCBi-HQVYlpePnjAEM8A3gN6rqvnV38tFYyEQxws_Ybc8G6lLO0YodjZPlbmEKhVw6122dj8t-_VykGUj2RlCiFpFCvSNvCoDlHGZ_rFSzLUmFZgsjdLLtAmQBsW9lVZmDPQcyCzzSg9_eaYv6iAIE_Oka8e2FMK0Hp_LG1L7zWkFnakl2wEi_fsigXWami3gTwV8RhpYI7AhEcwyY2lL8X0cTrvFAZxhC2R4ieby-pbuZkt6d8NVUAXNxI9mtLyBBuDk7pZA2NYXyqKdmam63fKdEa2gGDv0aRLEgJwFr_KP-bbWnpkx0e7FC3Atq1kDPD3w%3D%3D) And to that, I say absolutely.
Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.
I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.
[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today—even if it’s just a few bucks—to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=61bbe71b52124730a69271c9bafbfc4b&_e=3K0tErhWzd2x8HqNbe2EPXUyzYluv5BhpHN_Em2dljo9v6DxN1UMx0E2UxzbSz8N8RUPEtw0yQFJ5Ojm-Z8wzZm6BuWxLRgExJwP9omOEIWd131VCOqE5KJ0u1qMMhYJqMPiJS9eFlGq5Id4BhZeaYt6Sqso4HsZO1keiV-Frhy1vpIYKQ1IjuOvOqzhRrAniLsANe7WeSCCE8s-JTZ54MGoEg1BhKvxbTrSO8MIKXRB79zmQ__t3pC-yC1wkzd0EDNuAtdoKcxLIEqfGtOrJeKLg_GDtrK6QUQ8syEbY4jDmJ83TYtGqnsWHcBshuS3aS06cNM76m0_TmGuAQXOJAMkkLpLoR63UhZpMg6kkWZ2YIywTtwioe5sqbgm-FwVsgjl4Eqz2dvkRgBfmpEO37FxGijnqIomCnBfjlkiti7HDrxIve_D8-XqtUOA9_HH3WzEZeKudg13bv4dPacmFdhDK2qhKFb4M33hYxI666UE1_F7vFYr2fKQzH3-bfmvSd-eUWKJHs8HU_K3scK5HZg6GbABTOGundBFuSlrApBv8ZVBX4suSlkqrHh9sg-jG8PnlyV2Hd6Gl7UIeOFrRphhzx_1UoTeH7m_8DsPLdkm6Gie9lvnb9DBQJTPvUTT9olYgpwhfWWTsCr_2Hjl_w%3D%3D) [ CHIP IN HERE >>

clean_body: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia * I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Wes Moore
subject: This is a longer email about saying goodbye, and the path ahead
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)
This is a longer email about saying goodbye, Peter, but if you don’t have time to read through, I would deeply appreciate **[a contribution to power our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-2?refcode=em-20251008-2&refcode2=729_1086043_RFA72B&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)**
After nearly a century of operation, Valley Forge Military Academy — the place where I went to school and grew from an angry, complicated child to a confident young man — will be closing.
When my mother first sent me to the Forge, she saw military school as a last resort in response to a seemingly endless chain of misbehavior, both at home and at school. At age 11, I’d already felt handcuffs on my wrists. **I was not on a path to success.**
There was no overnight miracle when I started school there, but slowly, things changed. I learned about honor, code, and service. I started to take an interest in campus life, academics, and leadership positions — and I rose up the ranks and became a first captain in command of around 800 cadets.
After graduation, I went on to study at Johns Hopkins and Oxford, deployed to Afghanistan with the 82nd Airborne Division, ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country, and now, I serve as the 63rd governor of Maryland _and the first Black governor in the history of my state._
What saddens me most isn’t losing a place I once called home. My memories will forever live on with me.
**It saddens me that other young men like me will have one fewer avenue to challenge themselves and build their own pathway to success.**
Peter, at a time where our young men and boys are falling behind and feeling isolated, we have to offer more paths for connection and engagement.
I know Valley Forge Military Academy did that for me, and I’m determined to find ways to do that for young Marylanders today.
That includes the **Maryland Corps and Service Year Option** — the first statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of paid, full-time community service on the path to college or a career.
We have to help young Marylanders find the thing that guides them on a pathway to success and that inspires them to serve. **[If you support that mission, I would appreciate a donation to keep me in the fight as Maryland's governor today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-2?refcode=em-20251008-2&refcode2=729_1086043_RFA72B&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251008-2?refcode=em-20251008-2&refcode2=729_1086043_RFA72B&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)
_Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense._

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251008-2&t=2&refcode2=729_1086043_RFA72B&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=729%2E1086043%2ERFA72B)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Derek Tran
subject: Troops in our cities? Absolutely not.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116879430/574732186/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVhOGVlMmMtOGZhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MFm3yDqbO70Q1czShRdUl7K0MDeCEt2z-VA0WrD2MBE=)
Friend,

The headlines out of Washington are all about the shutdown, but what’s getting far less attention is one of the most alarming abuses of power we’ve seen from the Trump regime.

**Trump and his Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, told U.S. generals to treat cities like Chicago and Los Angeles as “training grounds” for our military -- as if our own communities were combat zones.**

Our streets are being framed as battlegrounds against an “enemy within.” And any generals who refuse to go along with this plan risk being fired.

We’re already seeing troop movements in Los Angeles, Portland, and Chicago -- cities singled out by Trump himself.

This is real. It’s not another one of Trump’s wild exaggerations. This is part of a coordinated effort to normalize the militarization of American cities. And it comes just as Stephen Miller announced a sweeping new “law and order” initiative aimed at Democratic-led states.

I’ve confronted Pete Hegseth directly when he tried to use troops in Los Angeles before, and I’ll use every tool at my disposal, legal and legislative, to stop Trump from turning our neighborhoods into military zones.

But I can’t do it alone.

**[Add your name to make it clear: our troops defend the Constitution -- they don’t police our cities. Then spread the word. Share this message. Talk about it. Make noise.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116879432/574732189/58543563?refcode=em-10.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVhOGVlMmMtOGZhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MFm3yDqbO70Q1czShRdUl7K0MDeCEt2z-VA0WrD2MBE=&emci=8c277726-8fa4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5a8ee2c-8fa4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27336212)**

The more Americans who speak out, the harder it becomes for Trump and Hegseth to turn our cities into battlegrounds.

Derek

clean_body: | = Friend, The headlines out of Washington are all about the shutdown, but what’s getting far less attention is one of the most alarming abuses of power we’ve seen from the Trump regime. Trump and his Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, told U.S. generals to treat cities like Chicago and Los Angeles as “training grounds” for our military -- as if our own communities were combat zones. Our streets are being framed as battlegrounds against an “enemy within.” And any generals who refuse to go along with this plan risk being fired. We’re already seeing troop movements in Los Angeles, Portland, and Chicago -- cities singled out by Trump himself. This is real. It’s not another one of Trump’s wild exaggerations. This is part of a coordinated effort to normalize the militarization of American cities. And it comes just as Stephen Miller announced a sweeping new “law and order” initiative aimed at Democratic-led states. I’ve confronted Pete Hegseth directly when he tried to use troops in Los Angeles before, and I’ll use every tool at my disposal, legal and legislative, to stop Trump from turning our neighborhoods into military zones. But I can’t do it alone. | The more Americans who speak out, the harder it becomes for Trump and Hegseth to turn our cities into battlegrounds. Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. name: Sitting ducks
subject: MAGA unveils Manhattan Project to kill Dem party
body:
If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEFJcqNVI_h2glNZ58C6IMUoWVnYoeJclSO0y120c2OJ_iB2iRprUD9bIQcHQgS8PBOBmY7p1zFIowZLV_63b1ZZEk1vbtmoduHFWNzdlaef73ynI92ANIUOv_3P26Ofq0jwjnu4QlA42BpG7E-dYvNdPM66ZAd_X_f_rOR1cKDGHLajZV5ydPACN-oddgsuNR0soUMgYsI4Q77aGo90KcWIsmSOpRRl&c=zZVlDyiIHpay3R4cKs4J2FMrnT-n5zk9Pll-92hNWN1wIbxZYe-TJw==&ch=qZkzpi0VBDnYv0O7ZEF3dlC7LJ-sZaPv1Gl-BGhbNjA_kS1ed2hcWw==)

| Peter,
This is an all hands on deck emergency.
Today MAGA-aligned groups unveiled, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon that will give them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection.
This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this:

| | | | Project Doorstrike will blanket PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop.
Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November, now only 60 days away and they are leaving nothing to chance.
We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country.
There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" with only a portion of the resources MAGA has--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race.
The truth is that Democrats are getting massively outspent here 10-1, and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again.
[Defend Our Courts is on the verge of something big, but we can't save these judges without everyone pitching in and doing what they can to help. We have only 27 days left to mount a counteroffensive to beat MAGA's Project Doorstrike. name: Katie Hobbs
subject: I’m officially running:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.uf73w9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]Katie Hobbs

Derek, this is
Governor Katie Hobbs. I wanted you to hear it from me first:

I’m officially running for re-election as governor of Arizona.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.uf73w9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]If you’re with me, will you split a donation between me and Adam Schiff
and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign? Political experts
agree that this race is going to be a pure toss-up, and that means we
can’t win this without you.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Katie Hobbs and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.RxNn75&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.Pd_-BX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.u0GMOu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.DrsTrj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.Ax--6h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.uf73w9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I don’t have the story of a typical politician.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.uf73w9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]Throwback photo of Katie Hobbs

I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. When my dad was
between jobs, my family relied on our church community and food stamps to
get by.

I got my first job at 16, working at Burger King and then Pizza Hut to put
myself through high school and college. My husband and I raised our kids
through the Great Recession, experienced a home foreclosure, and we’re
still paying off our student loans.

Even after I was elected to public office, I took a second job driving for
Uber to make sure my kids had Christmas presents.

So when I say this work is personal to me, I mean it. I know deeply what
it’s like to do whatever it takes to provide for your family.

As governor, I’ve always pledged to fight just as hard every day for your
family as I fought for mine – and that’s what I promise to keep doing when
re-elected.

Over the last three years, we’ve cut taxes for middle-class families,
small businesses, and veterans. We lowered childcare costs so working
parents aren’t saddled with yet another expense. We erased medical debt
for more than 350,000 Arizonans.

But all our progress is on the line in this race.

Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s
race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to
spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the Cook
Political Report, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and Inside Elections have
already called this race a pure toss-up.

Unlike my THREE GOP opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or
far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: You.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.uf73w9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]So please: Split a donation between me and Adam Schiff and become a
Founding Donor of my re-election campaign today. We won by less than 1% in
2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the
country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Katie Hobbs and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs_em_hobbs2025.RxNn75&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=9059%2E5257348%2Ejc6UrZ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

Patriot, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c51ab4aa58074733be8de3ab9e2fb4ec&_e=v69CVqO33hEF8zHlBLesxssZyNdEMWEGgTeGroGSozbMUTfXAf_r83SM4dTSy-rEX0FS-SVAx7VYuXndQBfw5Fja0TFxAZ8HAG7trtLoA5alHPSjwEDh4WdpN011uVEDh969U5uxHSA62WzuYa8M9cgAZn3DxE3Y13gP6R0M-RM9F75lTgUNPlh4fylW1i9CZd87dmZe7HcVFu1nLc-NTpZA9wOQ4P1Fi1G6P_JjvafXflNtoLlzeA0ksYRehzo2USR3dI9HC9f5Tt7kr3mxHlL_gypJoi8yA4VHYOgnCqQ48-rrRfFHi57FdiLeTdgg7paI-klTkENkbqmGbWyWq8Ei6tiZF4OC-bAv9Z2C4bGYn48qku2569sslSqeVIH6-bte2HX93oxogosuG7AGwY7vFqVnxGYse8XG6w1ZzYyEg0K9VhILOHcf_MO2Lio4gu-BwNNH7sqbwOhKU4Di-Jq4sJJPoPmBoajOfARZ1xJihp9PF1XCRkGTLKKI0SM0VIICX8ZdMM-auvpua713XFrQIvmw8QTM8YHAj6u_FGLSz6AFk7ORFBPn6sLlEe3K8ofbTmR2suctSzHlUWV9G4EkEHYxfBAMdNFH5Glq1XnFxHOAFp1ci8U8AfxQyIH6uEqPRG5Y7Uzy3gp0HY3DSNaWAaJAHjZSJkqXTw1yuU6WEkjRDf0fN6xHU2HyjhxsveMQRoOGh4W2swwzdrlWZw%3D%3D)
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c51ab4aa58074733be8de3ab9e2fb4ec&_e=v69CVqO33hEF8zHlBLesxssZyNdEMWEGgTeGroGSozbMUTfXAf_r83SM4dTSy-rEX0FS-SVAx7VYuXndQBfw5Fja0TFxAZ8HAG7trtLoA5alHPSjwEDh4WdpN011uVEDh969U5uxHSA62WzuYa8M9cgAZn3DxE3Y13gP6R0M-RM9F75lTgUNPlh4fylW1i9CZd87dmZe7HcVFu1nLc-NTpZA9wOQ4P1Fi1G6P_JjvafXflNtoLlzeA0ksYRehzo2rsPWvuaMS9h-Fd4Kl_UdcGEWH0tCv1pDjXoyADwXFKoMGrQPp31NIgdY4y-nXF76uzzZjl8V-5misgJ74pP0HeKzIbJQ4FGrnkD1Pt6MM_qF6Y1SgsSx9rGO28_WA2Yc-1cVu6dlmlIqRv8nxXZcE0pFuokCKW1NJAZ9sHSAGpSHDYD4bsHJ9dCmepDofHQ3HL-9RHOY7GeVIiPAE4adC95UlaDbsTOhotg3OLTLYpPZdpYeZ90Oj8lJfswauSIKJo3KwiL2FT06HvA9V8T2bnlqpvfd1p3BCxmr6iJvI1D4auJSP9om2H-xswu7G7vG8F114llF28B_8SE_c8HurWxTKuRakRUuG-ukg1vPUUp7S3ADJx73h1FGZfZDDQuVF4E3o9V30Plqan11N27nyHE9a6sx_kGakP66E0vFW-u3n2ash-c-YbpiFbyI_ryArit8Hnigt1HK2Ijrfzl7PA%3D%3D)
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c51ab4aa58074733be8de3ab9e2fb4ec&_e=v69CVqO33hEF8zHlBLesxssZyNdEMWEGgTeGroGSozbMUTfXAf_r83SM4dTSy-rEX0FS-SVAx7VYuXndQBfw5Fja0TFxAZ8HAG7trtLoA5alHPSjwEDh4WdpN011uVEDh969U5uxHSA62WzuYa8M9cgAZn3DxE3Y13gP6R0M-RM9F75lTgUNPlh4fylW1i9CZd87dmZe7HcVFu1nLc-NTpZA9wOQ4P1Fi1G6P_JjvafXflNtoLlzeA0ksYRehzo2L9QFi5Ia3hKwxay2zcAhxAsEBb5MqiKF6O5f3MCJ6JBsLsoY9aaYX4jIevfXgYJ-pE0DkQxCPCCO2JrfI1sT53XYCfEOLUHCYy3FtUlgRmR6Z3BbFP2RUvLoPSYDketsPRM_2rFNmhZHHr5PXEc4gjac9lO9ltJXzk28tQaGsrM50rJnNoz8qMeeO_mfOh91XrKEEYhzvYw7OYZnJRZhwau0U-iiUi6Iv_Gaz6dzSl7kSzw1NPIHD7AwGctfTyyz0vM34RUYPv7kIqjYalX8FJEa3OJrFlmaMsydbwX6h1fOPKV1V7FnZEVTInFbvH5kkhSm4B5D6s6KsFjK2_D3MhsPiOqQsN3B86HP9RPqZqr-4dGKv7rFcfXe57i7Gm-hoUPSP-wxd_OB1S9tGzNVQ_dpV33Mia1tXjp3jySNzJ8y57VbgoxO7AAm2aQTDPl7V7DytfwFUEcQ46m9UW_Kyg%3D%3D)
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. clean_body: "You’ve gotta meet this guy in Illinois...” I did. A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today. | Patriot, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, " You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois." So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving. Above: The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... I knew. Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. Faith, family, freedom -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? He did it. He didn't just build a brand... He built a machine. First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it from the start. Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together. We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- and it delivered real results. 10 for 10. In every single state we operated in... Trump won. In Arizona alone, we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. In Wisconsin? 60,000+. In Nevada? 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. In Michigan? 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... We made history. Above: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. Because Charlie never stopped. He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- and make it stronger than ever. Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- we must turn it into action. He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: " What are we building next?" Well, Patriot, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. But it doesn 't happen without you. So, here 's my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking " what now?" Dear Peter, I’d like to have an honest conversation with you about our great state. I believe our future is bright and Alaska’s best days are ahead of us. **That’s why today, I’m excited to officially launch my campaign to be our next governor.** As lieutenant governor, I’ve fought tough battles for Alaskans. As Commissioner of Corrections, I fought to repeal soft-on-crime laws _and won_. And in the state legislature, I went up against politicians in Juneau to protect the PFD _and won_. I promise to bring the same grit and common sense to the Governor’s office, because I want to ensure Alaska remains the best place to live, work, and raise a family for our kids and grandkids. ↓My Alaska story starts at 18. I came up for a two-week summer trip and ended up staying to work on a pipeline. I loved the attitude here. It was rugged, independent, full of American spirit, neighborly, and welcoming. Every day was a new adventure, so I decided to stay and build a life, career, and family here. After working in several different industries, I was encouraged to run for office by my community. From serving nine years in the Legislature to stepping up as Commissioner of Corrections and now as your Lieutenant Governor, I’ve always kept my word and put Alaskans first above party politics and political pressure. _**That’s how you have to lead in Alaska:
with _grit_ and the _resolve_ to do the right thing.**_ As governor, I’ll focus on what matters most:
* _**Protecting**_ the PFD for families today and tomorrow
* Growing jobs and _**strengthening**_ our economy
* Supporting resource development to _**lower costs**_ and achieve energy independence
* Backing law enforcement and _**keeping our communities safe**_
* Balancing budgets and _**cutting waste**_
* Building _**strong schools**_ and preparing students for the future.

Alaska gave me everything, and I vow to continue giving back. Now that you know my story, I hope to hear yours over the next year. Today, I am hopeful that you will take two minutes to become a part of our [**launch team**](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=0f272314b6bf43f19ef29b3191efb561&_e=-l_hwCOhlRopcaX1OIVhsX5Pp_4TJPIC_EzPTFrDw1qHrgaY4R_U_QO6TBH1hkpdVEcd0b0N6e7N3XM7L1sMQR2aWRLsuzG4jJFLBbl3HRgwKYTboVRfUsC19DdZwnrSiTKQMISJsZ56d179MVxYrWyOMJv5XYgxHOLS_XgDaql9oRNAsFL7uUa2vi6q0RcdC8iir3uFcaHXH8Csl9ybfGJhtlceK6AjzoX_AufTWNHoz97Sg2n0KpKPZSiOdM31_IjimL2RlEBLB2AcB4f1NuOTBysrrrAF6MIQOoQ_UKPqeNnjNlb52TnDBDgKInUzetMtjZUDCgKMWqmdc8qDi98sgDQ7tPANQBnTWhgyfVwr10muE5nOs_nQ4naAJboK-HMtHufTc6UhfnfRM66fnHN30K3I4aJTpzdsNwsFfr_pESJWOwt6ErRhCP3pcq3yhoqvsPtqDu5RnNoPYgz8n9hRLzRq1fJoJSIKzk88Sg3SuSBbxZpbIwuNF0dPYNswlAg-bvRD20pChlQ1V4ElT92n-kG3xItZv6N4UUmrFkB8XesPgeKXsi_iZKYiHkZCMhCLZY_ZeKoe9FT-TaxWvQUcUOuMweJUZWwI-UCyCP0ezD0D0BZmWrrfRYzFZFnxNJ4LyTAK8vDz74dVXg6ZvGt_1A_7Txjo7XS5dnw53pgLcpNxSvq12HE8UtJRc3OOaNyR38u7Aerl-J5EUhgtwHBXcVNeDFNOASYqDSIJZzzQT_FcdfR2NcdfUcCswZ0yBeObkQW87Md81GxrWCfMX5hG4kMWz0S7XpioKSLDmOVZOIqGvDQNrttHy7MmU3GsLKjZh4liUrvavSmFyT4QH5aDX5b8Ho_FjjWikPHJXF3C6Uy6tpOJ7Eq696OcnVgmTZ2mX3i314mU8wpft0oLxTUK5Yb554GqtPe3d3QuFKrLwjjQnJz_3AwYMaGm86qF0-nRE0RziNWB23Ct6IaaVgdoe30Po8klnCdf7DGeZ5mTv93FKCW9F2qgeBLhdu1YAFFHuo-XnXBCW8RC3mF1Fts6Zq7-BoKfPfnfzedBMoyqADwm_ThimnJcoyemDZm5Hxw0H79LOldTetWSJyTY7Z-NqJQ9f14XDNgSSlNGaJZKOL4MmwiWWaFseUgdYY9Bciw7qJlWD-cI2g6hdDSXbO93Sy0FcgEddgd9CRAJ_FmOUj6u4-7UuwMxMpo2pqlt6tS8g-eaHy0_ypOe_hJlNhHghyX1c_aMsNtN34T39MtDsjn8P2F-WNNl0InVpStspPOpFZEsEtue9skIYan1Eqf-PirsW5scwXJTWo0fQzW3rAwKb6GSuNEzpklLjsuJbXbbBQWBjaGMdg4WiqtPckJUvjmF6-5Wx55rTPyyIGQRqofhVwxGrubqiCMPOhHAXyjAH_3eg61TVXMa7r7DZhooiA2OBPO5eWgwZvVfUI3_yw4aMiNpTlB6LSyRd8_7U6n5h1Qwl_AxA3C0s3gw6_xFOrx9vzrBjgDYzlAftb1OvH8ItL0kIeol5Y3rXBaUm9-7CCu-zm1pQ4nGqFmaptIxpxSminiQC6y9y4eDpqZjkeii7AwsOM4dgyUR1gxt) with a small or large financial contribution. clean_body: An important message about the future of our state.| | | Click here if you wish to unsubscribe Dear Peter, I’d like to have an honest conversation with you about our great state. I believe our future is bright and Alaska’s best days are ahead of us. That’s why today, I’m excited to officially launch my campaign to be our next governor. As lieutenant governor, I’ve fought tough battles for Alaskans. As Commissioner of Corrections, I fought to repeal soft-on-crime laws and won. And in the state legislature, I went up against politicians in Juneau to protect the PFD and won. I promise to bring the same grit and common sense to the Governor’s office, because I want to ensure Alaska remains the best place to live, work, and raise a family for our kids and grandkids. If that’s enough for you, please join my by supporting me . If you’d like to read more of my story, check it out below! ↓My Alaska story starts at 18. I came up for a two-week summer trip and ended up staying to work on a pipeline. I loved the attitude here. It was rugged, independent, full of American spirit, neighborly, and welcoming. Every day was a new adventure, so I decided to stay and build a life, career, and family here. After working in several different industries, I was encouraged to run for office by my community. From serving nine years in the Legislature to stepping up as Commissioner of Corrections and now as your Lieutenant Governor, I’ve always kept my word and put Alaskans first above party politics and political pressure. That’s how you have to lead in Alaska: with grit and the resolve to do the right thing. As governor, I’ll focus on what matters most: Protecting the PFD for families today and tomorrow Growing jobs and strengthening our economy Supporting resource development to lower costs and achieve energy independence Backing law enforcement and keeping our communities safe Balancing budgets and cutting waste Building strong schools and preparing students for the future. Alaska gave me everything, and I vow to continue giving back. Now that you know my story, I hope to hear yours over the next year. Today, I am hopeful that you will take two minutes to become a part of our with a small or large financial contribution. Whatever fits your budget! I’d be honored to have your support. Together, we will build a stronger future for Alaska. With gratitude, Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | | | ---|---|---

body:
We're doing everything in our power to maintain our lead.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116879545/574732594/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-08_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjM4ZDUzMzgtOTBhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P0W6_PCgpwYlk6e95NR0Mhl7gIilGg4Ud5HH4GbPxWs=)
Peter, we take most polls with a grain of salt — and for good reason. _They're all over the place._
Within a span of days, two polls were released that placed us solidly in the lead. On the other hand, another poll has shown Winsome Earle-Sears not only gaining ground but practically erasing our lead.
_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116879546/574732595/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-08_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjM4ZDUzMzgtOTBhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P0W6_PCgpwYlk6e95NR0Mhl7gIilGg4Ud5HH4GbPxWs=)**_
So what should we think about all of this? That's easy: _Remind yourself that the only poll which truly matters is the result on Election Day._
In the meantime, we have to do _everything_ in our power to flip Virginia blue, including sending emails and texts to raise money. It's the only way we shrink our budget gap and see this election through to the finish.

clean_body: We're doing everything in our power to maintain our lead. = Peter, we take most polls with a grain of salt — and for good reason. They're all over the place. Within a span of days, two polls were released that placed us solidly in the lead. On the other hand, another poll has shown Winsome Earle-Sears not only gaining ground but practically erasing our lead. = So what should we think about all of this? That's easy: Remind yourself that the only poll which truly matters is the result on Election Day. In the meantime, we have to do everything in our power to flip Virginia blue, including sending emails and texts to raise money. It's the only way we shrink our budget gap and see this election through to the finish. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Remember, the bigger our margin of victory, the stronger the message we'll send to the rest of the country.
