body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116879604/574732798/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY5MzMxYzgtOTBhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RI6szxVC7RrwM9gIyYqXxyM1vDpZ8h3yFAhmF6DWtj8=) Last month, I wrapped up my 10-stop “Give ‘Em Hell” town hall tour. I traveled over 450 miles across Oregon’s 5th District and reached over 42,000 constituents to hear directly from them and understand how I can better represent our community in Congress. I’ve heard a lot of concerns from my constituents from all political parties, but one concern has been universal: _access to healthcare._ Oregonians are worried about the viability of rural hospitals, the availability of medical providers, and the cost — which could get worse thanks to the GOP’s Medicaid cuts. While my Republican colleagues try to run and hide from their constituents after cutting their healthcare, I’m showing up to hear from Oregonians and bring their concerns back with me to Congress to keep fighting to restore Medicaid funding and ensure everyone can get the care they need without breaking the bank. **But here’s the thing: numbers count.** Right now, Republicans are in full control of our federal government, so we simply don’t have the numbers to block their attempts to cut programs like Medicaid. If we want to stand up to the GOP’s trash agenda and fight for affordable and accessible healthcare, we have to show up at the midterms next year and help flip the House blue. _**[But there’s no path for Democrats to take back the House unless we protect this must-hold seat in Oregon. clean_body: = Last month, I wrapped up my 10-stop “Give ‘Em Hell” town hall tour. I traveled over 450 miles across Oregon’s 5th District and reached over 42,000 constituents to hear directly from them and understand how I can better represent our community in Congress. I’ve heard a lot of concerns from my constituents from all political parties, but one concern has been universal: access to healthcare. Oregonians are worried about the viability of rural hospitals, the availability of medical providers, and the cost — which could get worse thanks to the GOP’s Medicaid cuts. While my Republican colleagues try to run and hide from their constituents after cutting their healthcare, I’m showing up to hear from Oregonians and bring their concerns back with me to Congress to keep fighting to restore Medicaid funding and ensure everyone can get the care they need without breaking the bank. But here’s the thing: numbers count. Right now, Republicans are in full control of our federal government, so we simply don’t have the numbers to block their attempts to cut programs like Medicaid. If we want to stand up to the GOP’s trash agenda and fight for affordable and accessible healthcare, we have to show up at the midterms next year and help flip the House blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States

Eric Trump **[fired back at Chris Cuomo during a fiery live interview](https://substack.com/redirect/ec00d342-fd2b-4b23-92a9-c3389fa43152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on News Nation for accusing his father of weaponizing the government against his political enemies.
"I find it so ironic that you are literally pushing back on the 'weaponization of government' when the very same people that are coming after us went after your brother like hounds!!" Trump snapped at Cuomo.
"What did you just say?!!" Cuomo fired back.
**[Watch their clash here:](https://substack.com/redirect/ec00d342-fd2b-4b23-92a9-c3389fa43152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ec00d342-fd2b-4b23-92a9-c3389fa43152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ec00d342-fd2b-4b23-92a9-c3389fa43152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# MAGA Mike Lawler CONFRONTS Hakeem Jeffries to his face - What happens next is unbelievable
GOP Rep. Mike Lawler **[confronted House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries](https://substack.com/redirect/a70f944c-6b89-4c90-a160-ae4f20e9dc18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the Capitol halls, pressing him to sign onto a one-year extension of Affordable Care Act subsidies, which Jeffries had earlier dismissed as a "non-starter."
"It's sad. It's sad. You could easily sign onto this," Lawler said. "The only embarrassment here is you."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a70f944c-6b89-4c90-a160-ae4f20e9dc18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **How To Survive in A World That Trades Without Us**
### **What good is a 401(k) in a world that no longer accepts USD? Exit now!**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ce0e8c9-8e8d-49dd-920a-ae19b0aca810?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Most Americans aren't aware of the worldwide impact BRICS has made. But soon they will feel it, directly in their retirement accounts.
Led by the alliance of Vladimir Putin & Xi Jinping, BRICS is over 4.4B members strong and they are building a new global monetary system without us.
One with resource control, strength in numbers, and zero need for the U.S. dollar in its ecosystem for global trade.
**[That's why central banks are loading up on gold](https://substack.com/redirect/0ce0e8c9-8e8d-49dd-920a-ae19b0aca810?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while cutting their ties to US Treasury bonds.**
If your retirement depends on the value in your dollar backed 401(k)s, IRAs, TSPs, and pensions, you're choosing to go down with the ship.
That's why thousands of Americans are following the path laid out by central banks, transferring their retirement savings accounts into self directed Gold IRAs.
This way ensures your wealth is protected by physical gold that you own, not paper promises, or numbers on a screen.

[ Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/0ce0e8c9-8e8d-49dd-920a-ae19b0aca810?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Arizona Democrats confront Speaker Mike Johnson outside his office, Johnson doesn't back down
Democrat Sens. Mark Kelly and Ruben Gallego **[staged a surprise press conference outside Speaker Mike Johnson's office](https://substack.com/redirect/2d39aeb6-87e7-42e8-8c2d-3d6a0a3f2553?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, Wednesday, criticizing him for keeping Republicans "on an extended summer vacation" and refusing to agree with Democrat healthcare demands.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2d39aeb6-87e7-42e8-8c2d-3d6a0a3f2553?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Epstein files discharge petition controversy** : Gallego accused Johnson of refusing to swear in Rep.-elect Adelita Grijalva (D-Ariz.) because she would provide the final signature needed on a discharge petition to release Jeffrey Epstein files, alleging Johnson wants to "cover up for pedophiles on the Epstein list."
* **Johnson joins the confrontation** : Johnson surprised the senators by emerging from his office to join the press gaggle, saying he would swear in Grijalva "as soon as we get back to work" once the government reopens, calling the Epstein accusations "absurd" and dismissing the event as a "publicity stunt."

* * *
# NYPD arrests sword-wielding lunatic after brutal subway attack
David Mazariego, 25, **[reportedly confessed](https://substack.com/redirect/cd9d03e3-6c7d-42fe-8543-22043bec4e34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to beating a stranger to death outside Brooklyn's Jay Street-MetroTech Station because he didn't like how the victim "looked at him" after the man held a subway gate door open for him, the NY Post reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd9d03e3-6c7d-42fe-8543-22043bec4e34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Brutal attack details** : The assailant allegedly repeatedly pummeled the unidentified victim's face and stomped on his head up to 15 times before stealing his wallet and ID, leaving him battered and unconscious near Lawrence and Willoughby streets, with the victim dying roughly an hour later at New York-Presbyterian Hospital Brooklyn Methodist.
* **Arrest with weapon** : Hours after the killing, eagle-eyed NYPD officers in Times Square recognized Mazariego from emergency photos distributed department-wide during the manhunt and arrested him while he was carrying a long-bladed weapon resembling a samurai sword, leading to both murder and criminal weapon possession charges.

* * *
# Widespread flight delays plague travelers due to staffing shortages amid gov't shutdown
Air traffic control employees working without pay during the government shutdown **[have caused flight delays at major airports](https://substack.com/redirect/4c0af4fa-4b9d-40d1-8e1f-7d646c417c2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** including Nashville, Burbank, Chicago, Atlanta, and Newark, with Burbank Airport forced to conduct operations remotely from San Diego on Monday due to controller callouts.
* **Safety concerns and system slowdown** : The Department of Transportation reported "an uptick in controller shortages across the country," while Airlines for America warned that "to maintain" aviation safety as "the safest mode of transportation, the system may need to slow down, reducing efficiency," with TSA warning of potential longer wait times for the 2.5 million daily passengers.
* **Political blame game intensifies** : Republicans blame Democrats for the "Schumer Shutdown" putting "the safety of traveling Americans at risk," while Democrats including California Gov. Gavin Newsom blame "YOUR government shutdown" on Trump, with the White House countering that Democrats are dragging out the shutdown "to push free health care for illegal immigrants" while "everyday Americans" pay the price.

Trump snapped at Cuomo. "What did you just say?!!" Cuomo fired back. MAGA Mike Lawler CONFRONTS Hakeem Jeffries to his face - What happens next is unbelievable GOP Rep. Mike Lawler in the Capitol halls, pressing him to sign onto a one-year extension of Affordable Care Act subsidies, which Jeffries had earlier dismissed as a "non-starter." "It's sad. It's sad. You could easily sign onto this," Lawler said. "The only embarrassment here is you." How To Survive in A World That Trades Without Us What good is a 401(k) in a world that no longer accepts USD? Exit now! | | ---|---|--- Most Americans aren't aware of the worldwide impact BRICS has made. But soon they will feel it, directly in their retirement accounts. Led by the alliance of Vladimir Putin & Xi Jinping, BRICS is over 4.4B members strong and they are building a new global monetary system without us. One with resource control, strength in numbers, and zero need for the U.S. dollar in its ecosystem for global trade. while cutting their ties to US Treasury bonds. If your retirement depends on the value in your dollar backed 401(k)s, IRAs, TSPs, and pensions, you're choosing to go down with the ship. That's why thousands of Americans are following the path laid out by central banks, transferring their retirement savings accounts into self directed Gold IRAs. This way ensures your wealth is protected by physical gold that you own, not paper promises, or numbers on a screen. Arizona Democrats confront Speaker Mike Johnson outside his office, Johnson doesn't back down Democrat Sens. Mark Kelly and Ruben Gallego , Wednesday, criticizing him for keeping Republicans "on an extended summer vacation" and refusing to agree with Democrat healthcare demands. Epstein files discharge petition controversy : Gallego accused Johnson of refusing to swear in Rep.-elect Adelita Grijalva (D-Ariz.) because she would provide the final signature needed on a discharge petition to release Jeffrey Epstein files, alleging Johnson wants to "cover up for pedophiles on the Epstein list." Johnson joins the confrontation : Johnson surprised the senators by emerging from his office to join the press gaggle, saying he would swear in Grijalva "as soon as we get back to work" once the government reopens, calling the Epstein accusations "absurd" and dismissing the event as a "publicity stunt." NYPD arrests sword-wielding lunatic after brutal subway attack David Mazariego, 25, to beating a stranger to death outside Brooklyn's Jay Street-MetroTech Station because he didn't like how the victim "looked at him" after the man held a subway gate door open for him, the NY Post reports. | | ---|---|--- Brutal attack details : The assailant allegedly repeatedly pummeled the unidentified victim's face and stomped on his head up to 15 times before stealing his wallet and ID, leaving him battered and unconscious near Lawrence and Willoughby streets, with the victim dying roughly an hour later at New York-Presbyterian Hospital Brooklyn Methodist. Arrest with weapon : Hours after the killing, eagle-eyed NYPD officers in Times Square recognized Mazariego from emergency photos distributed department-wide during the manhunt and arrested him while he was carrying a long-bladed weapon resembling a samurai sword, leading to both murder and criminal weapon possession charges. Widespread flight delays plague travelers due to staffing shortages amid gov't shutdown Air traffic control employees working without pay during the government shutdown including Nashville, Burbank, Chicago, Atlanta, and Newark, with Burbank Airport forced to conduct operations remotely from San Diego on Monday due to controller callouts. Safety concerns and system slowdown : The Department of Transportation reported "an uptick in controller shortages across the country," while Airlines for America warned that "to maintain" aviation safety as "the safest mode of transportation, the system may need to slow down, reducing efficiency," with TSA warning of potential longer wait times for the 2.5 million daily passengers. Political blame game intensifies : Republicans blame Democrats for the "Schumer Shutdown" putting "the safety of traveling Americans at risk," while Democrats including California Gov. Gavin Newsom blame "YOUR government shutdown" on Trump, with the White House countering that Democrats are dragging out the shutdown "to push free health care for illegal immigrants" while "everyday Americans" pay the price. name: Team Cooper
subject: NEW: Anti-abortion extremists vs. Roy Cooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We’ve got to take back the Senate and defend abortion access. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116880750/574736894/823540626?refcode=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM4MzZkNS05NGE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bP6E_RKwzb5zhiIFupjU01IFvCsK9woA3rVkyL8OQI0=&emci=6477d0fd-7ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
Extreme Republicans and their allies are _doubling down_ on their plans to take away abortion rights, Peter. That’s right: Extreme, dark money anti-abortion groups announced they’re throwing millions of dollars into this race against Roy Cooper. They’re absolutely fine with our opponent’s embrace of militant figures like Mark Robinson, who wanted to force a total abortion ban on North Carolinians _with zero exceptions._ **_Just last year, North Carolinians rejected an anti-abortion extremist — and now, they’re trying to saddle us with another one._** **[Don’t let our opponents destroy our access to abortion care: Donate now to show you want a champion for reproductive freedom in the U.S. Senate >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116880751/574736895/-1743631236?refcode=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM4MzZkNS05NGE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bP6E_RKwzb5zhiIFupjU01IFvCsK9woA3rVkyL8OQI0=)** Roy’s no stranger to defending abortion access Peter. A clear majority of North Carolinians believe it isn’t the government’s place to get in between you and your doctor when it comes to these very personal decisions. And this cash infusion from our opponents is just the beginning: national Republicans are on track to make this the first-ever billion-dollar Senate race. They’re desperate to keep Roy, a true advocate for abortion access, from flipping this seat — because doing that could turn the whole Senate blue. **[The national GOP has shown they’re willing to put more and more of their money and time into this extremely competitive toss-up race. We need your help to stand up to their dangerous agenda and _win._ If you’re with us, can you make a contribution right now? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116880752/574736896/-1743631236?refcode=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM4MzZkNS05NGE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bP6E_RKwzb5zhiIFupjU01IFvCsK9woA3rVkyL8OQI0=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116880753/574736897/-1743631236?refcode=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.69c836d5-94a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM4MzZkNS05NGE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bP6E_RKwzb5zhiIFupjU01IFvCsK9woA3rVkyL8OQI0=)

Thanks so much,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

clean_body: We’ve got to take back the Senate and defend abortion access. | Extreme Republicans and their allies are doubling down on their plans to take away abortion rights, Peter. That’s right: Extreme, dark money anti-abortion groups announced they’re throwing millions of dollars into this race against Roy Cooper. They’re absolutely fine with our opponent’s embrace of militant figures like Mark Robinson, who wanted to force a total abortion ban on North Carolinians with zero exceptions. Just last year, North Carolinians rejected an anti-abortion extremist — and now, they’re trying to saddle us with another one. = Roy’s no stranger to defending abortion access Peter. A clear majority of North Carolinians believe it isn’t the government’s place to get in between you and your doctor when it comes to these very personal decisions. And this cash infusion from our opponents is just the beginning: national Republicans are on track to make this the first-ever billion-dollar Senate race. They’re desperate to keep Roy, a true advocate for abortion access, from flipping this seat — because doing that could turn the whole Senate blue. = | = Thanks so much, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Brianna Shamsuddoha, NDRC
subject: Virginians are voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President

We need to reach every Virginia voter in this high-stakes election.

**“GOP districts take early lead in Virginia’s first week of early voting”
— _Virginia Mercury_** Voters are casting their ballots in the 2025 election — and it’s not hyperbole to say that democracy hangs in the balance, Peter. The NDRC is leaving it all on the field — fighting to elect candidates like Abigail Spanberger for governor and a pro-democracy majority in the House of Delegates. Early voting runs through November 1, and early reports showed that Republican-leaning districts cast more ballots than Democratic-leaning districts. **We need to reach every Virginia voter in this high-stakes election. But with early voting underway and new attempts to gerrymander states emerging seemingly every week, our resources have been spread thin.** [**Help the NDRC reach voters, expose extremist politicians, and elect pro-democracy champions in 2025, 2026, and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116880819/574737129/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VirginiansVoting_email_20251008-NDRC-Tier1-VirginiansVoting_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251008-NDRC-Tier1-VirginiansVoting_&utm_campaign=VirginiansVoting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4ZjJmOGY4LTk0YTQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E1z1VFFhJj6B9Os2sfdJKJrQ_m055thDgTP56wMesaY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The contrast Virginia voters are facing couldn’t be clearer.
Abigail Spanberger served in the CIA and in Congress, earning a track record of fighting for electoral, labor, and reproductive rights. As governor, she’ll protect voting rights, strengthen public schools, lower health care costs, and make Virginia more affordable.
On the other hand, her extreme MAGA opponent supports attacks on workers, public schools, and basic freedoms.
And if we win big in Virginia, we could help expand voting rights even further in the state. Here’s how: 300,000 former felons who’ve served their time are not currently eligible to vote in the state because Virginia is one of only three states not to restore a person’s voting rights once their sentence is complete. Democrats advanced a bill to address this injustice — but we need the governor’s signature to make it law.
**The stakes couldn’t be higher in this pivotal election. In the final weeks of the 2025 election, help fight for democracy in key state-level elections. **
[**Chip in to fund the NDRC's work in key states across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116880826/574737136/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VirginiansVoting_email_20251008-NDRC-Tier1-VirginiansVoting_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251008-NDRC-Tier1-VirginiansVoting_&utm_campaign=VirginiansVoting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4ZjJmOGY4LTk0YTQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E1z1VFFhJj6B9Os2sfdJKJrQ_m055thDgTP56wMesaY=)
Thank you,
Brianna Shamsuddoha
Director of Mobilization, National Democratic Redistricting Committee

body:
I wanted you to hear this from me, not the Fake News!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Friend,
In between my many meetings and phone calls, I made a very important decision about your future in the MAGA movement.
I can’t keep this away from the press forever, so I wanted to share it with you as soon as I got confirmation.
**_[Believe me, Friend, you’re going to want to open this as soon as humanly possible.>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

We bring the same approach to this work that we perfected in the Military. Laser focused, disciplined, targeted — that’s what we need to do to reach the voter Mikie is going to need to win this race.
#
Peter —
Your support, your voice, has meant the world to us.
And we thought you deserved an explanation about what your support has made possible.
So, we’d like you to watch this new advertisement that we’re going to be running in New Jersey, to try and help Mikie Sherrill win the race for governor. Check it out:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25-njgov.-3AMRS&refcode=em251008-1-120&t=1&akid=34674%2E3013755%2EQpNwbU)
It’s support from people like you that gets ads like this made. And it’s that same support that helps us pay to run them and persuade people that other groups can’t reach — like Veterans.
We bring the same approach to this work that we perfected in the Military. Laser focused, disciplined, targeted — that’s what we need to do to reach the voters Mikie is going to need to win this race.
Now, if all of that sounds good to you, we’re about to ask you something really important.
[**Can you chip in today? Your support will help keep this ad on the air in New Jersey. It’ll help us hand Trump one of his first big defeats of the year. name: Aftyn Behn
subject: I’m humbled and honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
I’m ready to take on this race and flip TN-07
| I’m humbled and honored to be the Democratic nominee for Congress in TN-07.
---
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5780?t=1&akid=5633%2E196590%2EBLymEA)
I’m incredibly proud of this grassroots team. Because of your support, we were able to come together and make a real difference.

But our work is far from over. With less than two months to go until we face off against Trump’s handpicked candidate, Matt Van Epps, we can’t afford to waste any time.

[_**I’m counting on your help to flip this seat blue so that I can get to work feeding kids, fixing roads, and funding hospitals. Will you split a donation to my campaign and The Long Run PAC now?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5780?t=2&akid=5633%2E196590%2EBLymEA)
| | [$3 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5781?t=3&akid=5633%2E196590%2EBLymEA)

---
I’m an organizer, state rep, and pissed-off social worker running for Congress because we need leadership that meets this moment – and House Republicans aren’t looking out for us.

For the past decade, I’ve been at the heart of a long-term political project to take back Tennessee, shoulder to shoulder with fellow organizers, activists, movement lawyers, community groups, and mentors who took the time to teach me what real power-building looks like.

Now, I’m taking this fight national, but it won’t be easy, and I’m going to need your help.

Special elections matter — I won my first race in one. Now TN-07 is the only red-to-blue special in the country. Flip it, and we gain a seat, Republicans lose one, and 2026 shifts.

[_**It will take record-breaking support to win this race, but I know we have what it takes. Donate to my campaign and The Long Run PAC to help us win this race and flip this seat →**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5785?t=17&akid=5633%2E196590%2EBLymEA)
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5785?t=18&akid=5633%2E196590%2EBLymEA)
---
Let’s get to work!

Aftyn Behn

name: Jay Jones
subject: what reassures me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]
Hey, it's Jay Jones.
You may have seen my campaign mention that my MAGA opponent, Jason Miyares, is outraising us by a margin of 2-to-1. It’s true.
But even with this deficit looming over our campaign, here’s what reassures me: we’re unbought.
There’s not a single corrupt MAGA billionaire who I’d let control the office of Attorney General, and I surely will not take blank checks from MAGA mega-donors – something Jason Miyares can’t say the same about.
While Miyares takes checks from special interests, we’re asking everyday people like you to chip in $10, $25, or $50.
As Jason Miyares rings up Trump’s extremist billionaire buddies for help, our team looks to thousands of Virginians for support.
When outside groups have invested major money to defeat us, folks like you have continuously come together and helped us offset the impact.
That’s what a real grassroots movement looks like.
But a grassroots movement is nothing without its supporters. So will you help us raise every last dollar we need to defeat Jason Miyares and remove Donald Trump’s last foothold in Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: New day, same fake story.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Throughout this shutdown, Republicans have treated the American people like they can be lied to and tricked.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1878%2E791427%2Ea72wKY)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4628?t=2&akid=1878%2E791427%2Ea72wKY)
Friend — Over a week into a government shutdown with the potential to devastate our economy and harm millions of working families, the President of the United States is busy attacking Ilhan Omar once again.
Throughout this shutdown, Republicans have treated the American people like they can be lied to and tricked. They want to distract, deflect, and throw every falsehood they have at the wall to blame Democrats for Trump’s disastrous agenda and falling popularity. **The American people know better.**
Polls show that a vast majority of Americans understand that this is Donald Trump and the Republicans’ shutdown. They own it — and they own the skyrocketing cost of health care that will result if their budget passes without any negotiated changes.
But Trump is too busy playing dictator to see this crisis to a resolution. He’s sending troops into American cities. He’s letting ICE violate civil rights and attack US citizens. He’s even calling for the arrest of the mayor of Chicago and the governor of Illinois.
This is how oligarchy works: Create chaos in the streets and dysfunction in our government while you slash benefits for working families and line your pockets and the pockets of your corrupt billionaire friends.
We don’t know how much longer this shutdown will last, but we are calling on everyone on this team and this movement to stand with Ilhan today as she holds the line for the American people and their ability to afford the quality health care they deserve.
**[We know it’s a difficult time for some folks right now, so if you can afford it, please consider making a donation to our campaign as we keep up the fight against Trump’s disastrous budget and corrupt administration. Despite the government shutdown we still have to raise resources to run this campaign to keep up our organizing efforts.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251008-1-180&t=3&akid=1878%2E791427%2Ea72wKY)

name: Elizabeth
subject: Trump wants to deny pay to federal workers, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Axios just reported that Trump’s team is floating a memo to deny back pay to furloughed federal workers after the shutdown. Let that sink in. The people who caused this mess now want working families to pay the price. MAGA Republicans have spent years attacking federal workers, calling them “bureaucrats,” gutting their agencies, and freezing their pay. Now they’re threatening thousands of Virginians’ paychecks for good. I won’t stand by while our neighbors are punished for serving the public. Our next chance to stand up to MAGA Republicans will be November’s Virginia elections. Early voting is underway now, and I’m in a toss-up race to defeat a Republican incumbent. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Every dollar helps us reach voters who need to know what’s at stake. Let’s send a message that Virginia won’t be bullied by MAGA extremists. Thanks for your support. Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Team Padora
subject: Boebert calls it “boring.” We call it people’s lives.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/HCCKZYqDx42luZdzEqXiVQ~~/AAUS1hA~/2rE0lWtc_VJtusP6CICFIZXB0jOLgvmyJIu20O7qWjqSsL70eMP_hLMzp4HfJiNKWVukJ_nCjYj_pE7SNqAHzf5eIVutR1kybwME8E-dGcwpSQZTuO4SwPHbCt6QQmTI)
| | Friends – Lauren Boebert says fighting to keep health care affordable for millions of Americans is a “boring performance.” While she mocks efforts to stop a government shutdown and sneers at the idea of helping families afford their premiums, hardworking Coloradans are staring down the reality of skyrocketing health care costs if Republicans get their way. John knows that this isn’t a game, it’s people’s _lives._ Her kind of carelessness — that mockery of people’s struggles — has no place in leadership. And the truth is, we have the power to change it. When we organize, when we vote, when we refuse to be distracted by cynicism and cruelty, we can send a message loud and clear: **compassion, competence, and common sense still matter.** This campaign is and has always been about people. And if we do this together, we can make sure Lauren Boebert’s brand of carelessness and her political games don’t represent Colorado anymore. clean_body: | | | Friends – Lauren Boebert says fighting to keep health care affordable for millions of Americans is a “boring performance.” While she mocks efforts to stop a government shutdown and sneers at the idea of helping families afford their premiums, hardworking Coloradans are staring down the reality of skyrocketing health care costs if Republicans get their way. John knows that this isn’t a game, it’s people’s lives. Her kind of carelessness — that mockery of people’s struggles — has no place in leadership. And the truth is, we have the power to change it. When we organize, when we vote, when we refuse to be distracted by cynicism and cruelty, we can send a message loud and clear: compassion, competence, and common sense still matter. This campaign is and has always been about people. And if we do this together, we can make sure Lauren Boebert’s brand of carelessness and her political games don’t represent Colorado anymore. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | Thank you, Team Padora | Paid for by Padora for Colorado Padora for ColoradoPadora PO Box 116Severance, CO 80546United States "Website"•~~ "Privacy Policy"

name: Team Fetterman
subject: RFK Jr.’s attack on abortion access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10354%2E434096%2E27haGp ]John Fetterman

Hey, Derek – we had to reach out because Trump just pulled the rug out from under farmers in PA + across the country. 🤬

Here's what's happening:

1. Trump and his crew *illegally* cut USDA programs that our farmers rely on.

And it's hitting us right here in PA: They killed one of the programs that was helping keep small farms afloat and support their partnerships with local food banks. We're pissed.

2. So John joined a multi-state lawsuit against the Trump administration to fight back against these reckless cuts.

John's doing what he's always done – and that's standing up for our farmers, small towns, and rural communities.

3. Now, we're compiling a petition of 10,000 signatures from folks like you, Derek, who know how important it is that we sound the alarm about the Trump administration's disastrous cuts and stand with the farmers being impacted.

Our petition closes at midnight, so will you take 10 seconds to sign now and join John in support of farmers in PA + across the country?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51763?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10354%2E434096%2E27haGp

Thanks for lending your voice to this fight.

Team Fetterman 💛

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: This could lock in GOP control for decades

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
There’s a Supreme Court case coming up next week that could change everything about how our democracy works.
If the Court guts a key part of the Voting Rights Act – the law that stops racial gerrymandering – Republicans could redraw as many as 19 more House seats in their favor. That’s enough to lock in their majority for years.
Peter, we can’t control what this Supreme Court does, but we can build the kind of grassroots turnout operation that no map can erase.
If you’re able, please pitch in $10 or $25 today to help us fight back in the states where these battles are being drawn – literally. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10082025]

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

subject: There’s nothing to justify Trump deploying the National Guard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
I finished up another workout in my Race to Save the Senate to Save Our Republic.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116881162/574738516/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA0NDVjNC05N2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WlWHr7ERHDQD8GSGXsQT3Q3MnB80fJMgOJ_rcRllLdM=&emci=66b233bd-93a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ef0445c4-97a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7731215)
---

| | I finished up another workout in my Race to Save the Senate to Save Our Republic. [**You can watch my latest video update here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116881163/574738517/864879461?refcode=2025-10-08-race&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ef0445c4-97a4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA0NDVjNC05N2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WlWHr7ERHDQD8GSGXsQT3Q3MnB80fJMgOJ_rcRllLdM=) My recent run had me thinking about how fragile our democracy truly is — because once again, Donald Trump is trying to cross a line that no president should ever approach. After a federal judge ruled there was no rebellion or invasion to justify deploying the National Guard into Oregon, Trump did it anyway. He ordered troops from California and Texas to be sent into our cities. But fortunately, the same judge blocked that as well. But here's the thing: we can't count on the courts. Already, a court in Chicago failed to block Trump's efforts to bring out-of-state troops into the city. And we know when issues get bumped up to the Supreme Court, they've been ruling, often without hearings, to give more power to the executive. Let's be very clear about what this is: It's an attempt to normalize the use of the military against the American people. It's a test to see how far he can go. And if he gets away with it now, what happens next? We've seen this playbook before. Authoritarian leaders around the world use fear and chaos to justify crackdowns, silence dissent, and dismantle democracy from within. That's what Trump is trying to do, and it's up to us to stop him. We can't rely on the courts or anyone else to save us. It has to be the American public saying hell no, we love our Republic and are willing to stand up and fight for it now. That's what this Race to Save the Senate is all about: defending our democracy, protecting free speech, ensuring every family has the chance to thrive, and saying no to authoritarianism in America. We can't sit this one out. We need to show Trump and his cronies that the American people will not be silenced, and we will not surrender our freedoms. clean_body: I finished up another workout in my Race to Save the Senate to Save Our Republic. | | | | I finished up another workout in my Race to Save the Senate to Save Our Republic. = My recent run had me thinking about how fragile our democracy truly is — because once again, Donald Trump is trying to cross a line that no president should ever approach. After a federal judge ruled there was no rebellion or invasion to justify deploying the National Guard into Oregon, Trump did it anyway. He ordered troops from California and Texas to be sent into our cities. But fortunately, the same judge blocked that as well. But here's the thing: we can't count on the courts. Already, a court in Chicago failed to block Trump's efforts to bring out-of-state troops into the city. And we know when issues get bumped up to the Supreme Court, they've been ruling, often without hearings, to give more power to the executive. Let's be very clear about what this is: It's an attempt to normalize the use of the military against the American people. It's a test to see how far he can go. And if he gets away with it now, what happens next? We've seen this playbook before. Authoritarian leaders around the world use fear and chaos to justify crackdowns, silence dissent, and dismantle democracy from within. That's what Trump is trying to do, and it's up to us to stop him. We can't rely on the courts or anyone else to save us. It has to be the American public saying hell no, we love our Republic and are willing to stand up and fight for it now. That's what this Race to Save the Senate is all about: defending our democracy, protecting free speech, ensuring every family has the chance to thrive, and saying no to authoritarianism in America. We can't sit this one out. We need to show Trump and his cronies that the American people will not be silenced, and we will not surrender our freedoms. This is the fight of our time, and I need you with me. = = Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Justin J. Pearson
subject: It’s time to give Memphis a real fighter in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-2-jp.zSsfGe&refcode=em20251008-37089&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37089%2E1203867%2EdBcDkw ]A picutre of Justin J. Pearson in a white shirt with a blue tie.

Hi Peter, my name is Justin J.
Pearson, and I’m the State Representative for District 86 in Memphis,
Tennessee.

In 2020, I helped lead the fight to defeat a multi-billion-dollar crude
oil pipeline project that would have poisoned drinking water for one
million people and stolen land from South Memphis residents.

In 2023, I was one of the “Tennessee Three” who joined hundreds of people
on the House floor to protest Republicans’ inaction on gun violence, days
after a deadly mass school shooting in Nashville. Instead of using their
power to address this epidemic and save lives, Republicans voted to expel
me from office.

In 2025, I'm standing up to billionaire Elon Musk to protect my community,
our health, and our environment from the toxic pollution of his xAI data
center he’s forced onto Memphis.

And in 2026, I’m taking the fight to Washington to give my community the
representation it deserves: I’m running for Congress in Tennessee’s 9th
district.

I’m honored to be Justice Democrats’ third endorsement of this critical
election cycle and part of the growing movement to build more
working-class people power — especially as I take on a nearly 20-year
incumbent who simply isn’t fighting hard enough for us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-2-jp.zSsfGe&refcode=em20251008-37089&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37089%2E1203867%2EdBcDkw ]Before I tell you more, can I count on you to pitch in
$5 or whatever you can spare to support the launch of our
grassroots campaign?

My story begins in Southwest Memphis, where I was born and raised by
teenage parents who went on to become a teacher and a preacher. We were
financially poor, but spiritually rich. Growing up, I watched my mom and
dad work low-paying jobs to care for me and my four brothers while they
followed their passions, earned college degrees, and served our community.

We lived in a historically redlined, working-class neighborhood where
Black folks were denied mortgages, loans, and other financial investments.
Our community was treated as a dumping ground for industrial pollution,
including landfills, chemical plants, and other toxic industries. My
brother and so many others struggled with asthma their entire lives — even
today, this area is considered an “asthma capital” of the United States.

I’ve been fighting to improve the lives in my community since I was
fifteen years old, when I fought for new textbooks and Advanced Placement
classes at my underfunded, inner-city high school. When I returned home
from college, I co-founded an environmental advocacy organization that
helped spark a movement to stop an oil pipeline, and devoted myself to
organizing for justice.

I ran for my current seat in the Tennessee House of Representatives in
2023 at the age of 28. Just weeks after being sworn in, I joined two of my
Democratic colleagues and hundreds of peaceful demonstrators at a protest
for gun reform in the state capitol. Soon after, Republicans tried to
silence and punish us for “disorderly conduct.”

After I was expelled by the Republican supermajority, I was reinstated
through a special election, winning almost 94% of the vote, and then won
re-election in 2024. Since then, I have used my position to continue
speaking truth to power by showing up for my constituents, holding
numerous town hall meetings, fighting Tennessee Republicans over bad
bills, standing with striking workers on the picket lines, fighting
environmental racism from Elon Musk, and introducing legislation to
protect our children from gun violence and improve healthcare quality and
access for the poor and the aging.

To me, there is nothing more important than showing up for my community,
no matter what. But as our country slides rapidly into fascism fueled by
billionaires and the corporate elite, our current Congressman doesn’t seem
to believe the same.

Our current leadership is out of touch with the needs of the
disenfranchised in District 9 and lacks the energy and capacity to
actually fight for us. The money he claims to bring to our district has
not made a measurable impact on communities that need federal assistance
the most. He would know that if he stayed engaged with his constituents or
took the time to listen to them, but instead, he’s an absent DC politician
who brags that he doesn’t have to run for office anymore because he
assumes voters will support him whether he fights to earn their vote or
not.

I know that one single elected official cannot save a community, but that
the purpose of our leadership in Washington is to build a movement that
our community can see itself in and inspire them to come together to fight
back with the power everyday people already have. It takes all of us, and
we need leaders in Congress who know that.

It’s time to breathe new life into this congressional seat and the
Democratic Party at large. I’m ready to stand up, speak out, and roll up
my sleeves to work WITH the people, FOR the people — but it’s going to
take a groundswell of grassroots support to take on a powerful incumbent
and win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-2-jp.zSsfGe&refcode=em20251008-37089&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37089%2E1203867%2EdBcDkw ]If you’re with me, become a founding donor to our campaign. Any
contribution, from $5 to $50, will show that we’re ready to give TN-09 the
bold, working-class representation it deserves in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251008-2-jp.zSsfGe&refcode=em20251008-37089&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37089%2E1203867%2EdBcDkw ]Contribute $5

I can’t thank you enough.

In Love and Service,

Justin

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251008-37089-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37089_1203867_dBcDkw&akid=37089%2E1203867%2EdBcDkw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37089%2E1203867%2EdBcDkw

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Virginia’s Attorney General should protect children, not dream about killing them. Our AG should put criminals in jail, not be criminals themselves. This is common sense.** This is it, Peter. Too much is on the line. Virginia's safety depends on what you do right now. — Attorney General Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: We need to save healthcare. = It’s simple: Trump and his MAGA puppets want health care costs to go up and to kick Americans off their plans. Democrats want to lower costs, and we won’t stop fighting for it. Under Trump’s Big Ugly bill, premiums, deductibles, and copays will all increase. Democrats in DC are fighting to cancel the egregious cuts, lower costs, and save health care. Republicans? They’re nowhere to be found. Peter, that’s why this fight is about – ending the Republican healthcare crisis. = Together, Team Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ******=****** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

### **[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support ](https://substack.com/redirect/d3b0d5db-2e3a-4d30-afe8-b16bbec54657?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)👇**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/d3b0d5db-2e3a-4d30-afe8-b16bbec54657?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Tonight I went deep with former Chicago alderman, Sun-Times CEO, and all-around democracy fighter **Edwin Eisendrath**. We got personal about what's happening on our streets, why this moment in Chicago is bigger than Chicago, and how we stay human while we fight back. This one hit hard--and it's a must-watch if you care about community, courage, and the line between law and lawlessness.
* [**00:01:07**] Edwin sets the tone: "What you do matters right now." We talk grief, anger, and why showing up--hearts, bodies, and voices--actually moves people.
* [**00:09:50**] The ICE reality check. Videos, pellet guns, and a city under pressure--and why we refuse to be intimidated or dehumanized.
* [**00:20:12**] Making schools safe in a crackdown: Know-Your-Rights nights, community caravans, and the quiet work that keeps kids and parents breathing.
* [**00:33:45**] Shutdown politics, propaganda, and why "clean CR" talk is a con--plus the deeper fight over emergency powers.
* [**00:49:30**] After we win: accountability, structural reform, and refusing the "turn down the temperature" trap. We talk fascism--and how we actually beat it.

**[If this resonated, become a paid subscriber. It's $8/month and it directly fuels more reporting from the ground, more organizing tools for schools and neighborhoods, and the studio we're building so these stories reach millions. Help us build a community that shows up for each other--and doesn't blink in the face of power.](https://substack.com/redirect/d3b0d5db-2e3a-4d30-afe8-b16bbec54657?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

| A guest post by| [Edwin Eisendrath](https://substack.com/@eisendrath?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Edwin hosts "It's The Economy Stupid" on Lincoln Square & a weekly radio show on WCPT820AM. Edwin is the former CEO of the Chicago Sun-Times, a former Chicago Alderman, HUD Regional Administrator and teacher in Chicago's public schools. [Subscribe to Edwin](https://substack.com/redirect/3b91aea8-54e5-4edd-950c-f963c9f19e03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: Insults won’t reopen the government

body:
I’m making sure the American people know the truth.
#
I wanted to share something I recently posted online.
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251008-1.6xEAbz&refcode=em20251008-2396&amount=5&t=1&akid=2396%2E21716%2EBGWZJk)
DC Republicans can kick, scream, yell, and point fingers all they want to, but I’m making sure the American people know the truth:
**The federal government shut down because Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress are incapable of competent leadership.**
I’m in this fight for as long as it takes, but make no mistake: Republicans are targeting me. And they have been since before Day One.
[**If your budget allows, it would mean so much if you’d consider pitching in $5 to help us hold the line in this fight and start the final quarter of 2025 strong.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251008-1.6xEAbz&refcode=em20251008-2396&amount=5&t=2&akid=2396%2E21716%2EBGWZJk)

name: Mark Kelly and Ruben Gallego
subject: We had an interesting talk with Mike Johnson today…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey everybody, it's Mark Kelly.Mark Kelly
And Ruben Gallego.Ruben Gallego |
| Today, in the Capitol, we had an unexpected conversation with Mike Johnson about reopening the government and swearing in Adelita Grijalva.Mark Kelly
Johnson didn’t want to have that conversation. Ruben Gallego |
| He didn’t want to talk about millions of people seeing their health insurance premiums doubling. Mark Kelly
He didn’t want to talk about how he refuses to swear in our friend, Adelita Grijalva, after she won her election to the House.Ruben Gallego |
| And, of course, he tried to put the blame back on us — instead of on himself and Trump, where it should be. Mark Kelly
That’s what we’ve come to expect right now, from a bunch of folks who’d rather shut down the government than help out the American people.Ruben Gallego |
| It doesn't have to be this way, but that’s where we’re at... and it’s a real shame. Mark Kelly
But we’re not going to let up. Not a chance.Ruben Gallego |
| And if you have our back, we’ve got a humble request:Mark Kelly
[Can you please use this link to make a $5 contribution to Mark? It’d mean a lot to him to have your support.](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251008-1-700k&t=1&akid=6213%2E6688874%2EXGQ99m)Ruben Gallego |
| Even just a few bucks ads up fast when a ton of people chip in together.Mark Kelly
But we know not everyone can donate.Ruben Gallego |
| That’s why it’s so important that you do, if you can. Mark Kelly
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251008-1-700k&t=2&akid=6213%2E6688874%2EXGQ99m)
* * *
Thanks for your help — really. It means a lot.
– Mark Kelly & Ruben Gallego –

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6213%2E6688874%2EXGQ99m).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Chairman Jim MacEachern - NHGOP
subject: The DNC can't take a hint.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear was back in New Hampshire yesterday — trying once again to sell out-of-touch Democrats to Granite Staters.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9f56a8b787&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | | Friend,
This is Jim MacEachern, Chairman of the NH GOP.
---
| | The Democrats never learn.
Kentucky Governor [Andy Beshear was back in New Hampshire yesterday](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9e0a065a06&e=f3aa6419cd) — trying once again to sell out-of-touch Democrat policies to Granite Staters. You may remember the last time he came here, campaigning for Joyce Craig...who lost to Governor Kelly Ayotte by _nine points_.
Now, with the [DNC dumping truckloads of cash into New Hampshire](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=0488499543&e=f3aa6419cd), they’re doubling down — parachuting in more out-of-state politicians to tell us how to vote.
We’ve seen this movie before. It didn’t work then, and it won’t work now — not as long as Granite Staters stand strong.
[**Help us send Beshear and the DNC a message: New Hampshire isn’t for sale.**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=b6eca131c0&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [STAND WITH NH — $10](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=3748241b78&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [KEEP NH FREE — $25](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9c2c2fe736&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [DEFEND NH ADVANTAGE — $50](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9cc9eb50ba&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [STOP THE DNC TAKEOVER — $100](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=eb24570d3c&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| | Thanks to patriots like you, we’ve beaten their big money and bad ideas before — and with your help, we’ll do it again.
For New Hampshire,Jim MacEachern
---
| | | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/nhgop/dcdemsfloodingnh-46110?e=f3aa6419cd)

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: It’s time for Republicans to come to the table.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116882654/574743134/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-10-08_SHN_HLC_ES-32792&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU2ZjJhNy05Y2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTDhpRbNcEvZx_XwrH5F6-64cnrN-UXMDOn39o1vXns=)

Hi Peter, it’s Rep. Zoe Lofgren, and here’s what’s going on:

Right now, we are on day 8 of a partisan government shutdown because Republicans are prioritizing tax cuts for billionaires over health care for millions of Americans.

Without Republicans coming to the negotiating table, insurance premiums could more than _double_ next year.

But House Democrats are holding strong: we will not budge on health care.

I’m working tirelessly to end this shutdown with an agreement that protects affordable, accessible healthcare for all Americans.

In the face of a Republican leadership that would rather shut the government down than stand up to Donald Trump, I’ll never stop fighting to keep my constituents safe.

Thank you for standing with me.

Zoe Lofgren
Ranking Member of the Science Committee

**[P.S. I understand that the Republican shutdown is putting many Americans in a tough spot, but if you’re able, please donate to my re-election campaign to help me continue defending American health and safety against the Trump administration. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116882655/574743135/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-10-08_SHN_HLC_ES-32792&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU2ZjJhNy05Y2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTDhpRbNcEvZx_XwrH5F6-64cnrN-UXMDOn39o1vXns=)**

name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: The lifelines that keep PA blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

Republicans know exactly what keeps Pennsylvania moving forward, and they’re desperate to rip it apart. We cannot let them succeed.

They’d slash the voter registration efforts that we’ve built with over half a million dollars in resources. They’d gut the local organizing that makes sure every race is contested, no matter the size. And they’d do anything to dismantle vote-by-mail, even though it’s how hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians — _working parents, seniors, and people with disabilities_ — cast their ballots.

This isn’t abstract. These programs are lifelines. Without them, we’d be handing power back to the very people trying to silence us.

[If you want to make sure these programs not only survive but expand, we need you to step up and chip in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116882656/574743137/1737528682?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251008_FR_VotingPrograms_0_1MO_Pennsylvaniademocrats_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWU2ZjJhNy05Y2E0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3sy64WtRbzL45SAow6yT-9kMTd7484Opn2OmUV1WfQ=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, Republicans know exactly what keeps Pennsylvania moving forward, and they’re desperate to rip it apart. We cannot let them succeed. They’d slash the voter registration efforts that we’ve built with over half a million dollars in resources. They’d gut the local organizing that makes sure every race is contested, no matter the size. And they’d do anything to dismantle vote-by-mail, even though it’s how hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians — working parents, seniors, and people with disabilities — cast their ballots. This isn’t abstract. These programs are lifelines. Without them, we’d be handing power back to the very people trying to silence us. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s not just defend our progress. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Trump wants to end birthright citizenship →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251008-1562-foote&t=1001&akid=1562%2E342411%2EDwvFeR ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Earlier this year, Trump tried to strip birthright citizenship through an
executive order — a right guaranteed to every person born in the U.S.
under the 14th Amendment.

The Supreme Court didn’t stop him. Instead, they shielded his power,
refusing to rule on the core issue, while multiple federal appeals courts
blocked his order as unconstitutional.

Now, Trump is asking the conservative-majority Supreme Court to decide
once and for all the constitutionality of his order.

If they rule in his favor, it would dismantle protections enshrined in the
Constitution, overturn more than a century of legal precedent, and create
a class of stateless children stripped of their rights.

This isn’t just a policy fight — it’s a direct attack on immigrant
communities, and it sends the message that presidents can erase guaranteed
freedoms with the swipe of a pen, ripping apart the very fabric of our
democracy.

We can’t let Trump rewrite the Constitution to fit his far-right,
anti-immigrant agenda.

The Squad Victory Fund is building a grassroots movement strong enough to
ensure these attacks are met with unshakable resistance at every level.
We’re not backing down — but we need you in this fight with us, too.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251008-movement.PD88CU&refcode=em20251008-1562&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1562%2E342411%2EDwvFeR ]Will you chip in $3 now to fuel the Squad’s fight
against Trump’s unconstitutional assault on birthright citizenship?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251008-movement.PD88CU&refcode=em20251008-1562&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1562%2E342411%2EDwvFeR ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1562%2E342411%2EDwvFeR

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

[ Give Me 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/7d7f90c6-35d8-44da-9846-c2093a9886da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad212fcb-e59f-4be0-9dfb-1cda11e4b0e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Friends,
This week's _Amped Up_ was like a jolt of lightening. David Shuster and I came in hot, and we stayed there.
From the jump, we called the government shutdown what it is: a government held hostage by feeble men doing the bidding of a wobbly, wussified, weak, wannabe king.
Mike Johnson, father and son-of-Mike-Johnson "porn monitor," has become Trump's Epstein-file hall monitor.
Johnson's turned the House into a faux-prayer-circle for authoritarianism, as he refuses to seat Adelita Grijalva, newest elected Dem Congresswoman. Why? Because she's the the 218th vote that releases the Epstein Files.
And keeps the government shut down, because Johnson, as Trump's little appendage, spends most of his time staring at him with a creepy reverence one might want Freud to explain, and doing whatever Trump asks of him. [Stephen Miller with glasses.](https://substack.com/redirect/d66af34d-24de-424c-8a6a-d45299a8f41f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Before our amazing guest--Congressman Greg Landsman--even arrived, we tore into Trump's latest stunt.
His ordering the attacks on Venezuelan boats with zero congressional authorization. The _New York Bar Association_ is now calling these strikes "murder." And they're not exactly what you'd call an ideological peer of Moveon.org.
But a professional body, and one that usually blushes at strong language. And, yep, they used the M-word to describe actions by Trump that violate the Constitution and disregard basic humanity.
* * *

* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86d70f0a-60ca-442e-9aaf-05fdd0598915?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(Photo by FreedomTumZ/Bigstock)
I said it on air, and I'll say it again: this is what happens when power meets impunity.
David connected the dots to the Bush-Cheney "Curveball" fiasco. How the lying whispers of a wealthy Iraqi with a corrupt, right-wing agenda helped take us into a disastrous war.
Different decade, same playbook.
Then Congressman **Greg Landsman** joined us, and the conversation shifted from fury to strategy.
Greg's an old friend, a fighter from Cincinnati who beat a MAGA, leisure-suit-combover fossil to win his congressional seat.
Greg came ready to talk about the shutdown, the corruption, and how billionaires like Musk and Thiel have rigged both democracy and the economy--because they're inherently linked--to serve themselves.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7ff6889-7bed-4252-948d-b171eea0fa3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He said it plainly: this didn't "just happen." It was engineered. And the only way to fix it is to unrig it--root and branch.
We also discussed cowardice in Congress--how virtually every GOPer, and especially that weenie Johnson, bows to Trump on ICE, [sending unwanted troops into our cities](https://substack.com/redirect/fb8bc066-5f77-464f-903d-c40688cf2022?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), tariffs and every other abuse of power, instead of serving the people.
Greg walked us through what that looks like from the inside: Medicaid, healthcare subsidies, SNAP food security gutted to fund tax cuts for the weirdo billionaires like Musk, Thiel, Bezos and Ellison. Health-care subsidies held hostage, and oversight erased.
When we pressed Greg about why Democrats can't just _say out loud_ that a handful of billionaires working in conjunction with Trump and GOP Trump-humpers have taken over our government.
That they get new yachts _with the funds you needed for a doctor 's visit or insulin_--Greg didn't flinch.
> We have to. Otherwise we lose the narrative, and the country.
* * *
[Subscribe Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/d7ff6889-7bed-4252-948d-b171eea0fa3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.08r8L7RHvV4IY6yLqwBJSGhWo0h4HIL-TVuZ4icsqb8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175630815)
* * *
Greg also went deep on what it costs to stand up. He's was on the list of the gunman who murdered Melissa Hortman, the Minnesota State House Speaker. His daughter has had nightmares.
He told us faith and self-care are what keep him going--and that political violence is solvable, if we stop normalizing it and start legislating accountability. ["Sometimes," he said, "you've got to flip a few tables."](https://substack.com/redirect/81c179dd-0932-40bf-b499-5a4a9247b33e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**I couldn 't agree more.**
By the end, David and I found ourselves echoing Greg's urgency. We have to fight smarter _and_ angrier.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0cfd43d-daf8-4cb6-8fd7-d797f00bd777?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We can't separate democracy from economics, or justice from survival. Every cut to Medicaid, every tariff scam, every billionaire tax dodge--it's all the same assault on ordinary people, it takes dollars and cents directly out of our pockets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3aab03bb-47d7-473f-90a4-f015c27afcaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When we signed off, I reminded our viewers what _Amped Up_ stands for. We speak truth, we laugh at the absurd, and we never forget why we're angry: because we still give a damn.
Decency and democracy are worth the fight. Greg Landsman proved that today.
We don't save democracy by hoping someone else will do it.
[We save it by showing up--loud, relentless, unyielding--wherever power hides](https://substack.com/redirect/81c179dd-0932-40bf-b499-5a4a9247b33e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and people are hurt. The billionaires have their lobbyists, the authoritarians have their mobs, but we've got something stronger: _each other_.
Every share, [every subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/d7ff6889-7bed-4252-948d-b171eea0fa3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), every conversation that cuts through the noise is an act of resistance. Talk to your friends. Challenge the lies.
Support the fighters. [Fund the truth-tellers](https://substack.com/redirect/d7ff6889-7bed-4252-948d-b171eea0fa3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Vote like democracy depends on it--because it sure as hell does.
They've built a machine to break this country. We're building a movement to rebuild it. Let's make damn sure we do it together.
**No kings. No dictators. Just us -- saving American democracy, one honest fight at a time. Don't forget to click below for our 20% off deal! ⤵️⤵️⤵️**

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Just plain wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| | Hi there — The federal government is still shut down — because Republicans are willing to let healthcare costs skyrocket to pay for billionaire tax cuts. I was elected to deliver for the people of CT-05 — but Donald Trump, Mike Johnson, and congressional Republicans have a very different agenda. The result: A government shutdown. Increased healthcare costs. Potential delays to veterans’ benefits and nutrition assistance. Critical services halted. Hundreds of thousands of workers will go unpaid. **It is just plain wrong.** Trust that I am doing all that I can to reopen the government and enact policies that will make life more affordable for our hard-working families. Republicans might try to get in the way of that work — but I will fight back. Nothing is going to get in the way of working on behalf of my constituents. I will keep you updated on the government shutdown. More soon, Jahana
---
* * *
| | **About Jahana**
Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116882916/574744081/-8980093?refcode=AU_JH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGYzNmRjMC05ZWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FsJxHCMwW4j_vN27hXW7CNJ0IvafafiAP_ObUU5Tz5M=&emci=28f36dc0-9ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3df36dc0-9ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15529135) and [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116882918/574744093/-2126498125?refcode=AU_JH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251008_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGYzNmRjMC05ZWE0LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FsJxHCMwW4j_vN27hXW7CNJ0IvafafiAP_ObUU5Tz5M=&emci=28f36dc0-9ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3df36dc0-9ea4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15529135).
