clean_body: | | Hi there — The federal government is still shut down — because Republicans are willing to let healthcare costs skyrocket to pay for billionaire tax cuts. I was elected to deliver for the people of CT-05 — but Donald Trump, Mike Johnson, and congressional Republicans have a very different agenda. The result: A government shutdown. Increased healthcare costs. Potential delays to veterans’ benefits and nutrition assistance. Critical services halted. Hundreds of thousands of workers will go unpaid. It is just plain wrong. Trust that I am doing all that I can to reopen the government and enact policies that will make life more affordable for our hard-working families. Republicans might try to get in the way of that work — but I will fight back. Nothing is going to get in the way of working on behalf of my constituents. I will keep you updated on the government shutdown. More soon, Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I banned conversion therapy in Michigan. Now it’s under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I won’t let them turn back the clock on LGBTQ+ rights. |
#
---
Team, **The Supreme Court just heard a case that could undermine protections for LGBTQ+ kids — and open the door to dangerous “conversion therapy” practices across the country.** As a mom and a proud, lifelong ally, I will always fight back against these attacks. **[We need to face this head-on: They are coming for our rights, one by one. Will you chip in $5 right now to help elect leaders who will defend LGBTQ+ kids and stand up to the far-right’s attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116883002/574744268/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251008_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZmMzZkYzAtOWVhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tRKwkihMiJkamqE-KeXKokjokOzlJe8yXdbsFC9VG-E=)** | | [CHIP IN $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116883005/574744274/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251008_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZmMzZkYzAtOWVhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tRKwkihMiJkamqE-KeXKokjokOzlJe8yXdbsFC9VG-E=)
---
I will never let anyone rip away rights from our LGBTQ+ friends and loved ones — including some of the people I care about most. Everyone deserves to be who they are and love who they love. Period.
Conversion therapy has been condemned by every major medical and mental health organization. It causes trauma, depression, and lasting harm.
Here in Michigan, we banned it. But as we’ve seen before, when the far-right majority on the Supreme Court sets its sights on our rights, _nothing is safe._
**We can’t just hope they won’t go through with it.** We must show we’re ready to fight like hell, in Michigan and across the country, to protect everyone’s fundamental freedoms and defend them against any and all forms of discrimination.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to raise your voice today. Rush in $5 or more to Fight Like Hell PAC to support the rights, basic dignity, and health of every LGBTQ+ child.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116883008/574744276/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251008_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZmMzZkYzAtOWVhNC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tRKwkihMiJkamqE-KeXKokjokOzlJe8yXdbsFC9VG-E=)**

name: Vincent Dixie
subject: Thank you for being on this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
I couldn’t be prouder

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8LE0zrUXHOZJyYJilkIeWQ~~/AAUS1hA~/FAPofrSpjBkp1B5chqrJxjz7eh2OZre3Mg5ROP0mpDa7VYXFz5OdhpoMGEe00kYCVTXOHKXPCfx9KpI60DmyFjBLG7okqWazj4-FfFelKNjBiCYZZqhxLPzvi63uibtymZRuIMbSA3aMgA4sX9N01xcvZ3m4coGX7PY_IwP1iic~)
| | | | Peter, Running for Congress in Tennessee’s 7th District has been one of the greatest honors of my life, and I want to take a moment to say **thank you.** Thank you for believing in this campaign. Thank you for chipping in, showing up, and speaking out. Thank you for standing with me — not just as a candidate, but as a fighter for working families across Tennessee’s 7th District. While the result last night wasn’t what we hoped for, I want you to know how proud I am of everything we accomplished. We built a grassroots movement from the ground up. We gave people something to believe in. And we made it clear that the voices of working people still matter — and always will. To my campaign team, our volunteers, our supporters, and everyone who put their trust in me: thank you. This may be the end of a campaign, but it’s not the end of the work. Tennessee still needs leaders who will fight for affordable health care, living wages, and a government that works for all of us. I’ll never stop being one of those fighters. Now it’s on all of us to support Aftyn Behn in her mission to flip this seat for the first time in decades. Onward we march. With deep gratitude,
Vincent Dixie P.S. As we wind down the campaign, we still have some outstanding costs to cover. [**If you’re able, I’d be grateful for any support to help us retire our campaign debt.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-jpYoMonC63H88qK8FfVNA~~/AAUS1hA~/HE0aYpiKdqd85Wpz_bwHYn_7G8IC5Ve01zeBZlk7DFdk6EVnSxNqtZlvKiJzgP1mZCCyhNd3k081bkOl8Nf046bmT1OGZVCe0IwbfvAxKzcGzorAFv-XsQa2PRGMEtc9ViPTK1XbOTF81dcoftscex7UoEY1xoEKuLaYJ5rtkRc~) Thank you again for everything.
* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-jpYoMonC63H88qK8FfVNA~~/AAUS1hA~/HE0aYpiKdqd85Wpz_bwHYn_7G8IC5Ve01zeBZlk7DFdk6EVnSxNqtZlvKiJzgP1mZCCyhNd3k081bkOl8Nf046bmT1OGZVCe0IwbfvAxKzcGzorAFv-XsQa2PRGMEtc9ViPTK1XbOTF81dcoftscex7UoEY1xoEKuLaYJ5rtkRc~) ** **
**
